news_items.title: LD Düsseldorf, April 28, 2026, Procedural Order, UPC_CFI_869/2025
news_items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地院2026年4月程序令：关于提交文件可采性的裁决
news_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Order: Admissibility of Late Rejoinder Arguments on Amendment Motion
news_items.summary: The admissibility of the documents and arguments submitted is a question of fact. Whether the defendant’s submissions in its rejoinder regarding the motion to amend are relevant...
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方分院发布程序令（案号UPC_CFI_869/2025），涉及大日本印刷诉Zapp等公司专利侵权案。法院裁定，被告在反驳中针对修改动议提交的论据是否相关及是否逾期，属事实问题，需待口头程序结束后方能确定。依据武器平等原则，法院允许原告就被告的事实陈述补充评论，作为预防性措施，且不 prejudge 最终的可采性决定。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Düsseldorf Local Division issued a procedural order in case UPC_CFI_869/2025, involving Dai Nippon Printing Co., Ltd. against Zapp AG and Zapp Precision Metals GmbH. The court addressed the admissibility of documents and arguments submitted by the defendant in its rejoinder regarding a motion to amend. It determined that assessing whether these submissions are relevant or late is a factual question requiring thorough analysis, which can only be conclusively resolved at the end of oral proceedings. To uphold the principle of equality of arms, the court granted the plaintiff an additional opportunity to comment on the defendant’s statement of facts. This measure is precautionary and without prejudice to the final decision on whether the defendant’s additional arguments will be admitted into the record.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，应高度重视程序规则的灵活性。即便对方提交材料可能逾期，法院仍可能基于公平原则给予我方回应机会。建议企业建立快速响应机制，充分利用程序赋予的评论权，同时密切关注法官对“武器平等”原则的适用尺度，以优化诉讼策略。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This procedural order highlights the UPC’s flexible approach to managing late submissions and amendment motions. Parties should recognize that courts may prioritize procedural fairness over strict deadlines when balancing the interests of both sides. Litigants must remain agile, prepared to utilize opportunities for supplementary comments effectively. Establishing rapid response mechanisms allows teams to address unexpected factual assertions promptly. Furthermore, monitoring how judges apply the 'equality of arms' principle provides strategic insights into evidentiary standards. Understanding this judicial discretion helps optimize litigation strategies, ensuring that procedural rights are fully leveraged to counter potential surprises from opposing counsel during complex patent disputes.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["被告反驳中的修改动议论据可采性属事实问题，需结合案情全面分析", "基于武器平等原则，原告获准对被告新增事实陈述进行补充评论", "最终可采性判定将推迟至口头程序结束时作出，确保程序公正"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Admissibility of defendant's rejoinder arguments on amendment motions is a factual issue requiring full case analysis.", "Plaintiff granted supplementary comment rights on new facts to ensure equality of arms during proceedings.", "Final ruling on late evidence admissibility deferred until conclusion of oral hearings to ensure fairness."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用UPC程序规则争取补充评论机会，平衡对方突袭式举证", "关注法官对逾期证据可采性的裁量标准，完善应诉响应流程"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage procedural rules to secure supplementary comment opportunities, balancing opposing parties' surprise evidence tactics.", "Practice note: Monitor judicial discretion on late evidence admissibility to refine internal response workflows and litigation readiness.", "What to monitor: Track evolving standards for 'equality of arms' applications to anticipate judicial attitudes toward procedural delays."]
core_points_en: Admissibility of defendant's rejoinder arguments on amendment motions is a factual issue requiring full case analysis.
Plaintiff granted supplementary comment rights on new facts to ensure equality of arms during proceedings.
Final ruling on late evidence admissibility deferred until conclusion of oral hearings to ensure fairness.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage procedural rules to secure supplementary comment opportunities, balancing opposing parties' surprise evidence tactics.
Practice note: Monitor judicial discretion on late evidence admissibility to refine internal response workflows and litigation readiness.
What to monitor: Track evolving standards for 'equality of arms' applications to anticipate judicial attitudes toward procedural delays.

news_items.title: Court Of Appeal, Standing Judge, April 28, 2026, Order On Request For Discretionary Review, UPC_CoA_56/2026
news_items.title_zh: UPC上诉庭裁定：错过期限的人为错误可获追溯延期
news_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Human Error Under Systemic Checks Warrants Retroactive Term Extension
news_items.summary: The Court of Appeal examines a request for discretionary review in a patent dispute between Optopol Technology and Topcon Corporation concerning EP 2 845 534. The case involves interpretation of procedural rules governing standing and review processes under the Unified Patent Court framework.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 本案系Optopol与Topcon在统一专利法院（UPC）的专利纠纷。上诉庭审查了针对EP 2845534号专利的程序性请求。法院认定，尽管代理人助理系统录入失误导致错过期限，但律所已建立核查机制，该人为错误属可原谅情形。上诉庭支持地方法院决定，允许在权利恢复请求期内隐含提交追溯期限延长申请，强调此类申请应尽早提出，但在特定未决判例背景下具有合理性。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal examined a request for discretionary review in patent litigation between Optopol Technology and Topcon Corporation concerning EP 2 845 534. The dispute centered on procedural rules governing standing and the re-establishment of rights. The Local Division had found that a missed deadline resulted from an excusable human error, specifically an assistant’s incorrect data entry, despite the law firm having established systemic checks. The Court of Appeal upheld this determination as reasonable. It further validated the implicit filing of a retroactive term extension request under Rule 9.3 RoP within the timeframe for re-establishment of rights. While emphasizing that such requests should generally be made promptly, the Court acknowledged the reasonableness of the timing given the pending precedent in Angelalign v. Angel Technology at that stage.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，需建立严格的期限双重核查机制以防范人为失误。若遇不可抗力或合理疏忽，应及时利用“可原谅错误”条款申请救济。同时，注意程序请求的时效性与独立性，避免过度依赖替代性请求策略，确保合规操作以降低专利失效风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the threshold for excusable error under the Unified Patent Court framework, balancing strict procedural compliance with practical realities. Parties should ensure their docketing systems include redundant verification layers to demonstrate due care when relying on human error defenses. While alternative pleading strategies, such as implicitly combining term extension requests with re-establishment applications, may be accepted, practitioners must prioritize promptness. Monitoring evolving case law regarding procedural discretion remains essential to navigate complex timelines effectively and mitigate risks of patent lapse due to administrative oversights.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉庭认定代理人系统性核查下的人为失误属可原谅错误", "支持在权利恢复期限内隐含提交追溯期限延长申请的合理性", "明确依据程序规则第9.3条，追溯延期请求原则上应尽早提出"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Human error causing missed deadlines is excusable if robust systemic verification measures are already implemented by representatives.", "Implicit requests for retroactive term extension filed within the re-establishment period are procedurally valid under specific circumstances.", "Rule 9.3 RoP requires retroactive term extension requests to be submitted as soon as possible, though context matters."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["建立严格期限双重核查机制，防范人为失误导致专利失效", "善用“可原谅错误”条款及时申请救济，确保程序合规"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Implement redundant docketing checks to substantiate 'excusable error' claims during procedural disputes.", "Practice note: File retroactive term extension requests promptly; avoid over-relying on implicit alternative pleadings.", "What to monitor: Developments in UPC discretionary review standards regarding procedural defaults and human error exceptions."]
core_points_en: Human error causing missed deadlines is excusable if robust systemic verification measures are already implemented by representatives.
Implicit requests for retroactive term extension filed within the re-establishment period are procedurally valid under specific circumstances.
Rule 9.3 RoP requires retroactive term extension requests to be submitted as soon as possible, though context matters.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Implement redundant docketing checks to substantiate 'excusable error' claims during procedural disputes.
Practice note: File retroactive term extension requests promptly; avoid over-relying on implicit alternative pleadings.
What to monitor: Developments in UPC discretionary review standards regarding procedural defaults and human error exceptions.

news_items.title: LD Helsinki, April 29, 2026, Order Disposing Of Provisional Measures Application, ACT_551054/2023
news_items.title_zh: UPC赫尔辛基地院：临时措施申请失去目的时予以处置
news_items.title_en: UPC Helsinki: Disposing Provisional Measures When Devoid of Purpose Under Rule 360
news_items.summary: If a provisional measures application has become devoid of purpose and hence there is no longer need to adjudicate on it, the Court shall dispose of it based on R. 360 RoP...
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月29日，UPC赫尔辛基地方法院就ACT_551054/2023案发布命令。法院依据《程序规则》第360条裁定，若临时措施申请已失去目的且无需再行裁决，应予以处置。若当事人请求，法院可作出费用决定，并酌情考虑实体案件已知结果。本案涉及AIM Sport Development AG与多家TGI Sport实体关于EP 3 295 663号专利的争议。
news_items.ai_summary_en: On April 29, 2026, the UPC Helsinki Local Division issued an order in case ACT_551054/2023 regarding European Patent EP 3 295 663. The Court applied Rule 360 of the Rules of Procedure to dispose of an application for provisional measures that had become devoid of purpose, determining that further adjudication was unnecessary. The dispute involved applicant AIM Sport Development AG and multiple respondents within the TGI Sport group. Crucially, the ruling clarifies that upon request by the parties, the Court may issue a cost decision. In making this determination, the Court retains the discretion to consider the known outcome of the main proceedings on the merits. This procedural guidance highlights the mechanism for terminating interim relief proceedings when the underlying necessity ceases, while allowing for equitable allocation of legal costs based on the substantive case resolution.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC临时禁令时，需密切关注程序进展。若主案胜诉或和解，应及时主张临时措施失去目的以终止程序，避免不必要的费用支出。建议结合实体判决结果，积极向法院申请费用分担，优化跨境知识产权诉讼的成本控制策略。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This decision provides critical procedural clarity for litigants before the Unified Patent Court. When a main action is resolved through settlement or final judgment, interim relief applications often lose their practical utility. Parties should proactively seek dismissal of such measures under Rule 360 to avoid unnecessary procedural steps. Furthermore, requesting a cost decision allows courts to factor in the substantive case outcome, potentially leading to more favorable cost allocations. Strategic management of these procedural transitions is essential for optimizing litigation budgets and minimizing exposure to adverse cost orders in cross-border patent disputes.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["临时措施申请若失去目的，UPC法院依R.360条应予处置", "法院可依当事人请求裁定诉讼费用，参考实体案已知结果", "本案涉及EP 3 295 663号专利，原告为AIM Sport，被告为多家公司"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["UPC Courts must dispose of provisional measures applications under Rule 360 RoP if they become devoid of purpose.", "Courts may rule on costs upon party request, considering the known outcome of the main proceedings on the merits.", "The case involves patent EP 3 295 663 with AIM Sport Development AG as applicant against various TGI Sport entities."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注临时措施目的丧失情形，及时申请终止程序", "利用实体案结果争取有利费用裁定，降低诉讼成本"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Proactively seek dismissal of interim measures when the main case resolves to avoid wasted resources.", "Practice note: Request cost decisions referencing the merits outcome to optimize financial recovery or limit liability.", "What to monitor: Track the status of main proceedings to identify when provisional measures become devoid of purpose."]
core_points_en: UPC Courts must dispose of provisional measures applications under Rule 360 RoP if they become devoid of purpose.
Courts may rule on costs upon party request, considering the known outcome of the main proceedings on the merits.
The case involves patent EP 3 295 663 with AIM Sport Development AG as applicant against various TGI Sport entities.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Proactively seek dismissal of interim measures when the main case resolves to avoid wasted resources.
Practice note: Request cost decisions referencing the merits outcome to optimize financial recovery or limit liability.
What to monitor: Track the status of main proceedings to identify when provisional measures become devoid of purpose.

news_items.title: G1/25 hearing: turning point or status quo?
news_items.title_zh: G1/25听证：转折点还是维持现状？
news_items.title_en: G1/25 Hearing: Will the EPO Uphold Mandatory Description Adaptation or Change Practice?
news_items.summary: G 1/25 addresses a particularly controversial feature of EPO practice: the requirement to adapt the description. The long-anticipated hearing on G 1/25 took place on 8 May 2026, and unfolded in a manner rarely seen before the Enlarged Board of Appeal – the patent proprietor and the opponent presenting somewhat aligned positions, both opposing the preliminary opinion.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局扩大上诉委员会于2026年5月8日举行G1/25听证，聚焦异议程序中权利要求修改后是否必须相应修改说明书以消除不一致。专利权人与异议人罕见地联合反对初步意见，主张EPC无此强制规定。尽管双方提出法律解释及国际协调论据，但扩委会倾向于维持要求修改说明书的现行实践。本案将决定审查与异议阶段说明书适应性的法律义务边界。
news_items.ai_summary_en: On 8 May 2026, the Enlarged Board of Appeal held a significant hearing in case G 1/25, addressing whether description adaptation is mandatory when claims are amended during opposition proceedings. In a rare alignment, both the patent proprietor and the opponent opposed the Board’s preliminary opinion, arguing that the European Patent Convention (EPC) does not impose such a strict requirement. Despite these joint submissions and arguments regarding international harmonization, the Enlarged Board appears inclined to maintain the current practice requiring description adaptation in both examination and opposition phases. This decision will critically define the legal boundaries for consistency between claims and descriptions across EPO procedures.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 若EPO维持强制修改说明书的实践，中国申请人在欧维权成本将增加。建议企业在答复审查意见或应对异议时，提前规划说明书修改策略，确保权利要求与描述严格一致，避免因形式缺陷导致权利不稳定或额外费用。同时需关注最终裁决对全球专利实务的潜在影响。
news_items.ai_insight_en: If the Enlarged Board upholds the mandatory description adaptation requirement, applicants and patentees face increased procedural burdens and costs in Europe. Strict consistency between claims and the description becomes essential to avoid validity challenges or additional amendment fees. Stakeholders should proactively manage description quality during prosecution and prepare robust adaptation strategies for opposition responses. Monitoring the final decision is crucial, as it may influence global patent drafting standards and harmonization efforts, impacting how consistency is managed across different jurisdictions.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["G1/25听证探讨异议中权利要求修改后是否需强制适配说明书", "当事人联合反对初步意见，主张EPC未规定此类强制性适应义务", "扩委会倾向维持现行实践，要求审查及异议中消除描述不一致"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["G 1/25 examines whether EPC rules mandate adapting the description to match claim amendments introduced during opposition proceedings.", "Both parties jointly challenged the preliminary opinion, asserting that no EPC provision strictly requires such mandatory description adaptation.", "The Enlarged Board favors maintaining existing practice, requiring removal of inconsistencies between claims and descriptions in all stages."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["需强化说明书与权利要求的一致性管理以规避合规风险", "应预判程序成本上升并优化在欧专利申请与答辩策略"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Strengthen management of consistency between claims and descriptions to mitigate compliance risks and potential validity issues.", "Practice note: Anticipate rising procedural costs and optimize European patent application and response strategies to handle description adaptations efficiently.", "What to monitor: The final ruling's impact on global patent practices and potential shifts in international harmonization regarding description requirements."]
core_points_en: G 1/25 examines whether EPC rules mandate adapting the description to match claim amendments introduced during opposition proceedings.
Both parties jointly challenged the preliminary opinion, asserting that no EPC provision strictly requires such mandatory description adaptation.
The Enlarged Board favors maintaining existing practice, requiring removal of inconsistencies between claims and descriptions in all stages.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strengthen management of consistency between claims and descriptions to mitigate compliance risks and potential validity issues.
Practice note: Anticipate rising procedural costs and optimize European patent application and response strategies to handle description adaptations efficiently.
What to monitor: The final ruling's impact on global patent practices and potential shifts in international harmonization regarding description requirements.

news_items.title: IPEC insights: Prosecco PDO Consortium v Prosecco International -…
news_items.title_zh: IPEC驳回Prosecco国际公司驳回起诉申请
news_items.title_en: IPEC Dismisses Strike-Out Bid in Prosecco PDO Infringement Case Against UK Spirits Firm
news_items.summary: The IPEC has dismissed a strike-out bid by a British spirits company accused of misusing the protected Prosecco name, allowing the case to proceed to…
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 意大利Prosecco PDO保护协会在英国IPEC起诉Prosecco International Ltd滥用受保护的“Prosecco”名称。被告申请驳回起诉被拒，案件将进入审判阶段。原告指控被告在不符合PDO规范的饮料、投资合作及公司名称中使用该标识，侵犯欧盟原产地名称保护法规（已纳入英国法）及英国证明商标。此案涉及管辖权、平行诉讼及PDO保护范围等关键法律问题。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Intellectual Property Enterprise Court (IPEC) has rejected a strike-out application by Prosecco International Ltd, allowing the infringement action brought by the Prosecco PDO Consortium to proceed to trial. The claimant alleges that the defendant misused the protected 'Prosecco' name in violation of assimilated EU regulations on Protected Designations of Origin and sections 10(2) and 10(3) of the UK Trade Marks Act 1994 regarding its certification mark. The dispute centers on activities across two websites, involving non-compliant beverages, investment opportunities, and corporate branding. This decision addresses critical legal questions concerning jurisdiction, parallel proceedings, and the scope of geographical indication protections within the UK legal framework post-Brexit.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国酒企出口英国需严格审查品牌命名，避免使用受保护地理标志。即使产品未直接销售，若网站提供投资或合伙机会并关联GI名称，亦可能构成侵权。建议提前进行FTO检索，确保营销材料符合UK assimilated law要求，规避高额诉讼风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Market participants exporting to or operating in the UK must conduct rigorous clearance searches for protected geographical indications before finalizing brand names. Even without direct physical sales, using a GI-protected term in digital marketing, domain names, or to promote investment partnerships may constitute infringement under assimilated UK law. Companies should ensure all promotional materials and corporate identities are distinct from registered PDOs to mitigate litigation risks. Early freedom-to-operate assessments are essential to avoid costly disputes and potential injunctions affecting business operations and online presence.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["IPEC驳回被告驳回起诉申请，案件正式进入审判程序", "原告主张被告违反EU PDO法规及英国1994年商标法证明商标条款", "争议焦点包括域名使用、非合规产品标注及公司名称侵权"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The IPEC dismissed the defendant's strike-out application, confirming that the case will proceed to a full trial on the merits.", "The claimant asserts violations of assimilated EU PDO regulations and UK certification mark rights under the Trade Marks Act 1994.", "Key issues include domain usage, labeling of non-compliant products, and the use of 'Prosecco' in the company name."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["出口英国需警惕受保护地理标志，避免品牌命名侵权", "网络营销关联GI名称即便无实体销售也可能构成侵权"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Exporters must verify brand names against UK protected geographical indications to prevent infringement claims.", "Practice note: Digital marketing and investment promotions using GI terms may infringe even without direct product sales.", "What to monitor: Judicial interpretations of assimilated EU PDO regulations and certification mark enforcement in UK courts."]
core_points_en: The IPEC dismissed the defendant's strike-out application, confirming that the case will proceed to a full trial on the merits.
The claimant asserts violations of assimilated EU PDO regulations and UK certification mark rights under the Trade Marks Act 1994.
Key issues include domain usage, labeling of non-compliant products, and the use of 'Prosecco' in the company name.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Exporters must verify brand names against UK protected geographical indications to prevent infringement claims.
Practice note: Digital marketing and investment promotions using GI terms may infringe even without direct product sales.
What to monitor: Judicial interpretations of assimilated EU PDO regulations and certification mark enforcement in UK courts.

news_items.title: France Design Impact Award 2026
news_items.title_zh: 法国国家工业产权局公布2026年设计影响力奖40强项目
news_items.title_en: INPI Reveals Top 40 Projects for France Design Impact Award 2026
news_items.summary: France Design Impact Award 2026 sgurtler@inpi.fr 07 mai 2026 Les 40 projets du prix France Design Impact award 2026 ont été officiellement révélés lors de l’inauguration de la Foire économique de Tours le 2 mai. Cette sélection 2026 met en avant des initiatives venues de toutes les régions de France et démontre le rôle concret du design face aux grands enjeux climatiques et politiques. À travers différentes scènes de vie quotidienne (se soigner, habiter, se déplacer, s’instruire, communiquer, pr
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）于5月2日在图尔经济博览会开幕仪式上正式揭晓“2026法国设计影响力奖”的40个入围项目。该评选由经济、环境和社会三个专家陪审团共同评估，旨在展示设计在应对气候与政治挑战中的具体作用。INPI作为历史合作伙伴参与经济陪审团，强调设计作为经济转型战略杠杆的价值，涵盖产品、服务及品牌视觉等多个领域，凸显了外观设计在商业生态中的核心地位。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) officially announced the forty shortlisted projects for the 2026 France Design Impact Award during the opening ceremony of the Tours Economic Fair on May 2. This selection highlights initiatives from across all French regions, demonstrating design’s tangible role in addressing major climatic and political challenges. Evaluated by three complementary expert juries focusing on economic, environmental, and societal criteria, the award underscores design as a strategic lever for economic transformation. The scope covers diverse disciplines, including product, industrial, service, brand identity, user interface, and spatial design. As a historical partner of APCI-Promotion du design, INPI participated in the economic jury alongside entities like Bpifrance and Air Liquide, reinforcing the critical intersection between industrial property rights and commercial value creation through high-impact design.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应重视外观设计在欧盟市场的战略价值，不仅限于注册保护，更需结合ESG理念提升设计竞争力。建议关注INPI等机构的设计激励政策，通过高质量设计增强品牌溢价，并积极参与相关国际奖项以提升在欧洲市场的知名度与合规形象。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating in Europe, this development highlights the growing strategic importance of design beyond mere aesthetic protection. Integrating Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles into design strategy can significantly enhance market competitiveness and brand equity. Stakeholders should monitor INPI’s design incentive policies and consider participating in recognized international awards to bolster compliance profiles and visibility. High-quality design serves as a key differentiator in the EU market, linking intellectual property assets with broader corporate sustainability goals and economic resilience.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["INPI揭晓2026年设计影响力奖40强，覆盖法国全境多元设计项目", "设立经济、环境、社会三重陪审团，评估设计的综合战略价值", "INPI深度参与评审，强化外观设计在工业产权与商业转化中的作用"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["INPI unveiled the forty finalists for the 2026 France Design Impact Award, featuring diverse design projects representing all regions of France.", "Three expert juries assessed economic, environmental, and societal impacts, evaluating the comprehensive strategic value of design initiatives.", "INPI actively participated in the economic jury, emphasizing the pivotal role of industrial property and design in business transformation."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重视外观设计战略价值，结合ESG理念提升欧盟市场竞争力", "关注INPI设计激励政策，通过国际奖项提升品牌知名度与合规形象"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage design as a strategic asset aligned with ESG principles to strengthen competitive positioning within the European Union market.", "Practice note: Monitor INPI design incentives and pursue international recognition to enhance brand premium and regulatory compliance perception.", "What to monitor: Evolving criteria for design awards that emphasize socio-economic impact and the integration of industrial property strategies."]
core_points_en: INPI unveiled the forty finalists for the 2026 France Design Impact Award, featuring diverse design projects representing all regions of France.
Three expert juries assessed economic, environmental, and societal impacts, evaluating the comprehensive strategic value of design initiatives.
INPI actively participated in the economic jury, emphasizing the pivotal role of industrial property and design in business transformation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage design as a strategic asset aligned with ESG principles to strengthen competitive positioning within the European Union market.
Practice note: Monitor INPI design incentives and pursue international recognition to enhance brand premium and regulatory compliance perception.
What to monitor: Evolving criteria for design awards that emphasize socio-economic impact and the integration of industrial property strategies.

news_items.title: Partial success for Millenium Pharma in battle over Velcade in Paris
news_items.title_zh: 巴黎法院裁定：Millennium Pharma在Velcade专利战中部分胜诉
news_items.title_en: Paris Court Rules Partially for Millennium Pharma in Post-Expiry Velcade Patent Dispute
news_items.summary: Millennium Pharmaceuticals and Cilag accuse several generic drug companies of infringing patents EP 2 251 344 B1 and EP 3 078 667 B1. Both protect a formulation of boronic acid compounds. They form the basis of Millennium’s drug Velcade with the active ingredient bortezomib. The drug treats multiple myeloma and mantle cell lymphoma. Since the patents expired […] The post Partial success for Millenium Pharma in battle over Velcade in Paris appeared first on JUVE Patent .
news_items.ai_summary_zh: Millennium Pharmaceuticals与Cilag指控多家仿制药企侵犯其保护硼酸化合物制剂的欧洲专利EP 2 251 344 B1和EP 3 078 667 B1，该专利是抗癌药Velcade的基础。巴黎司法法院作出裁决，原告获得部分胜诉。鉴于相关专利已过期，此案主要涉及过往侵权行为的法律责任认定及赔偿问题，体现了原研药企在专利到期后仍通过诉讼维护市场利益的策略。
news_items.ai_summary_en: Millennium Pharmaceuticals and Cilag initiated infringement proceedings against several generic manufacturers regarding European patents EP 2 251 344 B1 and EP 3 078 667 B1. These patents protect specific boronic acid compound formulations used in the anticancer drug Velcade, which treats multiple myeloma and mantle cell lymphoma. The Paris Judicial Court delivered a ruling granting partial success to the plaintiffs. Although the relevant patents have since expired, the litigation primarily addresses liability for past infringing acts and associated damages. This outcome underscores the strategic use of post-expiry litigation by originator companies to secure financial compensation and maintain market leverage even after patent protection formally ends.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Generic manufacturers entering the European market should assess the risk of retrospective infringement claims for activities conducted prior to patent expiration. Even after a patent lapses, originators may pursue significant damages for past unauthorized sales. Companies must conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses and maintain robust evidence databases for potential invalidity defenses. Monitoring judicial trends in key jurisdictions like France regarding the calculation of historical damages is essential for effective risk management and financial planning in the pharmaceutical sector.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Millennium指控仿制药企侵犯Velcade基础专利，巴黎法院裁定部分胜诉", "涉案专利保护硼酸化合物制剂，虽已过期但侵权追责仍在进行中", "案件凸显原研药企利用剩余法律手段延缓仿制药全面进入市场的策略"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Millennium and Cilag secured partial victory against generics for infringing Velcade formulation patents before their expiration.", "The case focuses on establishing liability and calculating damages for historical sales occurring while the patents were still in force.", "The ruling highlights how originators utilize remaining legal avenues to challenge generics and recover value after patent expiry."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕原研药企专利到期后的历史侵权追溯诉讼风险", "加强FTO分析与无效证据储备，应对潜在高额索赔"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Originators can still pursue substantial damages for pre-expiry sales, impacting generic launch economics and liability exposure.", "Practice note: Strengthen freedom-to-operate assessments and prepare comprehensive invalidity evidence to mitigate risks of retrospective high-value claims.", "What to monitor: Judicial approaches in France and other EU states toward quantifying damages for historical patent infringement post-expiry."]
core_points_en: Millennium and Cilag secured partial victory against generics for infringing Velcade formulation patents before their expiration.
The case focuses on establishing liability and calculating damages for historical sales occurring while the patents were still in force.
The ruling highlights how originators utilize remaining legal avenues to challenge generics and recover value after patent expiry.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Originators can still pursue substantial damages for pre-expiry sales, impacting generic launch economics and liability exposure.
Practice note: Strengthen freedom-to-operate assessments and prepare comprehensive invalidity evidence to mitigate risks of retrospective high-value claims.
What to monitor: Judicial approaches in France and other EU states toward quantifying damages for historical patent infringement post-expiry.

news_items.title: Where Should Cases Go? Or Where Should Patent Law Be Made?
news_items.title_zh: 案件去向与法律制定：统一专利法院案件分配的制度反思
news_items.title_en: Case Distribution and Lawmaking: Institutional Reflections on UPC Case Allocation
news_items.summary: "Gedanken ohne Inhalt sind leer, Anschauungen ohne Begriffe sind blind." — Immanuel Kant (Thoughts without content are empty, intuitions without concepts are blind.)
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 本文回应关于统一专利法院（UPC）案件分配过于抽象的批评，指出问题核心在于案件集中是否扭曲了UPC法的形成条件。尽管案件集中于特定分部反映了用户信心与可预测性，但法院并非市场，其产出是法律。若法律实践仅由少数中心通过重复程序塑造，将导致早期教义固化。作者主张需审视这种由用户偏好驱动的自强化均衡，因其可能非中性地决定未来专利法的结构与发展路径。
news_items.ai_summary_en: This article addresses criticisms that debates on Unified Patent Court (UPC) case distribution are overly abstract. It argues the core issue is whether case concentration distorts the conditions under which UPC law is formed. While concentration in specific divisions reflects user confidence and predictability, courts produce law rather than merely allocating market demand. If legal practice is shaped exclusively by a few centers through repetitive procedures, early doctrines risk becoming entrenched. The author contends that this self-reinforcing equilibrium, driven by user preferences, requires scrutiny as it may non-neutrally determine the future structure and development path of patent law within the UPC system.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应密切关注UPC主要分部的司法倾向，因早期判例将深远影响后续诉讼策略。建议避免盲目追随热门法庭，需综合评估各分部的程序效率与文化差异，以规避因‘胜者通吃’效应导致的法律解释单一化风险，优化全球专利布局与应诉策略。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners should closely monitor judicial tendencies in major UPC divisions, as early precedents will significantly influence subsequent litigation strategies. Rather than blindly following popular forums, parties must comprehensively assess procedural efficiency and cultural differences across divisions. This approach helps mitigate risks associated with the homogenization of legal interpretation caused by winner-takes-all effects. Strategic diversification of forum selection can optimize global patent layouts and defense postures, ensuring resilience against potential doctrinal rigidity emerging from concentrated case loads.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["案件集中反映用户信心，但需警惕其对UPC法形成条件的潜在扭曲", "法院产出法律而非分配需求，少数中心的重复实践将固化早期教义", "单纯的数据透明或程序调整无法解决由用户偏好驱动的制度结构性问题"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Case concentration reflects user confidence but risks distorting the foundational conditions for UPC law formation.", "Courts produce law; reliance on a few centers' repetitive practices threatens to solidify early judicial doctrines.", "Data transparency or procedural tweaks cannot resolve structural issues driven by self-reinforcing user preferences."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注UPC主要分部早期判例，预判未来专利法解释趋势", "综合评估各分部差异，避免单一法庭依赖带来的战略风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor early precedents in key UPC divisions to anticipate future trends in patent law interpretation.", "Practice note: Evaluate divisional differences holistically to avoid strategic vulnerabilities linked to overreliance on single forums.", "What to monitor: Signs of doctrinal entrenchment resulting from concentrated case flows and self-reinforcing user choices."]
core_points_en: Case concentration reflects user confidence but risks distorting the foundational conditions for UPC law formation.
Courts produce law; reliance on a few centers' repetitive practices threatens to solidify early judicial doctrines.
Data transparency or procedural tweaks cannot resolve structural issues driven by self-reinforcing user preferences.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor early precedents in key UPC divisions to anticipate future trends in patent law interpretation.
Practice note: Evaluate divisional differences holistically to avoid strategic vulnerabilities linked to overreliance on single forums.
What to monitor: Signs of doctrinal entrenchment resulting from concentrated case flows and self-reinforcing user choices.

news_items.title: UPC revokes Chinese military medical research institute’s remdesivir patent
news_items.title_zh: UPC米兰分部撤销中国军科院瑞德西韦专利
news_items.title_en: UPC Milan Division Revokes Chinese Military Institute's Remdesivir Patent
news_items.summary: According to the judgment, the value of the patent dispute is €20 million. However, following the defeat, the Chinese Academy of Military Medical Sciences (AMMS) only has to pay €800,000, which it had previously agreed with Gilead. This week, the central division Milan completely revoked one of AMMS’ patents and rejected amendments (case ID: UPC_CFI_552/2025). […] The post UPC revokes Chinese military medical research institute’s remdesivir patent appeared first on JUVE Patent .
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）米兰中央分部作出判决，完全撤销中国人民解放军军事医学科学院（AMMS）的一项瑞德西韦专利，并驳回其修改请求。本案争议标的额为2000万欧元，但依据此前与吉利德科学达成的协议，AMMS败诉后仅需支付80万欧元诉讼费用。该案件编号为UPC_CFI_552/2025，标志着中国科研机构在UPC体系下的专利维权遭遇重大挫折，凸显了欧洲专利无效程序的高风险性。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Central Division in Milan has issued a judgment completely revoking a remdesivir patent held by the Academy of Military Medical Sciences (AMMS) and rejecting its proposed amendments. The dispute carried a value of €20 million; however, pursuant to a prior agreement with Gilead Sciences, AMMS is liable for only €800,000 in litigation costs following this defeat. Identified as case UPC_CFI_552/2025, this ruling represents a significant setback for Chinese research institutions navigating the UPC system. It underscores the substantial risks inherent in European patent invalidation proceedings, where centralized jurisdiction can lead to immediate and widespread loss of patent rights across participating member states.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This decision illustrates the critical importance of rigorous pre-litigation stability assessments for patents enforced under the Unified Patent Court regime. Because UPC rulings have unitary effect, a successful invalidity action results in the immediate loss of patent rights across all designated contracting states. Rights holders should conduct thorough Freedom-to-Operate analyses before initiating infringement claims and prepare robust defenses against potential invalidity counterclaims. Additionally, parties may consider negotiating settlement agreements that cap financial exposure, thereby mitigating the severe economic consequences associated with centralized patent revocation procedures.

news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: UPC judgments have unitary effect, meaning patent revocation can remove protection across all participating states where the unitary patent is in force.", "Practice note: Strengthen FTO analysis and prepare invalidity defense strategies before filing infringement suits.", "What to monitor: UPC trends in strict validity review and the enforceability of cost-capping settlement clauses."]

Case UPC_CFI_552/2025 highlights strict UPC scrutiny regarding patent validity standards.

Practice note: Strengthen FTO analysis and prepare invalidity defense strategies before filing infringement suits.
What to monitor: UPC trends in strict validity review and the enforceability of cost-capping settlement clauses.

news_items.title: Generative AI and the EU Copyright Law’s Blind Spots
news_items.title_zh: 生成式AI与欧盟版权法的盲区
news_items.title_en: Generative AI and the EU Copyright Law’s Blind Spots: A Legislative Miss
news_items.summary: Legislatures are notoriously inefficient in legislating for future technologies. These technologies are sometimes developing at the same time as legislatures are debating new laws, resulting in the legislatures missing, by a small margin, opportunities to design the laws for the new technologies.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 文章指出立法者难以跟上技术发展步伐，以TRIPS协议忽视万维网为例，类比当前欧盟版权立法与生成式AI发展的错位。尽管DSM指令包含文本和数据挖掘（TDM）例外，但立法历史显示，制定者当时并未预见生成式AI的兴起。因此，现行TDM条款并非专为生成式AI设计，这构成了欧盟版权法的潜在盲区，可能影响未来AI训练数据的法律合规性。
news_items.ai_summary_en: Legislatures often struggle to regulate emerging technologies effectively, frequently missing opportunities to tailor laws to new innovations. This commentary draws a parallel between the TRIPS Agreement’s failure to address the World Wide Web and the current disconnect between EU copyright legislation and generative AI. Although the 2019 Digital Single Market Directive includes text and data mining exceptions, legislative history confirms these provisions were not drafted with generative AI in mind. Consequently, the existing legal framework contains significant blind spots regarding AI training data. This misalignment may lead to future copyright disputes, as the current exceptions were not designed to accommodate the specific technical realities and scale of modern generative artificial intelligence systems.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国AI企业需警惕欧盟版权法在生成式AI领域的解释风险。由于TDM例外非为AI定制，建议企业在欧开展数据训练前，进行严格的版权合规审查，并密切关注后续司法实践或立法补充，以降低侵权诉讼风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders operating within the European Union should recognize that the text and data mining exceptions under the Digital Single Market Directive were not specifically tailored for generative AI applications. This creates interpretive risks regarding the legality of using copyrighted works for model training. Entities engaging in AI development must conduct rigorous copyright compliance reviews before processing large datasets. It is advisable to monitor ongoing judicial interpretations and potential legislative updates closely. Proactive risk management strategies are essential to mitigate exposure to infringement claims arising from the ambiguous scope of current exceptions in the context of advanced AI technologies.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["立法滞后导致欧盟版权法未预见生成式AI对TDM例外的需求", "DSM指令TDM条款制定时，生成式AI尚未成为立法者的考量重点", "现行法律框架存在盲区，可能引发生成式AI训练数据的版权争议"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Legislative lag means EU copyright law did not anticipate generative AI's specific needs for text and data mining exceptions.", "The DSM Directive's text and data mining clauses were adopted without considering generative AI as a primary legislative objective.", "Current legal frameworks contain blind spots that may trigger copyright controversies regarding generative AI training data usage."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕欧盟TDM例外非为AI定制的合规解释风险", "加强数据训练版权审查并关注后续立法动态"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Recognize that EU text and data mining exceptions were not customized for generative AI, creating interpretation risks.", "Practice note: Conduct strict copyright compliance reviews for data training activities to mitigate infringement liabilities.", "What to monitor: Track subsequent judicial practices and legislative supplements to adapt to evolving regulatory standards."]
core_points_en: Legislative lag means EU copyright law did not anticipate generative AI's specific needs for text and data mining exceptions.
The DSM Directive's text and data mining clauses were adopted without considering generative AI as a primary legislative objective.
Current legal frameworks contain blind spots that may trigger copyright controversies regarding generative AI training data usage.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Recognize that EU text and data mining exceptions were not customized for generative AI, creating interpretation risks.
Practice note: Conduct strict copyright compliance reviews for data training activities to mitigate infringement liabilities.
What to monitor: Track subsequent judicial practices and legislative supplements to adapt to evolving regulatory standards.

news_items.title: LD Hamburg, April 27, 2026, Decision, UPC_CFI_685/2024, UPC_CFI_157/2025
news_items.title_zh: UPC汉堡地院：辅助请求数量及权利要求宽泛解释影响新颖性
news_items.title_en: UPC Hamburg: High Auxiliary Requests Accepted; Broad Claim Interpretation Destroys Novelty
news_items.summary: The Local Division Hamburg of the Unified Patent Court examined infringement and revocation claims involving EP 2 077 811, a patent held by Teleflex Life Sciences II LLC and challenged by Speed Care Mineral GmbH. The proceedings addressed questions of patent validity under multiple European Patent Convention articles and the application of the Rules of Procedure in cross-border patent disputes across ten European jurisdictions.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）汉堡地方法院审理了Teleflex诉Speed Care案，涉及EP 2 077 811专利的侵权与无效。法院裁定在面临多重有效性挑战时，多达51项的辅助请求可被允许；但被告若已知理由却延迟提出反诉，将因缺乏勤勉而被驳回。此外，法院对“粘土材料”等术语进行宽泛的功能性解释，虽利于认定侵权，但也扩大了现有技术范围，导致专利新颖性丧失。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Local Division in Hamburg adjudicated infringement and revocation actions concerning EP 2 077 811, held by Teleflex Life Sciences II LLC against Speed Care Mineral GmbH. The Court permitted up to 51 auxiliary requests due to the complexity of multiple validity challenges. However, it rejected a late amendment to extend the counterclaim for revocation, citing the defendant’s lack of reasonable diligence under Rule 263(2)(a) RoP, as grounds were known months prior. Crucially, the Court applied a broad functional interpretation to terms like “clay material” and “binder.” While this approach potentially favored an infringement finding, it simultaneously expanded the scope of relevant prior art, ultimately leading to a finding that the patent lacked novelty.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，应注重程序策略的严谨性，避免以已知理由延迟抗辩。同时，需警惕权利要求宽泛解释带来的风险，在撰写和修改权利要求时平衡保护范围与新颖性，避免因功能性限定过宽而引入不利现有技术，确保专利稳定性。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This decision highlights critical procedural and substantive risks in UPC litigation. Parties must strictly adhere to procedural timelines and demonstrate reasonable diligence when raising validity defenses; delaying known arguments can lead to their exclusion. Substantively, while broad functional claim language may seem advantageous for establishing infringement, it carries significant risk. Such interpretations can inadvertently expand the pool of applicable prior art, undermining novelty. Practitioners should carefully balance claim breadth with stability, ensuring that functional definitions do not introduce unexpected anticipatory disclosures during validity assessments.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["面对复杂有效性挑战时，大量辅助请求可能被视为可接受", "被告延迟提出已知理由的反诉，因缺乏勤勉将被驳回", "宽泛的功能性权利要求解释可能扩大现有技术从而破坏新颖性"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Numerous auxiliary requests may be admissible when facing diverse and complex validity attacks regarding novelty and inventive step.", "Late amendments extending revocation counterclaims are rejected if the defendant lacks reasonable diligence under procedural rules.", "Broad functional claim interpretations can widen the prior art base, potentially destroying patent novelty despite aiding infringement."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC诉讼需严守程序时限，避免以已知理由延迟抗辩", "平衡权利要求范围与新颖性，警惕宽泛解释引入现有技术"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Strict adherence to procedural deadlines is essential; delaying known validity arguments risks exclusion from proceedings.", "Practice note: Balance claim breadth with novelty stability; avoid overly broad functional definitions that may expand prior art scope.", "What to monitor: How courts interpret functional claim terms and their impact on the admissibility of prior art in validity challenges."]
core_points_en: Numerous auxiliary requests may be admissible when facing diverse and complex validity attacks regarding novelty and inventive step.
Late amendments extending revocation counterclaims are rejected if the defendant lacks reasonable diligence under procedural rules.
Broad functional claim interpretations can widen the prior art base, potentially destroying patent novelty despite aiding infringement.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strict adherence to procedural deadlines is essential; delaying known validity arguments risks exclusion from proceedings.
Practice note: Balance claim breadth with novelty stability; avoid overly broad functional definitions that may expand prior art scope.
What to monitor: How courts interpret functional claim terms and their impact on the admissibility of prior art in validity challenges.

news_items.title: PMAC’s procedural rules adopted by the Administrative Committee
news_items.title_zh: UPC行政委员会批准PMAC程序规则
news_items.title_en: UPC Administrative Committee Adopts PMAC Procedural Rules for Alternative Dispute Resolution
news_items.summary: The procedural rules of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) were formally approved and adopted by the Administrative Committee on the 24 April 2026
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月24日，统一专利法院（UPC）行政委员会正式批准专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）的程序规则。PMAC将提供调解、仲裁及专家裁定等争议解决服务，涵盖欧洲专利、单一专利及相关跨境纠纷，包括SEP/FRAND案件。预计5月启动调解服务，年内陆续开放其他服务。此举标志着UPC体系下替代性争议解决机制的正式确立，为权利人提供了诉讼之外的多元化纠纷处理路径。
news_items.ai_summary_en: On 24 April 2026, the Administrative Committee of the Unified Patent Court formally approved and adopted the procedural rules governing the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre. This development establishes a structured framework for alternative dispute resolution within the UPC system. The Centre will provide mediation, arbitration, expert determination, and hybrid processes to resolve disputes concerning European and Unitary Patents. Its scope includes complex cross-border conflicts and standard-essential patent licensing negotiations under FRAND terms. Mediation services are scheduled to commence in May 2026, with arbitration and expert determination services following later in the year. The full text of the rules and associated fee schedules are publicly available on the official websites of both the Centre and the Unified Patent Court.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Market participants facing patent litigation risks in Europe should evaluate the newly established non-litigation pathways offered by the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre. Compared to traditional UPC proceedings, mediation and arbitration provide greater confidentiality and potentially more predictable cost structures. These mechanisms are particularly relevant for resolving stalemates in complex standard-essential patent licensing negotiations. Rights holders and alleged infringers should familiarize themselves with the adopted procedural rules and fee schedules. Integrating these alternative dispute resolution options into broader IP enforcement strategies allows for flexible management of cross-border intellectual property conflicts without immediate recourse to formal court judgments.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC行政委员会于2026年4月24日正式通过PMAC程序规则", "PMAC提供调解、仲裁等服务，覆盖单一专利及SEP/FRAND纠纷", "调解服务将于5月启动，仲裁及专家裁定服务年内跟进"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Administrative Committee formally adopted the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre's procedural rules on 24 April 2026.", "The Centre offers mediation, arbitration, and expert determination for Unitary Patents and SEP/FRAND disputes.", "Mediation services launch in May 2026, while arbitration and expert determination services follow later this year."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用PMAC非诉机制降低欧洲专利纠纷解决成本与时间", "针对SEP/FRAND复杂案件，探索调解与仲裁的灵活解决方案"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Utilize PMAC non-litigation mechanisms to reduce time and costs associated with resolving European patent disputes.", "Practice note: Explore flexible mediation and arbitration solutions for complex SEP/FRAND cases where traditional litigation may be inefficient.", "What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline of arbitration and expert determination services scheduled for later in 2026."]
core_points_en: The UPC Administrative Committee formally adopted the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre's procedural rules on 24 April 2026.
The Centre offers mediation, arbitration, and expert determination for Unitary Patents and SEP/FRAND disputes.
Mediation services launch in May 2026, while arbitration and expert determination services follow later this year.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Utilize PMAC non-litigation mechanisms to reduce time and costs associated with resolving European patent disputes.
Practice note: Explore flexible mediation and arbitration solutions for complex SEP/FRAND cases where traditional litigation may be inefficient.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline of arbitration and expert determination services scheduled for later in 2026.

news_items.title: Tuesday at INTA: How AI is assisting judges | IP’s role in deals
news_items.title_zh: INTA焦点：AI如何辅助法官裁判及IP在交易中的角色
news_items.title_en: UK Judges Discuss AI for Judgment Consistency Checks and IP’s Role in Corporate Transactions at INTA
news_items.summary: Senior UK judges discussing the impact of AI on the judiciary, and the role of in-house IP lawyers during corporate transactions and carve-outs were among the top talking points
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 在INTA年会上，英格兰和威尔士高等法院及上诉法院法官讨论了AI在司法中的应用。上诉法院法官Colin Birss透露，他使用AI进行判决的逻辑一致性检查，以发现段落间的矛盾或需重写的部分，但明确反对用AI从头生成判决书。 panel还包括UKIPO指定人员Emma Himsworth。此外，会议还探讨了企业内部IP律师在公司剥离交易中的作用。这反映了英国司法界对AI工具持谨慎辅助态度，强调人类法官的最终责任。
news_items.ai_summary_en: During the INTA Annual Meeting, senior judges from the England and Wales High Court and Court of Appeal examined the implications of artificial intelligence within the judiciary. Lord Justice Colin Birss, alongside Mr Justices Richard Meade and James Mellor, along with UKIPO appointed person Emma Himsworth, participated in a panel moderated by Arty Rajendra. Lord Justice Birss disclosed his practice of using AI tools to perform logic consistency checks on draft judgments, identifying potential contradictions between paragraphs. However, he firmly rejected the use of AI to generate judgments from scratch, emphasizing that human oversight remains essential. The session also addressed the critical function of in-house intellectual property counsel during corporate transactions and asset carve-outs, highlighting the evolving intersection of technology, judicial process, and commercial legal strategy.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Legal practitioners appearing before English courts should anticipate increased judicial reliance on AI for preliminary review of legal arguments and written submissions. This trend necessitates heightened precision in drafting pleadings to avoid inconsistencies that automated tools may flag. Furthermore, as IP assets become central to corporate restructuring, companies must ensure robust internal compliance frameworks. Engaging specialized IP counsel early in transactional processes is crucial to mitigate risks associated with asset valuation and regulatory adherence in an increasingly tech-integrated legal environment.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国法官利用AI进行判决逻辑一致性检查，辅助识别潜在矛盾", "法官明确拒绝使用AI从头生成判决书，坚持人类主导裁判", "会议同时探讨了内部IP律师在企业并购与资产剥离中的关键作用"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["UK judges utilize AI tools primarily for checking logical consistency and identifying contradictions within draft judicial opinions.", "The judiciary explicitly rejects AI-generated judgments, maintaining that human judges must retain full responsibility for final decisions.", "Discussions highlighted the strategic importance of in-house IP lawyers in managing risks during complex corporate deals and carve-outs."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["适应英国司法AI辅助趋势，强化法律文书逻辑严密性以应对智能审查", "重视IP在商业交易中的合规价值，借助专业力量规避法律风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure all legal submissions are logically coherent and precisely drafted to withstand potential AI-assisted judicial scrutiny.", "Practice note: Integrate specialized IP compliance reviews into corporate transaction workflows to address asset-specific risks effectively.", "What to monitor: Observe evolving judicial guidelines regarding the permissible scope of AI assistance in case management and decision-making."]
core_points_en: UK judges utilize AI tools primarily for checking logical consistency and identifying contradictions within draft judicial opinions.
The judiciary explicitly rejects AI-generated judgments, maintaining that human judges must retain full responsibility for final decisions.
Discussions highlighted the strategic importance of in-house IP lawyers in managing risks during complex corporate deals and carve-outs.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure all legal submissions are logically coherent and precisely drafted to withstand potential AI-assisted judicial scrutiny.
Practice note: Integrate specialized IP compliance reviews into corporate transaction workflows to address asset-specific risks effectively.
What to monitor: Observe evolving judicial guidelines regarding the permissible scope of AI assistance in case management and decision-making.

news_items.title: Inspection order lifted after no main action was filed
news_items.title_zh: 未提起主诉讼，UPC杜塞尔多夫分院解除检查令
news_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Lifts Inspection Order After Applicant Misses Deadline for Main Action
news_items.summary: OTEC v STEROS GPA INNOVATIVE — Local Division Düsseldorf, 4 May 2026 (UPC_CFI_885/2025)
news_items.ai_summary_zh: OTEC诉STEROS案中，杜塞尔多夫地方法院裁定，因申请人未在法定期限内就实质问题提起诉讼，必须解除单方证据保全与检查令。法院依据《统一专利法院协定》第60(8)条及规则198.1/199.2，责令返还、销毁所有获取的证据并不可逆删除数字副本。尽管被申请人请求赔偿，但因仅主张法律费用而未证明具体损害，法院驳回了补偿请求。此裁决明确了逾期不起诉的程序性后果。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In OTEC v STEROS GPA INNOVATIVE, the UPC Düsseldorf Local Division ruled that an ex parte inspection and preservation order must be lifted when the applicant fails to initiate proceedings on the merits within the statutory period. Citing Article 60(8) UPCA and Rules 198.1 and 199.2 RoP, the Court ordered the return of physical evidence, destruction of copies, and irreversible deletion of digital files obtained during the inspection. Although the respondent sought compensation, the Court rejected this claim because only legal costs were asserted without substantiated proof of specific damage. This judgment clarifies the strict procedural consequences of failing to file a main action after securing preliminary evidence measures under the Unified Patent Court framework.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners must strictly monitor the 31-calendar-day or 20-working-day window to file a main action after evidence disclosure under the UPCA. Failure to comply triggers automatic lifting of orders and mandatory data destruction, risking loss of critical evidence. For respondents, this precedent confirms the right to demand immediate cessation of measures and secure deletion of sensitive information. However, securing financial redress requires demonstrating concrete harm beyond standard legal fees. Parties should prepare robust documentation of actual damages if seeking compensation for improperly executed or expired provisional measures.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["未在法定期限提起主诉讼，证据保全与检查令必须解除", "法院责令返还实物证据，销毁副本并不可逆删除数字文件", "仅主张法律费用而无具体损害证明，驳回补偿请求"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Inspection and preservation orders must be lifted if no main action is filed within the statutory deadline following disclosure.", "The Court ordered the return of physical evidence, destruction of copies, and irreversible deletion of all digital data obtained.", "Compensation claims based solely on legal costs are rejected absent proof of specific, substantiated actual damage."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严守UPC证据保全后提起主诉讼的法定期限，防程序失效", "索赔需举证具体损害，单纯法律费用难获支持"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Strict adherence to post-inspection filing deadlines is critical to prevent invalidation of evidence preservation efforts.", "Practice note: Respondents can effectively compel data deletion but must substantiate actual damages to recover compensation beyond legal costs.", "What to monitor: UPC divisions' consistent application of Rule 199.2 regarding the calculation of periods and evidentiary standards for damages."]
core_points_en: Inspection and preservation orders must be lifted if no main action is filed within the statutory deadline following disclosure.
The Court ordered the return of physical evidence, destruction of copies, and irreversible deletion of all digital data obtained.
Compensation claims based solely on legal costs are rejected absent proof of specific, substantiated actual damage.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strict adherence to post-inspection filing deadlines is critical to prevent invalidation of evidence preservation efforts.
Practice note: Respondents can effectively compel data deletion but must substantiate actual damages to recover compensation beyond legal costs.
What to monitor: UPC divisions' consistent application of Rule 199.2 regarding the calculation of periods and evidentiary standards for damages.

news_items.title: EU Returns to Special 301 Report’s Watch List for First Time Since 2006
news_items.title_zh: 欧盟自2006年来首次重返美国特别301报告观察名单
news_items.title_en: EU Returns to US Special 301 Watch List for First Time Since 2006
news_items.summary: On April 30, the Office of the U.S. Trade Representative (USTR) released this year’s Special 301 Report, which surveys the effectiveness of intellectual property (IP) rights and enforcement abroad and identifies foreign nations where IP protections are uncertain or disregarded. The 2026 report marks the first time in 13 years that a Priority Foreign Country (PFC) has been named, with Vietnam being identified as a PFC for persistent failures to address several long-standing IP concerns. The USTR
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发布2026年特别301报告，将欧盟列入观察名单，系自2006年以来首次。报告指出越南因长期未解决IP问题被列为优先外国国家。此举标志着欧盟作为整体在知识产权保护方面受到美方关注，可能影响双边贸易关系及欧盟内部IP执法政策的调整方向。
news_items.ai_summary_en: On April 30, the Office of the U.S. Trade Representative released its 2026 Special 301 Report, assessing global intellectual property rights protection and enforcement effectiveness. For the first time since 2006, the European Union has been placed on the Watch List, signaling renewed US concerns regarding IP protections at the continental level. Additionally, Vietnam was designated as a Priority Foreign Country due to persistent failures to address longstanding IP issues. This development highlights significant scrutiny of EU-wide IP enforcement mechanisms, potentially influencing future bilateral trade relations and prompting adjustments in internal EU intellectual property policies and legislative frameworks.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 欧盟被列入观察名单预示其IP执法政策可能趋严或面临审查。中国企业需密切关注欧盟后续立法动态及执法力度变化，特别是在跨境电商与数字版权领域。建议加强合规体系，提前应对潜在的贸易壁垒与IP纠纷风险，确保在欧业务稳健运行。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Inclusion on the Special 301 Watch List indicates heightened US scrutiny of EU intellectual property enforcement practices, suggesting potential regulatory tightening or increased review of current policies. Stakeholders should anticipate possible shifts in compliance expectations, particularly affecting cross-border digital commerce and copyright management. Companies operating within the EU jurisdiction are advised to strengthen their internal compliance frameworks and monitor legislative developments closely. Proactive adaptation to these evolving enforcement landscapes will be essential to mitigate risks associated with potential trade barriers and intellectual property disputes, ensuring continued operational stability and legal certainty in the European market.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["美国USTR发布2026年特别301报告，欧盟首次自2006年后被列入观察名单", "越南因持续未能解决知识产权关切被指定为优先外国国家(PFC)", "报告评估全球IP保护有效性，欧盟整体执法状况引发美方贸易关切"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The US Trade Representative added the European Union to the Special 301 Watch List for the first time since 2006.", "Vietnam was designated as a Priority Foreign Country due to ongoing failures to resolve long-standing intellectual property concerns.", "The report evaluates global IP protection effectiveness, highlighting specific US trade concerns regarding overall EU enforcement standards."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧盟IP执法环境可能收紧，企业需警惕政策变动带来的合规风险", "建议强化在欧知识产权布局与合规管理，以应对潜在贸易摩擦"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced US scrutiny may lead to stricter IP enforcement environments, increasing compliance burdens for businesses operating in Europe.", "Practice note: Strengthen internal IP compliance systems and audit existing portfolios to prepare for potential policy shifts and enforcement actions.", "What to monitor: Legislative changes in EU IP laws, particularly concerning cross-border e-commerce regulations and digital copyright enforcement mechanisms."]
core_points_en: The US Trade Representative added the European Union to the Special 301 Watch List for the first time since 2006.
Vietnam was designated as a Priority Foreign Country due to ongoing failures to resolve long-standing intellectual property concerns.
The report evaluates global IP protection effectiveness, highlighting specific US trade concerns regarding overall EU enforcement standards.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced US scrutiny may lead to stricter IP enforcement environments, increasing compliance burdens for businesses operating in Europe.
Practice note: Strengthen internal IP compliance systems and audit existing portfolios to prepare for potential policy shifts and enforcement actions.
What to monitor: Legislative changes in EU IP laws, particularly concerning cross-border e-commerce regulations and digital copyright enforcement mechanisms.

news_items.title: Pierre Pérot returns to HOYNG ROKH MONEGIER as partner in Paris, joined by Camille Abba
news_items.title_zh: Pierre Pérot以合伙人身份重返HOYNG ROKH MONEGIER巴黎办公室
news_items.title_en: HOYNG ROKH MONEGIER Paris Office Welcomes Pierre Pérot as Partner and Camille Abba as Associate
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲知名知识产权律所HOYNG ROKH MONEGIER宣布，Pierre Pérot将于2026年5月1日以合伙人身份重返其巴黎办公室，Camille Abba同时以律师身份加入。Pérot在商标、外观设计、版权及相关权利领域拥有丰富经验，尤其擅长奢侈品、体育、娱乐及数字商业等高风险行业。此次回归旨在加强巴黎软知识产权团队的深度与活力，为客户提供更具商业敏锐度和快速响应的法律服务，体现了律所在该领域的持续投入与战略扩展。
news_items.ai_summary_en: HOYNG ROKH MONEGIER has announced that Pierre Pérot will return to the firm as a partner in its Paris office, effective 1 May 2026. He is joined by Camille Abba, who joins as an associate. This move strengthens the firm’s Soft IP practice, leveraging Pérot’s prior familiarity with the firm’s culture and his extensive experience in trademarks, designs, copyright, and related rights. The team focuses on high-visibility sectors such as luxury, sports, entertainment, and digital businesses. The addition aims to provide clients with faster, commercially aware legal services, reflecting the firm’s strategic expansion and continued investment in its Paris-based intellectual property capabilities.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧拓展品牌与内容业务时，应关注此类顶级律所的人才动向。Pérot在版权与软IP领域的专长，提示企业需重视非专利类知识产权的战略布局。建议加强与具备商业敏锐度的律所合作，确保在奢侈品、娱乐等高曝光行业的合规性与维权效率，以应对复杂的欧盟市场环境。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating in Europe, particularly in high-exposure industries like luxury and entertainment, monitoring talent movements at leading IP firms provides valuable context for selecting external counsel. The emphasis on 'Soft IP' expertise highlights the growing importance of non-patent intellectual property rights in brand protection strategies. Clients should prioritize partnerships with law firms that demonstrate strong commercial awareness and rapid response capabilities. This approach ensures efficient compliance and enforcement in complex markets, where reputational risks and time-sensitive legal issues are prevalent in the digital and creative sectors.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Pierre Pérot于2026年5月1日以合伙人身份重返HOYNG ROKH MO…", "Camille Abba作为律师加入，共同增强巴黎软知识产权团队的专业深度与服务能力", "团队聚焦奢侈品、娱乐及数字行业，提供兼具法律技术与商业策略的综合咨询"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Pierre Pérot returns as partner on 1 May 2026, bringing deep expertise in trademarks, designs, and copyright matters for the Paris office.", "Camille Abba joins as an associate, enhancing the team's capacity to deliver coordinated and commercially sensitive legal advice.", "The strengthened team targets luxury, entertainment, and digital sectors, offering strategic counsel aligned with business realities."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注顶级律所软IP专家动向，优化在欧版权与品牌保护策略", "强化与具备商业洞察力的律所合作，提升高曝光行业的合规与维权效率"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor top-tier firm personnel changes to identify counsel with specialized Soft IP expertise for brand and content protection.", "Practice note: Prioritize legal partners with strong commercial insight to enhance compliance efficiency in high-visibility industries.", "What to monitor: Strategic expansions in copyright and trademark teams within key European jurisdictions like France."]
core_points_en: Pierre Pérot returns as partner on 1 May 2026, bringing deep expertise in trademarks, designs, and copyright matters for the Paris office.
Camille Abba joins as an associate, enhancing the team's capacity to deliver coordinated and commercially sensitive legal advice.
The strengthened team targets luxury, entertainment, and digital sectors, offering strategic counsel aligned with business realities.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor top-tier firm personnel changes to identify counsel with specialized Soft IP expertise for brand and content protection.
Practice note: Prioritize legal partners with strong commercial insight to enhance compliance efficiency in high-visibility industries.
What to monitor: Strategic expansions in copyright and trademark teams within key European jurisdictions like France.

news_items.title: Is The German Utility Model Your Secret Weapon For IP Enforcement?
news_items.title_zh: 德国实用新型：知识产权维权的秘密武器？
news_items.title_en: German Utility Models: A Strategic Alternative for Rapid IP Enforcement
news_items.summary: The German Utility Model provides a strategic alternative to standard patent protection, offering unexamined IP rights for technical inventions with fast registration and flexible enforcement options. This protection mechanism features unique advantages including narrower prior art definitions, grace periods for applicant disclosures, and the powerful branch-off application feature that allows derivation from pending patent applications.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 文章分析德国实用新型作为标准专利的战略替代方案。其优势在于无需实质审查、注册快（数周）、费用低及保护期长达10年。相比专利，其现有技术定义更窄（仅限德国境内的公开使用或口头披露），且享有6个月宽限期。企业可通过从待审专利中“分支”申请，快速获得针对仿冒者的 enforceable 权利，弥补专利审查期间的保护空白，是灵活的诉讼工具。
news_items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines the German Utility Model as a strategic alternative to standard patent protection. It offers unexamined rights for technical inventions, featuring rapid registration within weeks and lower official fees compared to patents. Protection lasts up to ten years. The utility model benefits from a narrower definition of prior art, where public use or oral disclosures outside Germany do not constitute prior art, alongside a six-month grace period for applicant disclosures. Practitioners can utilize branch-off applications from pending patent cases to secure quick, enforceable rights. This mechanism effectively fills the protection gap during lengthy patent examination phases, providing a flexible and cost-effective litigation tool against fast-moving copycat competitors in the German market.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在德布局时，可利用实用新型快速确权填补专利审查空窗期。鉴于其维权灵活且成本低，建议结合专利构建双重保护网。需注意方法类发明不可申请，但信号序列等可受保护。在遭遇快速仿冒时，应优先启动实用新型维权程序以争取时间优势。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For entities operating in Germany, the Utility Model serves as a critical complement to standard patent portfolios. Its primary value lies in bridging the protection gap during the often lengthy substantive examination of patent applications. By securing immediate, albeit unexamined, rights, rights holders can enforce against infringers without waiting for patent grant. This dual-layer strategy enhances defensive capabilities against fast-copying competitors. However, practitioners must carefully manage claim drafting to avoid excluded subject matter, such as pure methods, ensuring the utility model remains a robust and enforceable asset in litigation scenarios.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德国实用新型无需实质审查，注册迅速且官方费用低于标准专利", "现有技术范围较窄，仅德国境内公开构成障碍，并享6个月宽限期", "支持从待审专利分支申请，可快速获取权利以应对侵权和仿冒行为"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["German Utility Models undergo only formal examination, enabling rapid registration within weeks at significantly lower official fees than standard patents.", "Prior art definitions are narrower, excluding foreign public use or oral disclosures, while offering a six-month grace period for applicant disclosures.", "Branch-off applications from pending patents allow for quick acquisition of enforceable rights to address infringement and counterfeiting rapidly."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用实用新型快速确权，填补发明专利审查期间的保护真空期", "结合专利构建双重保护网，针对快速仿冒行为灵活启动维权"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Deploy Utility Models to secure immediate enforcement rights during patent prosecution delays, mitigating risks from rapid market imitation.", "Practice note: Ensure claims target protectable technical apparatus or systems rather than excluded pure methods to maintain validity and enforceability.", "What to monitor: Track competitor product launches closely to leverage the speed of Utility Model registration for timely cease-and-desist actions."]
core_points_en: German Utility Models undergo only formal examination, enabling rapid registration within weeks at significantly lower official fees than standard patents.
Prior art definitions are narrower, excluding foreign public use or oral disclosures, while offering a six-month grace period for applicant disclosures.
Branch-off applications from pending patents allow for quick acquisition of enforceable rights to address infringement and counterfeiting rapidly.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Deploy Utility Models to secure immediate enforcement rights during patent prosecution delays, mitigating risks from rapid market imitation.
Practice note: Ensure claims target protectable technical apparatus or systems rather than excluded pure methods to maintain validity and enforceability.
What to monitor: Track competitor product launches closely to leverage the speed of Utility Model registration for timely cease-and-desist actions.

news_items.title: Cyprus Trademarks - Protecting Brand Value In A Digital & Investor World
news_items.title_zh: 塞浦路斯商标：数字与投资时代的品牌价值保护
news_items.title_en: Cyprus Trademarks: Safeguarding Brand Value in Digital and Investment Contexts
news_items.summary: A strong brand is one of the greatest assets a business can build. Yet many Cyprus companies overlook trademarks, treating the registration of their brand name or logo, as a bureaucratic formality rather than a strategic decision. This can lead to lost market share, investor hesitation, and costly disputes.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 文章指出塞浦路斯企业常忽视商标注册的战略价值，将其视为官僚程序，导致市场份额流失和投资受阻。作者强调商标是创造竞争优势的法律工具，能防止竞争对手搭便车。内容涵盖商标定义、注册路径（塞浦路斯、欧盟及国际）、常见误区及内部准备检查。旨在指导企业通过正确管理商标资产，实现业务增长、吸引投资并最大化品牌价值。
news_items.ai_summary_en: This analysis highlights that many Cyprus-based enterprises frequently underestimate the strategic importance of trademark registration, mistakenly treating it as a mere bureaucratic formality. This oversight often results in significant market share erosion, investor hesitation, and expensive legal disputes. The article emphasizes that trademarks function as critical legal instruments establishing competitive advantages and preventing competitors from capitalizing on brand reputation. Although intangible, properly registered trademarks deliver tangible business value by serving as defensive shields against infringement and enabling growth, investment attraction, and market expansion. The guide provides comprehensive insights into trademark definitions, strategic registration pathways across Cyprus, the EU, and internationally, alongside common pitfalls to avoid. It aims to help businesses maximize brand value through effective management and proactive protection strategies.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，塞浦路斯后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Companies operating in Europe should shift focus from purely sales-driven strategies to prioritizing intellectual property as a fundamental corporate asset. Mere formal compliance is insufficient; a robust, layered protection strategy combining national and EU-wide registrations is essential. In digital markets, preemptive defensive registrations are crucial to mitigate risks of brand squatting or rights defects. Such vulnerabilities can severely hinder financing opportunities and lead to prohibitive enforcement costs. Proactive trademark management ensures brand security during international expansion, supports investor confidence, and safeguards long-term commercial interests against competitive encroachment and legal challenges.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["纠正塞企将商标注册视为单纯官僚程序的误区，强调其战略资产属性", "解析商标作为法律锚点，在区分来源、防止侵权及提升商业价值中的作用", "提供从定义、注册路径到避免常见误区的全面指南，助力品牌增值"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Corrects the misconception that trademark registration is merely administrative, emphasizing its role as a core strategic asset for business valuation.", "Explains how trademarks act as legal anchors distinguishing commercial origin, preventing infringement, and enhancing overall business worth.", "Offers a practical guide covering definitions, multi-jurisdictional registration paths, and methods to avoid common errors while maximizing brand value."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["中企需视商标为核心资产，避免仅做形式合规而忽视战略布局", "建议采用多国与欧盟组合注册策略，防范数字时代品牌被抢注风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Treat trademarks as core assets rather than routine compliance tasks to secure investment readiness and market position.", "Practice note: Implement combined national and EU registration strategies to build a comprehensive, multi-layered protective network.", "What to monitor: Preemptively register defensively in digital channels to prevent brand squatting and avoid costly rights disputes."]
core_points_en: Corrects the misconception that trademark registration is merely administrative, emphasizing its role as a core strategic asset for business valuation.
Explains how trademarks act as legal anchors distinguishing commercial origin, preventing infringement, and enhancing overall business worth.
Offers a practical guide covering definitions, multi-jurisdictional registration paths, and methods to avoid common errors while maximizing brand value.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Treat trademarks as core assets rather than routine compliance tasks to secure investment readiness and market position.
Practice note: Implement combined national and EU registration strategies to build a comprehensive, multi-layered protective network.
What to monitor: Preemptively register defensively in digital channels to prevent brand squatting and avoid costly rights disputes.
