news_items.title: Stop press: High Court hands down FRAND judgment in Samsung v ZTE
news_items.title_zh: 快讯：英国高等法院就三星诉中兴案作出FRAND判决
news_items.title_en: UK High Court Issues First Global Cross-Licence FRAND Judgment in Samsung v ZTE
news_items.summary: The High Court has today handed down its judgment in Samsung v ZTE, determining the FRAND terms of a global cross-licence between the parties. This is t...
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国高等法院就三星诉中兴案作出判决，确定双方全球交叉许可的FRAND条款。这是英国首例此类判决。法院详细指导了使用可比协议法确定FRAND条款的方法，特别是识别“良好可比协议”及调整非FRAND因素（如诉讼意愿和能力差异）。法院认为中兴因诉讼地位较弱而获得低价，现有权要求全额FRAND价值。判决主要基于中兴与苹果的可比许可协议。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The UK High Court has delivered its judgment in Samsung v ZTE, establishing the FRAND terms for a global cross-licence between the parties. This marks the first instance of such a determination reaching judgment in the United Kingdom. The decision offers detailed guidance on applying the comparable licences method, specifically regarding the identification of 'good comparables' and necessary adjustments for non-FRAND factors. The Court noted that ZTE’s perceived lower willingness or ability to litigate resulted in lower royalty rates in previous agreements with major licensees like Apple and Samsung. Consequently, the Court ruled that ZTE is entitled to full FRAND value, rejecting claims of hold-out by the licensors. The final determination relied primarily on the ZTE-Apple licence, which was deemed easier to unpack and adjust for differences in licensee status.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies how courts may adjust FRAND rates based on disparities in litigation capability and willingness. Parties should proactively document evidence demonstrating their status as willing licensees to counter potential hold-out allegations. It is advisable to systematically review internal licensing agreements to quantify any historical disadvantages caused by unequal bargaining power or litigation resources. Such preparation helps ensure that future rate determinations reflect true market value rather than concessions made under duress. Monitoring how courts define and weigh these non-FRAND factors will be critical for developing robust negotiation strategies and defense positions in subsequent SEP disputes across European jurisdictions.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国高院首判全球交叉许可FRAND条款，确立可比协议法适用标准", "考量诉讼意愿与能力等非FRAND因素，认定中兴有权主张全额FRAND价值", "优先采用中兴与苹果的许可协议作为基准，因其更易于拆解分析"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["First UK judgment determining FRAND terms for a global cross-licence, setting precedents for comparable licence analysis.", "Adjusts royalties for non-FRAND factors like litigation capacity, affirming entitlement to full FRAND value despite past low rates.", "Prioritizes the ZTE-Apple agreement as the primary benchmark due to its relative ease of analysis and adjustment."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["强化善意被许可人证据，量化诉讼劣势对费率的影响", "梳理内部可比协议，应对英法院对非FRAND因素的审查"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Document willingness to license and quantify historical disadvantages from unequal litigation power.", "Practice note: Review internal comparable agreements to prepare for judicial scrutiny of non-FRAND adjustment factors.", "What to monitor: Judicial interpretation of litigation capacity impacts on FRAND rate calculations in future cases."]
core_points_en: First UK judgment determining FRAND terms for a global cross-licence, setting precedents for comparable licence analysis.
Adjusts royalties for non-FRAND factors like litigation capacity, affirming entitlement to full FRAND value despite past low rates.
Prioritizes the ZTE-Apple agreement as the primary benchmark due to its relative ease of analysis and adjustment.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Document willingness to license and quantify historical disadvantages from unequal litigation power.
Practice note: Review internal comparable agreements to prepare for judicial scrutiny of non-FRAND adjustment factors.
What to monitor: Judicial interpretation of litigation capacity impacts on FRAND rate calculations in future cases.

news_items.title: English High Court rules $392 million lump sum payment by Samsung is FRAND for ZTE cross-licence
news_items.title_zh: 英高院裁定三星3.92亿美元一次性付款符合ZTE交叉许可FRAND原则
news_items.title_en: UK High Court Rules $392 Million Samsung Payment FRAND for ZTE Cross-Licence
news_items.summary: ZTE’s previous licences with Samsung and Apple were sub-FRAND, finds Meade J
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国高等法院Meade法官裁定，三星向ZTE支付3.92亿美元的一次性付款符合公平、合理和非歧视（FRAND）原则。法院认定ZTE此前与三星及苹果达成的许可协议费率低于FRAND标准（sub-FRAND）。此判决明确了在交叉许可背景下FRAND费率的计算基准，强调了历史协议作为可比许可的参考价值，为后续SEP许可谈判及纠纷解决提供了关键司法指引。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The English High Court, through Mr. Justice Meade, has determined that a lump sum payment of $392 million from Samsung to ZTE constitutes a Fair, Reasonable, and Non-Discriminatory (FRAND) rate for their cross-licence agreement. A critical aspect of the judgment involves the court’s finding that ZTE’s prior licensing agreements with both Samsung and Apple were set at sub-FRAND rates. This decision provides significant clarity on calculating FRAND royalties within the context of cross-licensing arrangements. By establishing that historical agreements can serve as comparables, even when deemed below market standards, the ruling offers essential judicial guidance for future standard-essential patent negotiations and dispute resolutions in Europe.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临SEP诉讼时，应重视过往许可协议的证据效力。若曾签署较低费率协议，可能被认定为sub-FRAND从而增加当前赔偿风险。建议企业建立完善的许可档案管理体系，在谈判中审慎评估历史条款，必要时通过专业法律团队进行FRAND抗辩，避免不利判例影响全球许可策略。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This ruling highlights the evidentiary weight of past licensing agreements in FRAND determinations. Rights holders should recognize that previously agreed lower rates may be classified as sub-FRAND, potentially increasing liability or reducing leverage in current litigation. It is prudent for companies to maintain rigorous archives of all licensing history. During negotiations, parties must carefully evaluate how historical terms might be interpreted by courts. Engaging specialized legal counsel to construct robust FRAND defenses based on accurate historical data is essential to mitigate risks associated with adverse precedents affecting global licensing strategies.

Justice Meade ruled that ZTE's previous licensing deals with Samsung and Apple were established at sub-FRAND royalty rates.
The judgment establishes a legal framework using historical comparable licenses to assess FRAND rates for standard-essential patents.

Practice note: Maintain comprehensive licensing archives and use expert counsel to frame historical terms effectively.
What to monitor: How courts weigh sub-FRAND historical comparables against current market value in future judgments.

news_items.title: Wikipedia won’t save you: why professionally drafted evidence is key
news_items.title_zh: 维基百科非铁证：专业证据在商标异议中的关键作用
news_items.title_en: Wikipedia Insufficient: Why Robust Evidence Is Critical in UK Trademark Oppositions
news_items.summary: OpenAI, the developer behind the AI chatbot ChatGPT, has recently succeeded in its opposition to the application for the word mark “CallGPT”, filed by…
news_items.ai_summary_zh: OpenAI成功反对XEROTECH的“CallGPT”商标申请。审查员认定两商标视觉、听觉及概念上存在中高度相似。尽管申请人提供维基百科等链接证明“GPT”含义，但因来源不可靠且缺乏公众认知度证据，未被采纳。相反，OpenAI通过大量用户数据证明CHATGPT获得显著显著性，最终胜诉。此案强调高质量量化证据的重要性。
news_items.ai_summary_en: OpenAI successfully opposed XEROTECH LTD’s application for the word mark “CallGPT” before the UK Intellectual Property Office. The hearing officer found medium to high visual, aural, and conceptual similarities between “CallGPT” and OpenAI’s earlier “CHATGPT” mark. Although the applicant submitted web links, including Wikipedia entries, to demonstrate that “GPT” is a descriptive term for generative pre-trained transformers, these were rejected as inherently unreliable and lacking proof of public recognition. Conversely, OpenAI presented substantial quantitative evidence regarding user engagement and market presence. This data effectively established that CHATGPT had acquired distinctiveness through use. The decision underscores that unverified online sources are inadequate for proving descriptive meanings, while rigorous, data-driven evidence remains essential for securing trademark rights in opposition proceedings.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Parties involved in UK trademark oppositions must prioritize professionally drafted, objective evidence over informal internet sources. Relying solely on encyclopedic entries to argue descriptiveness is risky, as examiners may deem such materials unreliable without corroborating data on public perception. Instead, stakeholders should construct a comprehensive evidentiary record comprising quantifiable metrics, such as market share, advertising expenditure, and direct user interaction statistics. This approach not only strengthens claims of acquired distinctiveness but also effectively counters defenses based on alleged descriptiveness, ensuring compliance with strict judicial standards for admissibility and probative value.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["审查员认定CallGPT与CHATGPT在多维度存在中高度相似性", "依赖维基百科等网络来源证明术语含义因可靠性不足被驳回", "基于直接用户参与数据的量化证据有效确立了商标的获得显著性"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The hearing officer identified medium to high similarity across visual, aural, and conceptual dimensions between CallGPT and CHATGPT.", "Reliance on Wikipedia and similar web sources to prove descriptive meaning was rejected due to inherent unreliability and lack of consumer awareness evidence.", "Quantitative evidence demonstrating significant user engagement and market presence successfully established acquired distinctiveness for CHATGPT."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["摒弃单一网络来源，构建多维度的专业证据体系", "利用量化市场数据强化商标显著性主张"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid relying exclusively on general web encyclopedias; build a robust evidence chain using market data to prove distinctiveness or refute descriptiveness claims.", "Practice note: Ensure all submitted evidence is professionally curated, focusing on quantifiable metrics like user engagement and advertising spend rather than unverified online d…", "What to monitor: Monitor how UKIPO hearing officers evaluate the reliability of digital sources versus empirical market data in future opposition decisions involving technical acr…"]
core_points_en: The hearing officer identified medium to high similarity across visual, aural, and conceptual dimensions between CallGPT and CHATGPT.
Reliance on Wikipedia and similar web sources to prove descriptive meaning was rejected due to inherent unreliability and lack of consumer awareness evidence.
Quantitative evidence demonstrating significant user engagement and market presence successfully established acquired distinctiveness for CHATGPT.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid relying exclusively on general web encyclopedias; build a robust evidence chain using market data to prove distinctiveness or refute descriptiveness claims.
Practice note: Ensure all submitted evidence is professionally curated, focusing on quantifiable metrics like user engagement and advertising spend rather than unverified online d…
What to monitor: Monitor how UKIPO hearing officers evaluate the reliability of digital sources versus empirical market data in future opposition decisions involving technical acr…

news_items.title: Going nowhere with a bathing ape: earlier rights in EUTM oppositions
news_items.title_zh: CJEU裁定：欧盟商标异议中在先权利须在决定时持续有效
news_items.title_en: CJEU Ruling: Earlier Rights Must Remain Valid at EUIPO Decision in EU Trade Mark Oppositions
news_items.summary: A Bathing Ape (BAPE) is a famous, luxury, Japanese fashion brand. The eponymous BAPE is sometimes stern and sometimes very cute. The cute BAPE is Baby…
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 日本品牌BAPE因英国未注册权在异议期间因脱欧失效，遭EUIPO驳回。CJEU在C-337/22 P案中裁定，主张在先权利不仅需在争议商标申请日存在，还必须在EUIPO作出最终决定时保持有效且可执行。若权利在程序中灭失，异议即失败。此判决澄清了法律不确定性，恢复了EUIPO的既有做法，强调权利在整个诉讼期间的稳定性至关重要。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Japanese brand BAPE faced dismissal of its EU trade mark opposition after UK unregistered rights became ineffective due to Brexit during proceedings. In Case C-337/22 P, the Court of Justice of the European Union ruled that relying on earlier rights requires them to exist not only at the contested application’s filing date but also to remain valid and enforceable when the EUIPO issues its final decision. If these rights lapse during proceedings, the opposition fails. This judgment resolves legal uncertainty stemming from conflicting EUIPO and appellate court decisions, restoring the established approach that emphasizes the continuous stability of rights throughout the entire litigation period.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧维权时，应避免仅依赖易失效的短期或未注册权利。建议优先选择稳定的注册商标作为异议基础，并建立动态监控机制，确保在漫长的异议及上诉期内，在先权利持续有效，防止因权利瑕疵导致维权失败。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This ruling significantly impacts prosecution strategy by extending risk exposure for opponents throughout lengthy opposition and appeal phases. Practitioners should prioritize stable registered trade marks over short-term or unregistered rights to mitigate validity risks. Establishing dynamic monitoring mechanisms is essential to ensure continuous compliance with renewal deadlines and use requirements. Failure to maintain the underlying right can prove fatal to an opposition, making proactive portfolio management critical for successful enforcement in the EU jurisdiction.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["CJEU裁定在先权利须在EUIPO最终决定时仍有效且可执行", "异议期间权利若灭失将直接导致异议失败，风险贯穿全程", "权利人需加强组合管理，确保证书续展及维持使用以防失效"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["CJEU rules earlier rights must remain valid and enforceable at the time of the EUIPO's final decision.", "Oppositions fail if relied-upon rights lapse during proceedings, with risks persisting throughout the case.", "Rights holders must strengthen portfolio management, ensuring renewals and use maintenance to prevent invalidity."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优先选用稳定注册商标，规避短期或未注册权利的失效风险", "建立异议期权利动态监控机制，确保证书续展及使用合规"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Prioritize stable registered trade marks to avoid invalidity risks associated with short-term or unregistered rights.", "Practice note: Implement dynamic monitoring mechanisms during opposition periods to ensure certificate renewals and use compliance.", "What to monitor: Track the legal status and validity of all earlier rights relied upon until the final EUIPO decision is issued."]
core_points_en: CJEU rules earlier rights must remain valid and enforceable at the time of the EUIPO's final decision.
Oppositions fail if relied-upon rights lapse during proceedings, with risks persisting throughout the case.
Rights holders must strengthen portfolio management, ensuring renewals and use maintenance to prevent invalidity.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Prioritize stable registered trade marks to avoid invalidity risks associated with short-term or unregistered rights.
Practice note: Implement dynamic monitoring mechanisms during opposition periods to ensure certificate renewals and use compliance.
What to monitor: Track the legal status and validity of all earlier rights relied upon until the final EUIPO decision is issued.

news_items.title: UPC gives Frankfurt court priority in Samsung's FRAND claim but revokes ZTE's patent
news_items.title_zh: UPC曼海姆庭撤销ZTE专利并驳回三星FRAND反诉
news_items.title_en: UPC Mannheim Revokes ZTE Patent and Declines Jurisdiction Over Samsung FRAND Counterclaim
news_items.summary: Mannheim local division has now revoked a patent owned by ZTE and declined jurisdiction over the FRAND counterclaim filed by Samsung.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）曼海姆地方分部在ZTE与三星的平行诉讼中作出裁决：撤销ZTE持有的欧洲专利EP 3 905 730，并以缺乏管辖权为由驳回三星提出的FRAND许可费率反诉。此前法兰克福地方法院已获准优先审理该FRAND争议。此案标志着双方在UPC框架下首轮侵权听证结束，凸显了UPC在处理标准必要专利有效性及FRAND管辖权问题上的初步司法立场。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Mannheim Local Division has revoked ZTE’s European patent EP 3 905 730 and declined jurisdiction over Samsung’s FRAND counterclaim. This decision arises from parallel proceedings between the two technology giants, marking the conclusion of the first infringement hearing at the UPC. The court determined it lacked authority to adjudicate the FRAND rate-setting issue, effectively deferring this aspect of the dispute. Previously, priority for handling Samsung’s FRAND claims was granted to the Regional Court of Frankfurt am Main. This ruling highlights the UPC’s initial judicial stance on standard-essential patent validity and the limitations of its jurisdiction regarding FRAND licensing terms, while national courts continue to play a critical role in resolving complex royalty disputes.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需警惕UPC快速撤销专利的风险，同时关注其FRAND管辖权的局限性。建议采取双轨策略：在UPC积极抗辩专利有效性，同时在成员国法院推进FRAND费率谈判。应密切跟踪曼海姆等活跃分部的裁判倾向，优化全球SEP诉讼布局，避免单一法庭依赖。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This development underscores the strategic importance of forum selection in SEP litigation. Rights holders face heightened risks of rapid patent revocation at the UPC, necessitating robust validity defenses within that forum. Conversely, licensees may leverage national courts to secure FRAND determinations where the UPC declines jurisdiction. A dual-track strategy is increasingly vital: actively challenging or defending patent validity at the UPC while simultaneously pursuing or resisting FRAND rate settlements in competent national jurisdictions. Parties must carefully monitor how different UPC divisions handle jurisdictional boundaries to optimize global litigation portfolios and avoid over-reliance on a single tribunal for both validity and licensing outcomes.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC曼海姆分部裁定撤销ZTE涉案欧洲专利EP 3 905 730", "法院以无管辖权为由驳回三星针对该专利的FRAND费率反诉", "德国法兰克福地方法院被确认拥有审理三星FRAND主张的优先权"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Mannheim Local Division revoked ZTE’s European patent EP 3 905 730 during infringement proceedings.", "The court declined jurisdiction over Samsung’s FRAND counterclaim due to lack of authority on rate setting.", "Frankfurt Regional Court retains priority jurisdiction for adjudicating Samsung’s FRAND licensing claims."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用成员国法院优势规避UPC在FRAND费率裁定上的管辖限制", "加强在UPC的专利稳定性防御，应对快速无效宣告风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage national courts to bypass UPC jurisdictional limits on FRAND rate determinations.", "Practice note: Strengthen patent stability defenses at the UPC to mitigate risks of swift invalidation rulings.", "What to monitor: Track jurisdictional trends in active UPC divisions like Mannheim to refine global SEP strategies."]
core_points_en: Mannheim Local Division revoked ZTE’s European patent EP 3 905 730 during infringement proceedings.
The court declined jurisdiction over Samsung’s FRAND counterclaim due to lack of authority on rate setting.
Frankfurt Regional Court retains priority jurisdiction for adjudicating Samsung’s FRAND licensing claims.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage national courts to bypass UPC jurisdictional limits on FRAND rate determinations.
Practice note: Strengthen patent stability defenses at the UPC to mitigate risks of swift invalidation rulings.
What to monitor: Track jurisdictional trends in active UPC divisions like Mannheim to refine global SEP strategies.

news_items.title: The UK: a world-class home for intellectual property
news_items.title_zh: 英国：世界级的知识产权家园
news_items.title_en: UK Intellectual Property Environment: A Global Leader in Trade Mark Protection and Legal Framework
news_items.summary: As newly appointed President of the Chartered Institute of Trade Mark Attorneys (CITMA), we were delighted when Daniel Hardman-Smart accepted our invitation to be one of our guest bloggers. In his blog, Daniel talks about the UK as a leading environment for intellectual property, particularly in relation to trade marks, and what
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 文章由特许商标律师协会新任主席撰写，强调英国作为全球知识产权保护枢纽的地位。引用美国商会国际IP指数，指出英国在商标领域并列第一。文章赞扬英国成熟的法律框架、专业的知识产权法院及高效的执法能力，认为其能为企业提供可靠的品牌保护。旨在向全球企业展示英国在商标注册、管理及维权方面的卓越环境，鼓励企业利用该体系保障品牌资产。
news_items.ai_summary_en: Authored by the newly appointed President of the Chartered Institute of Trade Mark Attorneys, this commentary underscores the United Kingdom’s status as a premier global hub for intellectual property protection. Citing the US Chamber of Commerce International IP Index, the article highlights that the UK ranks joint first worldwide for trade marks, reflecting its robust legal infrastructure. The piece praises the maturity of the UK’s legal framework, including respected specialist IP courts that deliver cost-effective and enforceable decisions. It emphasizes the international recognition of Chartered Trade Mark Attorneys for their commercial expertise. Ultimately, the blog aims to demonstrate to global businesses how the UK’s efficient and reliable system supports brand registration, management, and enforcement, ensuring comprehensive protection for valuable brand assets.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出口企业应重视英国商标布局，利用其高效司法体系维权。鉴于英国IP环境优越，建议企业在英建立完整商标组合，并借助当地专业律师资源，确保品牌在英及国际市场的合规与安全，降低侵权风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating in or entering the UK market, leveraging the jurisdiction’s high-ranking IP framework is critical for securing brand assets. The combination of specialized courts and expert legal practitioners offers a reliable pathway for both registration and enforcement. Businesses should consider establishing comprehensive trade mark portfolios within the UK to mitigate infringement risks effectively. Utilizing local professional resources ensures compliance with sophisticated legal standards, enhancing overall brand security. This environment provides a strategic advantage for managing international IP rights, offering efficient resolution mechanisms and strong legal protections that command respect globally, thereby supporting sustainable business growth and risk management strategies.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国在国际IP指数中商标保护得分并列第一，法律环境成熟", "拥有受尊重的专业知识产权法院，提供高效且具执行力的裁决", "特许商标律师具备国际认可的专业知识，助力企业品牌全球化"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UK achieves a joint first ranking globally for trade mark protection in the latest US Chamber of Commerce International IP Index.", "Specialist intellectual property courts provide mature, sophisticated, and enforceable legal decisions recognized across multiple jurisdictions.", "Chartered Trade Mark Attorneys offer internationally recognized expertise and commercial judgment to support effective brand globalization."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用英国高效司法体系强化品牌海外维权能力", "借助当地专业资源完善商标组合以规避国际风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage the UK's top-tier trade mark ranking and specialized courts to secure robust brand protection and enforce rights efficiently against infringers.", "Practice note: Engage Chartered Trade Mark Attorneys to build comprehensive local portfolios, ensuring alignment with sophisticated legal standards and commercial best practices.", "What to monitor: Track developments in UK IP enforcement mechanisms and court rulings to maintain competitive advantage and minimize international infringement risks."]
core_points_en: The UK achieves a joint first ranking globally for trade mark protection in the latest US Chamber of Commerce International IP Index.
Specialist intellectual property courts provide mature, sophisticated, and enforceable legal decisions recognized across multiple jurisdictions.
Chartered Trade Mark Attorneys offer internationally recognized expertise and commercial judgment to support effective brand globalization.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage the UK's top-tier trade mark ranking and specialized courts to secure robust brand protection and enforce rights efficiently against infringers.
Practice note: Engage Chartered Trade Mark Attorneys to build comprehensive local portfolios, ensuring alignment with sophisticated legal standards and commercial best practices.
What to monitor: Track developments in UK IP enforcement mechanisms and court rulings to maintain competitive advantage and minimize international infringement risks.

news_items.title: Le processus d'innovation et les réponses PI
news_items.title_zh: 法国INPI解析创新全流程中的知识产权应对策略
news_items.title_en: INPI Guidance: Integrating IP Strategies Across the Six Stages of Innovation
news_items.summary: Le processus d'innovation et les réponses PI llegrand@inpi.fr 30 avril 2026 La lettre d'information Texte Cette infographie fait partie des contenus envoyés dans la newsletter Coaching INPI. Cette newsletter a pour objectif de vous informer tous les mois sur des sujets de propriété industrielle. Inscrivez-vous © Items Description détaillée de l'infographie IDÉE Étape 1 — Chercher / Sélectionner Comment trouver des opportunités d'innovation et créer un nouveau produit ? Veille / Étude liberté d'e
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 法国工业产权局（INPI）在“Coaching INPI”通讯中发布信息图，详解从创意到产业化的六个创新阶段及其对应的知识产权策略。内容涵盖自由实施检索、法国专利申请、概念验证合同、商业化扩展、产品审查及最终的价值评估。文章提供了各阶段的典型成本区间（如申请费4-6千欧元），旨在指导企业将IP融入创新全生命周期，优化预算分配并构建国际保护组合。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) released an infographic within its 'Coaching INPI' newsletter, detailing intellectual property strategies aligned with six distinct stages of the innovation lifecycle. The guidance maps specific IP actions to phases ranging from initial idea selection and R&D design to commercial exploitation and final asset valuation. Key measures include freedom-to-operate searches, French patent filings, contractual frameworks for concept validation, and strategies for international title extension. The document provides indicative cost ranges for each phase, such as €4,000–€6,000 for French applications, based on a portfolio including at least one trademark and one patent extended internationally. This resource aims to assist enterprises in integrating IP management into their innovation processes, optimizing budget allocation, and constructing robust international protection portfolios.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业应重视早期FTO检索以规避侵权风险，并利用法国申请作为进入欧洲市场的低成本跳板。建议结合INPI提供的成本模型，合理规划从单一国家申请到国际布局的资金节奏，强化合同管理与专利资产估值能力，提升整体IP运营效率。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This INPI framework offers a structured approach for aligning IP expenditures with innovation milestones. For entities operating in Europe, early freedom-to-operate analysis remains critical to mitigate infringement risks during product development. Utilizing the French filing system as a cost-effective entry point can facilitate broader European market access. Companies should integrate these cost models into their financial planning to manage the transition from national filings to international protection. Furthermore, strengthening contractual governance during the concept validation phase and enhancing patent valuation capabilities are essential for maximizing the commercial return on IP investments and ensuring sustainable competitive advantage.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["梳理创新六阶段：从创意筛选、研发设计到商业化及价值评估的完整路径", "明确各阶段IP动作：包括FTO检索、法国专利申请及后续的国际权利延伸策略", "提供成本参考：给出各阶段平均费用区间，助力企业精准规划IP预算与资源"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Outlines a comprehensive six-stage innovation pathway, covering activities from initial idea screening and research design through to commercialization and value assessment.", "Defines specific IP actions for each stage, emphasizing freedom-to-operate searches, French patent applications, and subsequent strategies for extending rights internationally.", "Provides indicative cost benchmarks for each phase to assist companies in precise IP budget planning and efficient resource allocation across the product lifecycle."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用法国申请低成本优势，构建进入欧洲市场的初步专利护城河", "强化早期自由实施检索与合同管理，降低出海过程中的法律与财务风险"]

news_items.title: Fermeture de l’INPI jeudi 14 et vendredi 15 mai 2026
news_items.title_zh: 法国INPI2026年5月14-15日暂停工业产权服务
news_items.title_en: INPI Suspends Industrial Property Services on May 14–15, 2026
news_items.summary: Fermeture de l’INPI jeudi 14 et vendredi 15 mai 2026 llegrand@inpi.fr 30 avril 2026 La prorogation de délai au jour ouvrable suivant pour les jours fériés ou chômés est prévue aux articles R. 514-2, R. 618-3 et R. 718-2 du Code de la PI. Si vous rencontrez des difficultés d'accès à l'espace e-procédures ou un problème technique , vous pouvez nous contacter au +33 (0)1 56 65 89 98. Décision n° 2025-138 du 21 octobre 2025 relative aux journées de fermeture de l'INPI en 2026.pdf 59.76 Ko Titre À no
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）宣布，因节假日安排，将于2026年5月14日（周四）和15日（周五）暂停提供工业产权相关服务。根据《知识产权法典》相关规定，若法定期限届满日为非工作日，期限将顺延至下一个工作日。在此期间，INPI Direct信息服务针对商标、专利及外观设计等工业产权咨询将关闭，但企业行政手续服务仍正常开放。如遇技术故障，用户可通过指定电话联系支持。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) announces the suspension of industrial property services on Thursday, May 14, and Friday, May 15, 2026, due to holiday arrangements. According to Articles R. 514-2, R. 618-3, and R. 718-2 of the Intellectual Property Code, statutory deadlines falling on non-working days are automatically extended to the next working day. During this period, INPI Direct information services regarding trademarks, patents, and designs will be closed. However, services related to corporate formalities, such as business creation, modifications, cessation, and annual account filings, will remain open from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Users experiencing technical issues with the e-procedures portal may contact support at +33 (0)1 56 65 89 98.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业需特别注意2026年5月中旬的期限顺延风险。若关键IP申请或答复期限恰逢该周末，务必提前规划提交，避免依赖顺延机制导致延误。建议监控INPI官方日历，确保在截止日前完成所有工业产权程序，保障权利稳定性。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners should carefully assess filing strategies around mid-May 2026, noting that while deadlines expiring on these dates extend to the following Monday, reliance on this mechanism carries procedural risks. It is advisable to complete critical IP applications and responses before the holiday weekend to ensure certainty and avoid potential delays associated with post-holiday processing volumes. Monitoring the official INPI calendar remains essential for maintaining compliance and protecting rights stability across European jurisdictions.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["INPI于2026年5月14日至15日暂停工业产权咨询服务", "期限届满日为节假日时依法顺延至下一工作日", "企业设立与年报等行政手续服务期间保持正常开放"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["INPI suspends industrial property consultations for trademarks, patents, and designs on May 14–15, 2026.", "Statutory deadlines expiring on these holidays are legally extended to the subsequent working day.", "Corporate administrative services remain operational during the closure for standard business hours."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注期限顺延规则，避免因节假日导致IP程序延误", "提前规划五月中旬的关键申请与答复，确保合规"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Verify if any critical IP deadlines fall on May 14–15, 2026, to leverage automatic extensions safely.", "Practice note: Prioritize early submission of key applications and responses before mid-May to mitigate procedural risks.", "What to monitor: Official INPI announcements for any changes to service availability or technical support protocols."]
core_points_en: INPI suspends industrial property consultations for trademarks, patents, and designs on May 14–15, 2026.
Statutory deadlines expiring on these holidays are legally extended to the subsequent working day.
Corporate administrative services remain operational during the closure for standard business hours.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Verify if any critical IP deadlines fall on May 14–15, 2026, to leverage automatic extensions safely.
Practice note: Prioritize early submission of key applications and responses before mid-May to mitigate procedural risks.
What to monitor: Official INPI announcements for any changes to service availability or technical support protocols.

news_items.title: HOFFMANN EITLE retains #1 position for European patent filings at the EPO
news_items.title_zh: HOFFMANN EITLE蝉联EPO欧洲专利申请量榜首
news_items.title_en: HOFFMANN EITLE Retains Top Position for European Patent Filings at the EPO
news_items.summary: The latest IP Pilot report once again highlights HOFFMANN EITLE as the leading firm for E
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 根据IP Pilot最新报告，HOFFMANN EITLE在2023至2025年间向欧洲专利局（EPO）提交超过13,000件申请，再次位居首位。该排名证实了该所在欧洲专利 prosecution 领域的持续领导力，反映了其在管理跨行业、跨司法管辖区复杂专利组合方面的规模、技术专长及一致性。此举旨在展示其应对不断演变的市场环境的能力，并感谢客户信任与团队承诺。
news_items.ai_summary_en: According to the latest IP Pilot report, HOFFMANN EITLE has once again secured the leading position for European patent filings at the European Patent Office (EPO). Between 2023 and 2025, the firm filed over 13,000 applications, demonstrating sustained leadership in European patent prosecution. This ranking underscores the firm’s scale, technical expertise, and operational consistency required to manage complex patent portfolios across diverse industries and jurisdictions. The achievement highlights the ability to navigate an evolving market environment effectively. The report serves as a testament to the firm’s commitment to supporting innovation throughout the patent lifecycle, reflecting the trust placed in its teams by clients worldwide.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局应关注头部律所的服务能力与稳定性。HOFFMANN EITLE的高吞吐量表明其具备处理大规模组合的经验。建议中资企业评估此类顶级律所在多法域协调及复杂案件处理上的实力，以优化海外专利资产质量，确保在激烈竞争中获得稳健的法律支持。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating in Europe, evaluating the capacity and stability of top-tier law firms is critical for effective overseas IP strategy. High-volume filing statistics indicate substantial experience in handling large-scale patent portfolios. In-house counsel should assess whether such firms possess the necessary professional strength for multi-jurisdictional coordination and complex case management. Prioritizing partners with proven track records in high-throughput environments can optimize the quality of foreign patent assets. This approach ensures robust legal support, helping organizations maintain competitive advantage and secure stable protection in increasingly intense global markets.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["HOFFMANN EITLE三年间向EPO提交超1.3万件申请，稳居第一", "报告确认其在欧洲专利审查领域的持续领导地位与技术专长", "体现其管理跨行业复杂专利组合的规模优势与市场适应性"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["HOFFMANN EITLE filed over 13,000 applications at the EPO between 2023 and 2025, maintaining its top-ranked position.", "The report confirms the firm's sustained leadership and deep technical expertise within the European patent prosecution landscape.", "Results demonstrate significant scale advantages and market adaptability in managing complex, cross-industry patent portfolios."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注头部律所处理大规模专利组合的能力与稳定性", "评估顶级律所在多法域协调及复杂案件中的专业实力"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess the capacity and stability of leading firms when managing large-scale international patent portfolios.", "Practice note: Evaluate top-tier firms for their professional strength in multi-jurisdictional coordination and complex cases.", "What to monitor: Track high-throughput filing metrics to identify partners capable of ensuring robust legal support globally."]
core_points_en: HOFFMANN EITLE filed over 13,000 applications at the EPO between 2023 and 2025, maintaining its top-ranked position.
The report confirms the firm's sustained leadership and deep technical expertise within the European patent prosecution landscape.
Results demonstrate significant scale advantages and market adaptability in managing complex, cross-industry patent portfolios.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess the capacity and stability of leading firms when managing large-scale international patent portfolios.
Practice note: Evaluate top-tier firms for their professional strength in multi-jurisdictional coordination and complex cases.
What to monitor: Track high-throughput filing metrics to identify partners capable of ensuring robust legal support globally.

news_items.title: Unified Patent Court published the 2025 annual report
news_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院发布2025年度报告
news_items.title_en: UPC Releases 2025 Annual Report Highlighting Three-Year Progress and New Case Management System
news_items.summary: The UPC published its second annual report
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）发布第二份年度报告，回顾其成立三年来的活动、案件量及关键成就。报告强调新案件管理系统（CMS）的成功上线是重要里程碑，体现了与欧洲专利局及用户组织的紧密合作。法院高层指出，UPC已巩固其作为领先知识产权诉讼论坛的地位，致力于在技术快速进步背景下提供高质量、及时的判决，并持续加强判例法发展及利益相关方沟通。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has published its second annual report, reviewing activities, caseload, and key achievements since its establishment three years ago. The report highlights the successful launch of the new Case Management System as a major milestone, demonstrating effective cooperation between the UPC, the European Patent Office, and user organizations. Court leadership emphasized that the UPC has solidified its position as a leading IP litigation forum. The institution remains committed to developing consistent case law, engaging with stakeholders, and delivering high-quality decisions within competitive timeframes. These efforts aim to sustain growth and efficiency amidst rapid technological progress, ensuring the Court is well-equipped to handle future challenges in the evolving European patent landscape.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: UPC运作日趋成熟，诉讼效率与透明度提升将增加其在欧专利纠纷中的吸引力。中国企业应密切关注其判例法发展及新系统对程序的影响，优化在欧洲的专利布局与维权策略，利用其高效机制应对潜在侵权风险或发起进攻性诉讼。
news_items.ai_insight_en: As the UPC matures, its increasing procedural efficiency and transparency enhance its attractiveness for resolving European patent disputes. Rights holders should closely monitor the development of UPC case law to understand judicial trends and predict outcomes. Adapting to the streamlined procedures offered by the new Case Management System allows for optimized litigation strategies across member states. Companies can leverage these transparent mechanisms to proactively manage patent risks and assert enforcement rights effectively. This environment supports both defensive risk mitigation and offensive enforcement actions, requiring updated approaches to European patent portfolio management and dispute resolution planning.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC发布2025年报，回顾成立三年来的案件量与关键成就", "新案件管理系统成功上线，彰显机构间高效协作与透明度", "法院巩固领先地位，承诺在技术变革中提供高质量及时判决"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC released its 2025 annual report, summarizing caseload trends and significant institutional achievements over its first three years of operation.", "The successful implementation of the new Case Management System underscores enhanced operational transparency and efficient collaboration among key stakeholders.", "Leadership affirmed the Court's strengthened status as a premier IP litigation venue, prioritizing timely, high-quality judgments amid technological evolution."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注UPC判例法发展，适应其高效诉讼程序以优化在欧策略", "利用UPC透明机制，积极管理专利风险并把握维权主动权"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor UPC case law developments to align European patent enforcement strategies with emerging judicial precedents and procedural efficiencies.", "Practice note: Leverage the new Case Management System’s transparency to optimize litigation timelines and manage cross-border patent risks more effectively.", "What to monitor: Track the evolution of UPC jurisprudence and administrative updates to adapt defense and enforcement tactics in the unified patent landscape."]
core_points_en: The UPC released its 2025 annual report, summarizing caseload trends and significant institutional achievements over its first three years of operation.
The successful implementation of the new Case Management System underscores enhanced operational transparency and efficient collaboration among key stakeholders.
Leadership affirmed the Court's strengthened status as a premier IP litigation venue, prioritizing timely, high-quality judgments amid technological evolution.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor UPC case law developments to align European patent enforcement strategies with emerging judicial precedents and procedural efficiencies.
Practice note: Leverage the new Case Management System’s transparency to optimize litigation timelines and manage cross-border patent risks more effectively.
What to monitor: Track the evolution of UPC jurisprudence and administrative updates to adapt defense and enforcement tactics in the unified patent landscape.

news_items.title: Mobile Foot Measurement’s IP Battle Highlights Easily Overlooked Step In Startup Journey, Managing IP, 2026 – Maiwald
news_items.title_zh: 移动足部测量IP战凸显初创企业易忽视环节
news_items.title_en: Mobile Foot Measurement IP Battle Highlights Overlooked Startup Strategy Step
news_items.summary: In an article for Managing IP, Dr Christian Meyer of Maiwald, in collaboration with Footprint Technologies, explains how a single process patent has had a
news_items.ai_summary_zh: Maiwald律所文章分析Footprint Technologies案例，其AI手机测脚技术通过单一方法专利深刻影响德国市场。文章强调早期且周密的IP战略对AI及软件初创企业至关重要，不仅保护技术，更关乎市场准入、竞争定位及长期商业成功。Maiwald协助该企业制定IP战略、进行侵权评估并构建塑造市场的专利组合。
news_items.ai_summary_en: A Maiwald article in Managing IP analyzes how a single process patent significantly impacted the German mobile foot measurement market. The piece examines the case of Footprint Technologies, whose AI-driven smartphone solution for precise foot scanning faced critical IP challenges. It underscores that an early, robust IP strategy is vital for AI and software startups, extending beyond mere technology protection to influence market access, competitive positioning, and long-term commercial viability. Maiwald assisted the company by developing its IP strategy, conducting infringement assessments, and structuring a patent portfolio designed to shape market dynamics and secure sustainable business success against competitors.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国AI出海企业应摒弃重研发轻IP观念，在进军欧洲前完成FTO检索。针对算法类创新，需注重方法专利布局而非仅依赖著作权。建议早期引入专业机构进行侵权风险评估，构建防御性专利组合，以避免因单一关键专利缺失导致的市场禁入风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For companies deploying AI technologies in Europe, relying solely on copyright or trade secrets is insufficient. Early Freedom to Operate (FTO) searches are essential to identify blocking patents before market entry. Startups should prioritize method patent protection for algorithmic innovations rather than depending exclusively on software copyrights. Engaging specialized IP counsel early enables thorough infringement risk assessment and the construction of defensive patent portfolios. This proactive approach mitigates the risk of market exclusion due to single key patents, ensuring smoother commercialization and stronger competitive positioning in the European market.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["单一方法专利显著影响德国移动足部测量市场竞争格局", "早期周密IP战略决定AI初创企业的市场准入与商业成功", "专利组合构建需结合侵权评估以确立竞争优势"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["A single method patent significantly altered the competitive landscape for mobile foot measurement solutions in Germany.", "Early, comprehensive IP strategies determine market access and commercial success for AI-focused startup ventures.", "Building patent portfolios requires integrating infringement assessments to establish durable competitive advantages."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["AI出海须前置FTO检索，规避单一关键专利市场禁入风险", "重视方法专利布局，构建防御性组合以保障商业安全"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Conduct FTO searches early to avoid market exclusion risks from single key patents.", "Practice note: Prioritize method patent layouts over copyright to build defensive combinations for commercial security.", "What to monitor: Emerging method patents in AI and software sectors that could block future market access."]
core_points_en: A single method patent significantly altered the competitive landscape for mobile foot measurement solutions in Germany.
Early, comprehensive IP strategies determine market access and commercial success for AI-focused startup ventures.
Building patent portfolios requires integrating infringement assessments to establish durable competitive advantages.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Conduct FTO searches early to avoid market exclusion risks from single key patents.
Practice note: Prioritize method patent layouts over copyright to build defensive combinations for commercial security.
What to monitor: Emerging method patents in AI and software sectors that could block future market access.

news_items.title: Mirror, mirror on the wall — Who is the most distinctive of them all?
news_items.title_zh: 镜中谁最具显著性？CJEU将裁定写实肖像商标注册资格
news_items.title_en: CJEU to Rule on Inherent Distinctiveness of Photorealistic Portrait Trademarks in Case C-3/26
news_items.summary: The question whether photorealistic portraits of people’s faces are inherently distinctive and can be registered as trade marks has been the subject of some debate (IPKat here, here and here). Now the Court of Justice of the EU (“CJEU”) gets to weigh in in a reference for a preliminary ruling from the Budapest High Court in Dr. Czirják-Nagy Ügyvédi Iroda (case C-3/26).   Background On 12 February
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 布达佩斯高等法院就Dr. Czirják-Nagy Ügyvédi Iroda案（C-3/26）向欧盟法院提交初步裁决请求。核心争议在于人物面部照片写实肖像是否具备固有显著性并可注册为商标。此前该问题在业界引发广泛辩论，此次CJEU的介入将为欧盟范围内此类非传统标志的可注册性及显著性判断提供关键法律指引。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) has received a request for a preliminary ruling from the Budapest High Court regarding the trademark eligibility of photorealistic facial portraits. The reference, filed in the case of Dr. Czirják-Nagy Ügyvédi Iroda (Case C-3/26), addresses whether such realistic images possess inherent distinctiveness under EU trademark law. This issue has sparked significant debate within the intellectual property community, particularly concerning non-traditional marks. The CJEU’s intervention is expected to provide critical legal guidance on the registrability and distinctiveness assessment of these visual elements across the European Union. The outcome will clarify the standards for registering portrait-based trademarks, impacting brand protection strategies for entities relying on human imagery.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业若计划将品牌代言人或创始人肖像注册为欧盟商标，需密切关注此案进展。若CJEU认定缺乏固有显著性，企业需提前准备通过使用获得显著性的证据。建议优化品牌布局策略，避免过度依赖单一肖像注册，结合文字图形组合申请以增强保护稳定性。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders utilizing personal likenesses, such as founders or brand ambassadors, should closely monitor this proceeding. If the CJEU determines that photorealistic portraits lack inherent distinctiveness, applicants must be prepared to demonstrate acquired distinctiveness through extensive market use. Relying solely on portrait registrations may pose risks; therefore, diversifying brand portfolios with word or combined marks is advisable to ensure robust protection. Legal teams should evaluate current applications for potential vulnerabilities and consider gathering evidence of consumer recognition proactively. This case highlights the importance of strategic planning when securing rights for non-traditional visual identifiers in the European market.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["布达佩斯高等法院提请CJEU对写实肖像固有显著性作出初步裁决", "案件核心争议为人物面部照片写实肖像能否注册为欧盟商标", "CJEU裁决将明确此类非传统标志在欧盟的注册标准与法律界限"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Budapest High Court refers the question of inherent distinctiveness for photorealistic portraits to the CJEU for a preliminary ruling.", "The core legal dispute centers on whether realistic photographs of human faces qualify for registration as EU trademarks without acquired distinctiveness.", "The forthcoming CJEU decision will establish definitive registration criteria and legal boundaries for portrait-based non-traditional marks in the EU."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注CJEU裁决，评估肖像商标注册风险及固有显著性要求", "提前收集使用证据，探索通过市场使用获得显著性的合规路径"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess risks associated with registering founder or ambassador portraits if inherent distinctiveness is denied by the CJEU.", "Practice note: Prepare evidence of acquired distinctiveness through use and consider combining portraits with text for stronger protection.", "What to monitor: Track the CJEU's final judgment to adjust EU trademark filing strategies for non-traditional portrait marks accordingly."]
core_points_en: The Budapest High Court refers the question of inherent distinctiveness for photorealistic portraits to the CJEU for a preliminary ruling.
The core legal dispute centers on whether realistic photographs of human faces qualify for registration as EU trademarks without acquired distinctiveness.
The forthcoming CJEU decision will establish definitive registration criteria and legal boundaries for portrait-based non-traditional marks in the EU.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess risks associated with registering founder or ambassador portraits if inherent distinctiveness is denied by the CJEU.
Practice note: Prepare evidence of acquired distinctiveness through use and consider combining portraits with text for stronger protection.
What to monitor: Track the CJEU's final judgment to adjust EU trademark filing strategies for non-traditional portrait marks accordingly.

news_items.title: Confidentiality ambush at the UPC: disclose once, lose it forever (CoA on Rule 262.2 RoP), (UPC_CoA_930/2025)
news_items.title_zh: UPC裁定：未获保护令披露即失密，保密 ambush 风险警示
news_items.title_en: UPC Ruling: Disclosure Without Protective Order Irreversibly Waives Trade Secret Status
news_items.summary: Court docket: Court of Appeal
news_items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在EOFlow诉Insulet案中裁定，若未在披露前依据程序规则第262A条获得保护令或明确限制，向对方披露的信息将永久丧失商业秘密地位。法院区分了限制公众查阅（262.2条）与限制对方使用（262A条），并驳回了“仅限诉讼目的”的隐含限制主张。此举强调程序合规是维持秘密性的必要步骤，未采取合理保密措施将导致信息性质不可逆地改变。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In EOFlow v. Insulet, the UPC Court of Appeal ruled that disclosing business information to an opposing party without a prior protective order under Rule 262A RoP results in the permanent loss of trade secret status. The Court strictly distinguished between restricting public access to court files under Rule 262.2 and restricting the opposing party’s use or disclosure under Rule 262A. It explicitly rejected the argument that an implicit procedural limitation exists, confining the use of disclosed information solely to litigation purposes. Consequently, failing to secure express confidentiality restrictions means reasonable steps to maintain secrecy were not taken. This decision underscores that procedural compliance is essential for preserving confidentiality, as unregulated disclosure fundamentally alters the legal nature of the information, rendering subsequent protection requests futile.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在UPC诉讼中需极度警惕“保密伏击”。在提交任何敏感财务或合同数据前，必须同步申请第262A条保护令，切勿依赖默示保密义务。应建立早期识别机制，评估披露对平行诉讼的影响，必要时引入“无溢出规则”，避免因程序疏忽导致核心商业机密在欧洲市场彻底公开且无法挽回。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Litigants must proactively secure Rule 262A protective orders before exchanging sensitive financial or contractual data, rather than relying on assumed confidentiality. The absence of explicit restrictions constitutes a waiver of trade secret protections, creating significant risks for parallel proceedings and broader market exposure. Legal teams should implement early identification protocols for confidential materials and assess potential spill-over effects in concurrent national or international disputes. Establishing clear 'no-spill' mechanisms and ensuring strict adherence to procedural requirements are critical to preventing the inadvertent public disclosure of core commercial secrets within the UPC framework.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["未依262A条获保护令即披露，信息将永久丧失商业秘密法律地位", "严格区分限制公众查阅与限制对方使用，前者不自动约束后者", "驳回诉讼用途隐含限制论，缺乏程序限制视为未采取合理保密措施"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Disclosure without a Rule 262A protective order causes irreversible loss of trade secret legal status.", "Rule 262.2 restricts public file access but does not automatically impose confidentiality obligations on the opposing party.", "The Court rejects implicit litigation-purpose limitations, treating lack of procedural restrictions as failure to take reasonable secrecy steps."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["提交敏感证据前务必同步申请262A条保护令，杜绝裸奔披露", "摒弃默示保密幻想，建立早期识别与平行诉讼溢出风险评估机制"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Secure Rule 262A protective orders prior to any sensitive data exchange to prevent irreversible loss of trade secret status.", "Practice note: Abandon reliance on implicit confidentiality; implement early identification mechanisms for confidential evidence and parallel litigation risk assessment.", "What to monitor: Strict procedural compliance regarding confidentiality undertakings to avoid inadvertent public disclosure of core commercial secrets."]
core_points_en: Disclosure without a Rule 262A protective order causes irreversible loss of trade secret legal status.
Rule 262.2 restricts public file access but does not automatically impose confidentiality obligations on the opposing party.
The Court rejects implicit litigation-purpose limitations, treating lack of procedural restrictions as failure to take reasonable secrecy steps.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Secure Rule 262A protective orders prior to any sensitive data exchange to prevent irreversible loss of trade secret status.
Practice note: Abandon reliance on implicit confidentiality; implement early identification mechanisms for confidential evidence and parallel litigation risk assessment.
What to monitor: Strict procedural compliance regarding confidentiality undertakings to avoid inadvertent public disclosure of core commercial secrets.

news_items.title: Can AI be sued?
news_items.title_zh: 英国司法任务组咨询：AI致损责任如何适用普通法？
news_items.title_en: UK Jurisdiction Taskforce Consults on Applying English Private Law to AI Harm
news_items.summary: The UK Jurisdiction Taskforce (UKJT) is consulting on a Legal Statement exploring how English private law might deal with harm caused by AI systems. Th...
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国司法任务组（UKJT）正就法律声明进行咨询，探讨英格兰私法如何处理AI系统造成的损害。鉴于缺乏专门的AI责任制度，UKJT旨在澄清现有普通法原则如何适用于AI引发的新颖情况，以消除法律不确定性，促进技术创新。该声明不提议新法，而是解释法院如何适应性地应用现有法律，为科技界提供明确的风险指引。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The UK Jurisdiction Taskforce (UKJT) is currently consulting on a Legal Statement that examines how English private law addresses harm caused by artificial intelligence systems. With no specific statutory liability regimes for AI in the United Kingdom, the UKJT aims to clarify how existing common law principles apply to these novel technological scenarios. The primary objective is to reduce legal uncertainty, which can otherwise hinder innovation and leave businesses unsure about their risk exposure. By explaining how courts are likely to adapt flexible and well-developed common law doctrines to autonomous systems, the statement seeks to provide greater certainty for the business and technology sectors. The final version will be published after considering stakeholder responses, focusing on interpretation rather than proposing new legislation.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧AI企业需关注普通法对自主系统责任的解释趋势。虽无新法，但司法适应性可能带来不可预见的判例风险。建议企业完善内部合规与风险评估机制，积极参与咨询反馈，以影响最终法律立场的形成，确保业务模式符合潜在的责任认定标准。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating within or targeting the UK market, understanding the trajectory of common law adaptation regarding autonomous systems is critical. Although no new legislative framework is being introduced, the judicial interpretation of liability for AI-induced harm may evolve unpredictably. Organizations should proactively assess their internal compliance structures and risk management protocols against potential common law standards. Engaging with ongoing consultations allows stakeholders to influence the emerging legal landscape. Monitoring these developments ensures that business models remain aligned with potential future liability determinations, mitigating the risk of unforeseen legal consequences as courts navigate the complexities of AI autonomy.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKJT咨询旨在澄清AI致损时英格兰普通法的适用规则", "无专门AI责任法，依赖灵活且成熟的普通法原则进行增量发展", "目标是为商业界提供法律确定性，消除对AI创新的法律风险顾虑"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UKJT consults on clarifying how English private law applies to harm caused by AI systems without creating new statutes.", "Existing flexible common law principles are deemed sufficient to address AI liabilities through incremental judicial development.", "The initiative aims to provide legal certainty for businesses, reducing uncertainty that might otherwise impede AI innovation."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注普通法对AI自主性致损责任的司法适应趋势", "完善合规机制并参与咨询，以降低潜在法律风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor how English courts interpret liability for autonomous AI systems under existing common law frameworks.", "Practice note: Strengthen internal compliance and risk assessment mechanisms to address potential gaps in current legal certainty.", "What to monitor: Track the final UKJT Legal Statement and subsequent case law developments regarding AI harm and liability."]
core_points_en: The UKJT consults on clarifying how English private law applies to harm caused by AI systems without creating new statutes.
Existing flexible common law principles are deemed sufficient to address AI liabilities through incremental judicial development.
The initiative aims to provide legal certainty for businesses, reducing uncertainty that might otherwise impede AI innovation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how English courts interpret liability for autonomous AI systems under existing common law frameworks.
Practice note: Strengthen internal compliance and risk assessment mechanisms to address potential gaps in current legal certainty.
What to monitor: Track the final UKJT Legal Statement and subsequent case law developments regarding AI harm and liability.

news_items.title: Official Statistics: Facts and figures: patents, trade marks, designs and hearings 2025
news_items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局发布2025年专利商标及外观设计官方统计
news_items.title_en: UKIPO Releases 2025 Official Statistics on Patents, Trade Marks, and Designs
news_items.summary: Official statistics include the latest annual data breakdowns for patents, trade marks, and designs for 2025, based on IPO administrative data.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）发布了基于行政数据的2025年年度官方统计数据。该报告详细拆解了专利、商标和外观设计的最新年度数据分布，涵盖申请量、注册量及相关听证会情况。作为英国知识产权体系的核心情报，这些数据反映了当前英国市场的创新活跃度与知识产权保护现状，为权利人评估市场策略提供了量化依据。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The United Kingdom Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has published its official annual statistics for 2025, derived from internal administrative records. This comprehensive report provides detailed breakdowns of activity across patents, trade marks, and registered designs. The data covers the entire lifecycle from initial applications to final registrations, offering a granular view of filing volumes and grant rates. Additionally, the publication includes statistics on hearings and appeals, reflecting dispute resolution trends within the UK system. As a core intelligence source for the British IP landscape, these figures illustrate current innovation dynamics and protection levels. Stakeholders can utilize this quantitative evidence to assess market competitiveness, track sector-specific trends, and evaluate the overall health of intellectual property enforcement and registration processes in the United Kingdom.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This dataset offers critical benchmarks for evaluating innovation intensity and competitive positioning within the UK market. By analyzing year-on-year trends in specific technology sectors, rights holders can identify emerging hotspots or signs of market saturation. Comparing current filing patterns against historical baselines allows for more accurate forecasting of competitor strategies and potential congestion points. Organizations should integrate these insights into their broader international portfolio management frameworks. Adjusting resource allocation based on these empirical trends helps optimize filing efficiency and ensures robust IP coverage in key business areas, supporting strategic decision-making for market entry and expansion.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO发布2025年专利、商标及外观设计年度官方统计数据", "数据基于UKIPO内部行政记录，涵盖申请至注册全流程指标", "提供各知识产权类别的详细年度分解数据及听证会概况"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["UKIPO publishes 2025 annual official statistics covering patents, trade marks, and designs based on administrative data.", "Data encompasses full-process metrics from initial application through to final registration for all major IP categories.", "Report provides detailed annual breakdowns by IP type and includes an overview of hearing and appeal activities."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用UKIPO数据监测英国特定技术领域申请热度以预判竞争态势", "参考年度统计优化中国企业在英专利申请策略与资源分配效率"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Use UKIPO data to monitor application heat in specific technical fields for anticipating competitive landscapes.", "Practice note: Reference annual statistics to optimize overseas patent application strategies and improve resource allocation efficiency.", "What to monitor: Track shifts in filing volumes and hearing outcomes to adjust portfolio management and compliance tactics."]
core_points_en: UKIPO publishes 2025 annual official statistics covering patents, trade marks, and designs based on administrative data.
Data encompasses full-process metrics from initial application through to final registration for all major IP categories.
Report provides detailed annual breakdowns by IP type and includes an overview of hearing and appeal activities.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Use UKIPO data to monitor application heat in specific technical fields for anticipating competitive landscapes.
Practice note: Reference annual statistics to optimize overseas patent application strategies and improve resource allocation efficiency.
What to monitor: Track shifts in filing volumes and hearing outcomes to adjust portfolio management and compliance tactics.

news_items.title: How ZEISS Strengthens Its Online Brand Protection And Trademark Searches With Questel
news_items.title_zh: 蔡司如何借助Questel强化在线品牌保护与商标检索
news_items.title_en: ZEISS Enhances Online Brand Protection and Trademark Search Efficiency via Questel Integration
news_items.summary: Holger Gensmantel, Head of Trademarks, shares how Questel supports the brand defense strategy at Carl Zeiss AG, and the benefits of integrating online brand protection with advanced trademark search tools.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 德国光学巨头蔡司（ZEISS）为应对日益复杂的在线侵权挑战，与Questel合作实施集成解决方案。通过结合在线品牌保护工具、Pliano案件管理系统及Markify ProSearch检索平台，蔡司实现了侵权行为的集中监测、优先排序及高效执法，同时优化了商标 clearance 搜索流程。此举显著提升了品牌防御效率，减少了行政负担，加速了日常商标运营决策，强化了其在全球数字渠道的品牌价值维护能力。
news_items.ai_summary_en: German optics giant Carl Zeiss AG partnered with Questel to address the growing complexity of online trademark infringement. By implementing an integrated solution combining Questel’s Online Brand Protection tools, the Pliano case management system, and Markify ProSearch, ZEISS achieved centralized monitoring and prioritization of potential violations. This strategic integration streamlined enforcement workflows and optimized trademark clearance search processes. The initiative significantly improved brand defense efficiency, reduced administrative burdens on internal teams, and accelerated daily operational decision-making. Consequently, ZEISS strengthened its capacity to protect brand value across global digital channels while enhancing the overall effectiveness of its intellectual property management strategy in a rapidly evolving online landscape.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业应重视数字化品牌资产管理，借鉴头部企业经验，引入自动化监测与智能检索工具。面对欧盟严格的知识产权执法环境，建立集中的案件管理系统有助于快速响应跨境侵权，降低合规风险，提升品牌出海的安全性与运营效率。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating within the European Union, adopting automated monitoring and intelligent search tools is critical for robust digital brand asset management. The strict IP enforcement environment in Europe necessitates centralized case management systems to handle cross-border infringements efficiently. Integrating brand protection with search capabilities allows legal teams to reduce compliance risks and lower internal administrative costs. This approach enhances operational efficiency and strengthens brand security, offering a scalable model for managing complex intellectual property portfolios in dynamic digital markets.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["蔡司采用Questel集成方案解决在线侵权监测碎片化难题，实现数据集中化管理", "利用先进算法与定制工作流，提升侵权检测准确率及执法响应速度，降低人工成本", "整合Markify ProSearch优化商标检索流程，加速 Clearance 评估…"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["ZEISS adopted Questel's integrated platform to resolve fragmented online infringement monitoring, achieving centralized data management for comprehensive threat visibility.", "Advanced algorithms and customized enforcement workflows enhanced detection accuracy and response speeds, effectively reducing manual labor costs and improving efficiency.", "Integration of Markify ProSearch optimized trademark clearance search procedures, accelerating evaluation processes and supporting faster, more informed legal decisions."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["建议引入自动化监测工具，应对欧盟复杂网络环境下的商标侵权风险", "构建集中式案件管理体系，提升跨境维权效率并降低内部行政运营成本"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Adopting automated monitoring tools helps mitigate trademark infringement risks inherent in the EU's complex online ecosystem.", "Practice note: Building a centralized case management framework improves cross-border enforcement efficiency and reduces internal administrative overhead.", "What to monitor: Track the integration trends between online brand protection platforms and trademark search databases for holistic IP strategy optimization."]
core_points_en: ZEISS adopted Questel's integrated platform to resolve fragmented online infringement monitoring, achieving centralized data management for comprehensive threat visibility.
Advanced algorithms and customized enforcement workflows enhanced detection accuracy and response speeds, effectively reducing manual labor costs and improving efficiency.
Integration of Markify ProSearch optimized trademark clearance search procedures, accelerating evaluation processes and supporting faster, more informed legal decisions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Adopting automated monitoring tools helps mitigate trademark infringement risks inherent in the EU's complex online ecosystem.
Practice note: Building a centralized case management framework improves cross-border enforcement efficiency and reduces internal administrative overhead.
What to monitor: Track the integration trends between online brand protection platforms and trademark search databases for holistic IP strategy optimization.

news_items.title: Canfield now faces injunction in five European countries in QuantifiCare dispute
news_items.title_zh: Canfield在QuantifiCare纠纷中面临五国UPC禁令
news_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Injuncts Canfield in Five Countries Over QuantifiCare Patent Dispute
news_items.summary: Canfield may no longer sell its 3D imaging system Canfield Vectra H2 in Belgium, France, Italy, and the Netherlands. Last week the Düsseldorf local division under presiding judge Ronny Thomas ruled that Canfield had infringed QuantifiCare’s patent EP 3 156 843. The UPC judges also rejected Canfield’s counterclaim for revocation (case IDs: UPC_CFI_559/2024 and UPC_CFI_106/2025). […] The post Canfield now faces injunction in five European countries in QuantifiCare dispute appeared first on JUVE Pa
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方法庭裁定，Canfield侵犯QuantifiCare专利EP 3 156 843，并驳回其撤销请求。此举导致Canfield的3D成像系统Vectra H2在比利时、法国、意大利和荷兰面临销售禁令，加上德国共涉及五国。该判决凸显UPC在快速解决跨国专利争议中的效力，对涉案产品的欧洲市场流通构成直接阻碍。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s (UPC) Düsseldorf local division has ruled that Canfield infringed QuantifiCare’s patent EP 3 156 843. Presiding Judge Ronny Thomas issued an injunction prohibiting the sale of Canfield’s Vectra H2 3D imaging system across Belgium, France, Italy, and the Netherlands. This ruling adds to existing restrictions in Germany, effectively blocking sales in five European countries simultaneously. The court also rejected Canfield’s counterclaim seeking revocation of the patent, thereby upholding its validity. This decision underscores the UPC’s capacity to deliver rapid, cross-border enforcement outcomes. For market participants, the judgment highlights how a single UPC proceeding can create immediate, widespread barriers to trade, significantly disrupting product distribution and commercial operations across multiple major European jurisdictions at once.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This case illustrates the strategic impact of the UPC’s centralized jurisdiction, where a single infringement finding triggers immediate, multi-jurisdictional market exclusion. Rights holders gain significant leverage through efficient cross-border enforcement, while alleged infringers face heightened risks of simultaneous sales bans across key European markets. Companies operating in Europe must prioritize robust Freedom to Operate (FTO) analyses before product launches to mitigate these exposure risks. Furthermore, establishing rapid response protocols for potential litigation is critical. Defenders should prepare comprehensive invalidity evidence chains early to challenge patent validity swiftly, ensuring they can negotiate settlements or appeal effectively without suffering prolonged, continent-wide commercial disruption.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC杜塞尔多夫法庭认定Canfield侵犯QuantifiCare专利权", "法院驳回Canfield撤销专利的反诉，维持专利有效性", "禁令覆盖比法意荷四国，叠加德国共五国禁止销售涉案产品"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Düsseldorf local division found Canfield liable for infringing QuantifiCare’s patent EP 3 156 843 regarding its 3D imaging technology.", "Judges dismissed Canfield’s counterclaim for patent revocation, confirming the validity and enforceability of QuantifiCare’s intellectual property rights.", "The resulting injunction bans sales of the Vectra H2 system in Belgium, France, Italy, and the Netherlands, alongside Germany."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重视UPC跨国禁令效力，提前布局专利自由实施分析", "建立快速响应机制，准备专利无效证据以应对突发诉讼"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess exposure to UPC's pan-European injunction powers which can halt sales in multiple jurisdictions simultaneously upon a single adverse ruling.", "Practice note: Conduct thorough pre-launch FTO analyses and prepare robust invalidity evidence chains to defend against sudden cross-border patent assertions.", "What to monitor: Track UPC procedural developments and settlement trends, as rapid enforcement may necessitate quick strategic pivots to preserve market access."]
core_points_en: The UPC Düsseldorf local division found Canfield liable for infringing QuantifiCare’s patent EP 3 156 843 regarding its 3D imaging technology.
Judges dismissed Canfield’s counterclaim for patent revocation, confirming the validity and enforceability of QuantifiCare’s intellectual property rights.
The resulting injunction bans sales of the Vectra H2 system in Belgium, France, Italy, and the Netherlands, alongside Germany.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess exposure to UPC's pan-European injunction powers which can halt sales in multiple jurisdictions simultaneously upon a single adverse ruling.
Practice note: Conduct thorough pre-launch FTO analyses and prepare robust invalidity evidence chains to defend against sudden cross-border patent assertions.
What to monitor: Track UPC procedural developments and settlement trends, as rapid enforcement may necessitate quick strategic pivots to preserve market access.

news_items.title: All you need is dialogue: the CJEU interprets ‘pastiche’ in Pelham II
news_items.title_zh: CJEU在Pelham II案中界定“拼贴画”例外
news_items.title_en: CJEU Defines Pastiche Exception in Pelham II: Artistic Dialogue and Objective Recognition
news_items.summary: On 14 April 2026, the Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) delivered its judgment in Pelham II, bringing partial closure to litigation spanning more than two decades.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月14日，欧盟法院就Pelham II案作出判决，历时二十余年的Kraftwerk采样纠纷获部分终结。法院澄清《信息社会指令》第5(3)(k)条“拼贴画”例外非万能条款，要求作品需唤起原作但保持明显差异，并进行可识别的艺术对话。判定不依赖主观意图，而看客观可识别性。此裁决平衡了版权独占与创作自由，为采样艺术家提供确定性但也设限。
news_items.ai_summary_en: On 14 April 2026, the Court of Justice of the European Union delivered its judgment in Pelham II, partially resolving litigation spanning over two decades regarding unauthorized sampling. The dispute concerned a two-second sample from Kraftwerk’s Metall auf Metall used in Sabrina Setlur’s track. The Court clarified that the “pastiche” exception under Article 5(3)(k) of the InfoSoc Directive is not a catch-all provision for all artistic reuse. Instead, it requires works to evoke existing works while remaining perceptibly different, engaging in a recognizable artistic dialogue. The ruling emphasizes objective recognizability by an audience familiar with the original work, rather than the user’s subjective intention. This decision balances exclusive copyright rights with creative freedom, offering legal certainty for sampling artists while establishing clear constraints on invoking the pastiche defense.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国音乐及数字内容企业在欧运营时，使用采样需谨慎评估是否构成“拼贴画”。建议确保新作品与原作好区分并体现艺术对话，避免单纯复制。建立合规审查机制，关注客观可识别性标准，以降低侵权风险并利用例外条款保护创作自由。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For entities operating in Europe, this judgment refines the boundaries of the pastiche exception for sampling and artistic reuse. Practitioners should assess whether new works maintain perceptible differences from originals and facilitate a recognizable artistic dialogue, avoiding mere replication. Compliance strategies must prioritize objective recognizability standards, ensuring that borrowed elements are identifiable to audiences familiar with the source material. Establishing robust internal review mechanisms can help mitigate infringement risks while leveraging the exception to protect creative freedom. Monitoring future national court applications will be essential to understand how these constraints impact practical enforcement and licensing negotiations in the digital content sector.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["拒绝将“拼贴画”作宽泛兜底解释，明确其不适用于所有艺术再利用形式", "定义核心特征为模仿风格且与原作好区分，旨在进行可识别的艺术对话", "判定标准侧重客观可识别性而非用户主观意图，需熟悉原作的公众能辨识"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court rejected a broad interpretation, clarifying that the pastiche exception does not cover all forms of artistic engagement with protected works.", "Pastiche requires evoking existing works while remaining perceptibly different, aiming to engage in a recognizable artistic or creative dialogue.", "Classification depends on objective recognizability to those familiar with the original work, not on the subjective intention of the user."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["采样需确保与原作好区分并进行艺术对话，避免单纯复制以符合例外", "关注客观可识别性标准，建立合规审查机制以降低在欧版权侵权风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure sampled works remain perceptibly distinct from originals and engage in recognizable artistic dialogue to qualify for the pastiche exception.", "Practice note: Focus compliance reviews on objective recognizability standards rather than subjective user intent to reduce infringement liability.", "What to monitor: Track subsequent national court interpretations to gauge how these constraints affect enforcement and licensing practices."]
core_points_en: The Court rejected a broad interpretation, clarifying that the pastiche exception does not cover all forms of artistic engagement with protected works.
Pastiche requires evoking existing works while remaining perceptibly different, aiming to engage in a recognizable artistic or creative dialogue.
Classification depends on objective recognizability to those familiar with the original work, not on the subjective intention of the user.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure sampled works remain perceptibly distinct from originals and engage in recognizable artistic dialogue to qualify for the pastiche exception.
Practice note: Focus compliance reviews on objective recognizability standards rather than subjective user intent to reduce infringement liability.
What to monitor: Track subsequent national court interpretations to gauge how these constraints affect enforcement and licensing practices.
