news_items.title: CJEU on continuity, heritage, and deceptive trademarks – Fauré Le Page Paris 1717
news_items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定商标标注虚构年份可能构成欺骗
news_items.title_en: CJEU: Using Historical Dates in Trademarks Without Business Continuity May Be Deceptive
news_items.summary: To which extent can a sign invoke heritage, age, and prestige before it crosses into deception? In the luxury sector, a trademark’s reference to a long history can signal continuity, know-how, and quality, making the line between genuine legacy and misleading branding especially thin. On 26 March 2026, the CJEU drew that boundary by stating that the difference lay in whether a business had been acquired as a whole or whether only the trademark had changed hands (C‑412/24).
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 Fauré Le Page 案中明确，若企业仅受让商标而非整体业务，却在商标中加入暗示悠久历史的年份（如 1717），可能因误导消费者关于商品连续性、技艺及声望而构成欺骗。法院强调，欺骗须涉及商品特征，但在奢侈品领域，声誉形象属于关键特征。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In Case C‑412/24, the Court of Justice of the European Union clarified the boundary between legitimate heritage claims and deceptive branding. The Court ruled that incorporating a historical date, such as '1717,' into a trademark may constitute deception under Article 3(1)(g) of Directive 2008/95/EC if the applicant acquired only the trademark rights rather than the historic undertaking as a whole. In the luxury sector, consumers associate such dates with continuity, specific know-how, and quality. Consequently, implying an unbroken lineage or inherited craftsmanship without factual basis misleads the public regarding essential characteristics of the goods. The judgment emphasizes that while reputation alone is insufficient for deception findings, in luxury markets, the perceived heritage and prestige are intrinsic to the product's identity and consumer perception.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧注册含历史元素的奢侈品商标时，需确保商业实体与历史传承的真实性关联。若仅收购商标而无业务延续，应避免使用暗示悠久历史的年份或描述，以防被认定为欺骗性商标导致无效或被禁。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For brand owners and legal practitioners, this ruling highlights the critical distinction between acquiring intellectual property assets and acquiring a going concern. When registering trademarks containing historical elements, entities must ensure a genuine link to the original enterprise’s continuity. Mere ownership of a mark does not justify claims of centuries-old tradition. Practitioners should conduct thorough due diligence during acquisitions to verify if business operations, not just IP rights, were transferred. Failure to establish this continuity risks invalidation based on deception. Companies must avoid marketing strategies that imply inherited craftsmanship or longevity when such history has been interrupted by dissolution or asset-only transfers.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["仅受让商标未承接整体业务时，标注历史年份易致欺骗", "奢侈品商标的声望形象被视为商品本身的重要特征", "虚构年份暗示技艺传承若无事实依据则违反商标指令"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Acquiring only trademark rights without the underlying business makes using historical dates potentially deceptive.", "In luxury goods, heritage and prestige are considered essential characteristics of the products themselves.", "Implying continuity of know-how through historical dates violates trademark law if no factual basis exists."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["收购旧品牌商标时需核实是否包含整体业务资产", "避免在无实际传承时使用历史年份营销以防法律风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Verify whether trademark acquisitions include the historic business entity to support heritage claims legally.", "Practice note: Avoid using historical dates in marks if the original undertaking was dissolved and only IP rights were transferred.", "What to monitor: Monitor national court applications of this CJEU precedent regarding deceptive heritage claims in luxury sectors."]
core_points_en: Acquiring only trademark rights without the underlying business makes using historical dates potentially deceptive.
In luxury goods, heritage and prestige are considered essential characteristics of the products themselves.
Implying continuity of know-how through historical dates violates trademark law if no factual basis exists.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Verify whether trademark acquisitions include the historic business entity to support heritage claims legally.
Practice note: Avoid using historical dates in marks if the original undertaking was dissolved and only IP rights were transferred.
What to monitor: Monitor national court applications of this CJEU precedent regarding deceptive heritage claims in luxury sectors.

news_items.title: Filing in DOCX now available for all users - greater flexibility and smoother workflows
news_items.title_zh: EPO 向所有用户开放 DOCX 格式提交以提升灵活性
news_items.title_en: EPO Opens DOCX Filing to All Users for Greater Flexibility and Smoother Workflows
news_items.summary: The new filing format builds on the EPO’s digital transformation, offering a more consistent and future-ready way to submit patent applications and other documents.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布在完成试点后，正式向所有用户开放使用 DOCX 格式提交欧洲专利申请及后续文件。此举旨在深化数字化转型，允许绘图嵌入文档或单独上传，减少格式转换错误与人工校对时间。该更新已纳入局长决定，支持与 MyEPO 等现代工具无缝对接，实现端到端数字化处理。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has officially rolled out the option to file European patent applications and subsequent documents using the DOCX format to all users, following a successful pilot phase. This initiative supports the EPO’s digital transformation strategy and Strategic Plan 2028 by enabling a fully digital, end-to-end granting process. Applicants may now embed drawings directly within DOCX files or submit them separately as PDFs, offering enhanced operational flexibility. The update aligns with recent decisions by the President of the EPO regarding electronic filing. By adopting DOCX, the EPO aims to reduce formatting errors, minimize manual checks, and improve data quality throughout search, examination, and publication stages. This move facilitates smoother workflows and greater consistency, helping parties save time and avoid issues such as broken numbering or corrupted characters associated with traditional PDF conversions.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Adopting the DOCX format offers practical advantages for patent portfolios operating before the EPO. Native DOCX filing reduces risks of character corruption, layout shifts, and broken references often encountered during PDF conversion. This stability minimizes formal objections and streamlines the handling of amendments, potentially accelerating grant timelines. Teams should evaluate internal document preparation systems to support native DOCX creation, ensuring special characters and formulae are preserved accurately. Integrating this format early allows for better compatibility with future EPO digital tools and MyEPO services. Proactive adaptation helps maintain high text and data quality, reducing administrative burdens and communication costs with representatives during prosecution.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 全面推广 DOCX 格式，支持专利申请及后续文件提交", "绘图可嵌入 DOCX 或单独以 PDF 提交，提升操作灵活性", "减少格式错误与重复转换，显著优化审查与修改流程效率"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["EPO fully promotes DOCX format for submitting patent applications and subsequent documents to enhance digital processing efficiency.", "Drawings can be embedded directly in DOCX or filed separately as PDFs, significantly improving submission flexibility for applicants.", "Reducing format errors and repeated conversions optimizes examination and amendment procedures, leading to significant time savings."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["立即调整申请文件制作流程，优先采用原生 DOCX 格式", "利用格式优势减少补正通知，加快欧洲专利授权进程"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Adopting native DOCX filing reduces formal defects and formatting errors, improving first-time acceptance rates and lowering prosecution costs.", "Practice note: Update internal drafting systems to generate stable DOCX files, avoiding manual PDF conversions that risk corrupting text or layout.", "What to monitor: Review the updated Notice from the EPO and the modified definition of DOCX to ensure compliance with new filing options and technical requirements."]
core_points_en: EPO fully promotes DOCX format for submitting patent applications and subsequent documents to enhance digital processing efficiency.
Drawings can be embedded directly in DOCX or filed separately as PDFs, significantly improving submission flexibility for applicants.
Reducing format errors and repeated conversions optimizes examination and amendment procedures, leading to significant time savings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Adopting native DOCX filing reduces formal defects and formatting errors, improving first-time acceptance rates and lowering prosecution costs.
Practice note: Update internal drafting systems to generate stable DOCX files, avoiding manual PDF conversions that risk corrupting text or layout.
What to monitor: Review the updated Notice from the EPO and the modified definition of DOCX to ensure compliance with new filing options and technical requirements.

news_items.title: The Unitary Patent Guidelines April 2026 update
news_items.title_zh: 2026年4月统一专利指南更新生效
news_items.title_en: UPC Unitary Patent Guidelines Update: Key Procedural and Legal Clarity Enhancements Effective April 2026
news_items.summary: Updated 2026 Unitary Patent Guidelines take effect 1 April, enhancing clarity, procedures, and legal detail across the UPC system.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）运行近三年后，统一专利（UP）指南迎来修订，新版于2026年4月1日生效。此次更新旨在提升UPC系统的清晰度、程序规范及法律细节。欧洲专利局（EPO）已发布标注修改痕迹的2026版指南，对比2025版进行了广泛调整。随着对UP系统及UPC信心的增强，新规在适当位置增加了更多程序与法律依据的细节，以优化用户体验并明确操作标准。
news_items.ai_summary_en: Following nearly three years of Unified Patent Court operations, the updated Unitary Patent Guidelines take effect on 1 April 2026. These amendments significantly enhance procedural clarity, legal precision, and operational detail across the UPC system. The European Patent Office has published a marked-up version comparing the 2026 guidelines against the 2025 edition, highlighting widespread adjustments in almost every section. As confidence in the unitary patent system grows, these refinements provide essential legal bases and detailed procedural instructions. This update aims to optimize user experience by establishing clearer operational standards, ensuring that current and future stakeholders can navigate the UPC framework with greater certainty and reduced ambiguity regarding compliance and litigation procedures.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders should closely examine the refined procedural rules within the new guidelines to ensure strict compliance with UPC requirements. Utilizing the EPO's comparative documentation allows for rapid identification of critical changes affecting ongoing matters. It is advisable to reassess European patent portfolio strategies and litigation approaches to align with these updated standards. Proactive adaptation helps mitigate procedural risks associated with non-compliance and enhances overall enforcement efficiency. By integrating these clarified procedures into existing IP management workflows, organizations can better safeguard their rights and streamline interactions with the Unified Patent Court system.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年4月1日起，新版统一专利指南正式生效实施", "全面修订指南内容，重点增强程序清晰度与法律依据细节", "欧洲专利局提供新旧版本对比文档，便于用户追踪具体变更"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The revised Unitary Patent Guidelines officially enter into force on 1 April 2026, marking a significant evolution in UPC procedural frameworks.", "Comprehensive revisions focus heavily on enhancing procedural clarity and providing detailed legal bases for various court actions.", "The European Patent Office provides a marked-up comparison document to help users efficiently track specific changes from the 2025 version."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["研读EPO对比文档，精准掌握UPC程序合规新要求", "优化欧洲专利组合管理，规避因程序疏漏导致的维权风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Review EPO comparison documents to precisely understand new UPC procedural compliance requirements and adjust ongoing case strategies accordingly.", "Practice note: Optimize European patent portfolio management processes to avoid enforcement risks stemming from procedural oversights under the updated guidelines.", "What to monitor: Track further administrative interpretations or practical applications of the new guidelines as they are implemented by UPC registries."]
core_points_en: The revised Unitary Patent Guidelines officially enter into force on 1 April 2026, marking a significant evolution in UPC procedural frameworks.
Comprehensive revisions focus heavily on enhancing procedural clarity and providing detailed legal bases for various court actions.
The European Patent Office provides a marked-up comparison document to help users efficiently track specific changes from the 2025 version.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Review EPO comparison documents to precisely understand new UPC procedural compliance requirements and adjust ongoing case strategies accordingly.
Practice note: Optimize European patent portfolio management processes to avoid enforcement risks stemming from procedural oversights under the updated guidelines.
What to monitor: Track further administrative interpretations or practical applications of the new guidelines as they are implemented by UPC registries.

news_items.title: Rapport annuel 2025
news_items.title_zh: 法国国家工业产权局 2025 年度报告
news_items.title_en: INPI 2025 Annual Report: Strategic Roadmap Launch and Key Intellectual Property Data
news_items.summary: Rapport annuel 2025 sgurtler@inpi.fr 31 mars 2026 L’année 2025 a été marquée par le lancement d’une nouvelle feuille de route stratégique pour l’INPI. Élément structurant pour l’Institut, le COP 2025-2029 fixe des ambitions fortes et s'inscrit dans la volonté d’apporter toujours plus de services répondant aux besoins des entrepreneurs et des innovateurs, pour contribuer à la croissance de la France. Découvrez dans ce rapport le bilan des premières actions engagées par l’Institut, tant en matière
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）发布 2025 年度报告，标志着其 2025-2029 年战略规划合同（COP）的启动。报告总结了机构在企业手续与知识产权保护方面的首批行动成果，披露了单一窗口及专利、商标等申请的关键数据。报告强调通过支持创新者需求、提升无形资产价值来推动法国经济增长，展现了机构的韧性与服务能力。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) has released its 2025 Annual Report, marking the commencement of its new strategic roadmap for 2025-2029. This management contract establishes ambitious goals aimed at enhancing services for entrepreneurs and innovators to support France's economic growth. The report details the initial outcomes of institutional actions regarding business formalities and intellectual property protection. It provides key statistics on filings through the single window mechanism, including patents, trademarks, and designs. Furthermore, it highlights international initiatives and the institute's commitment to supporting innovation stages. The document underscores INPI's resilience and performance, emphasizing the valuation of intangible assets and improved service delivery to meet evolving market needs effectively.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注法国 IP 政策新动向，利用其强化的服务体系优化在法布局。建议参考报告数据评估市场热度，积极利用单一窗口机制提升确权效率，并重视无形资产运营以契合当地创新支持导向。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders operating within the French jurisdiction should closely examine the updated strategic priorities outlined in the INPI report. The reinforced service framework offers opportunities to optimize local intellectual property strategies through enhanced procedural efficiency. Companies are advised to utilize the single window mechanism to streamline registration processes and improve asset management capabilities. Monitoring these developments allows for better alignment with national innovation support policies. Understanding the reported trends in filing volumes and processing times can inform resource allocation and competitive positioning within the European market context.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["启动 2025-2029 战略规划合同，确立服务创新者新目标", "披露年度专利申请、商标注册及企业手续办理关键数据", "强调通过无形资产估值与支持创新助力法国经济增长"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Launch of the 2025-2029 strategic management contract establishing new service objectives for innovators and businesses.", "Disclosure of annual key data covering patent applications, trademark registrations, and essential business administrative procedures.", "Emphasis on leveraging intangible asset valuation and innovation support mechanisms to drive broader French economic expansion."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注法国新政导向，优化在法知识产权战略布局", "利用单一窗口机制，提升确权效率与资产运营能力"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Align corporate IP strategies with INPI's renewed focus on service efficiency and intangible asset valorization to enhance market competitiveness in France.", "Practice note: Leverage the single window mechanism to streamline business formalities and accelerate intellectual property rights acquisition processes.", "What to monitor: Track annual filing statistics and procedural updates to assess market activity levels and adjust operational workflows accordingly."]
core_points_en: Launch of the 2025-2029 strategic management contract establishing new service objectives for innovators and businesses.
Disclosure of annual key data covering patent applications, trademark registrations, and essential business administrative procedures.
Emphasis on leveraging intangible asset valuation and innovation support mechanisms to drive broader French economic expansion.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Align corporate IP strategies with INPI's renewed focus on service efficiency and intangible asset valorization to enhance market competitiveness in France.
Practice note: Leverage the single window mechanism to streamline business formalities and accelerate intellectual property rights acquisition processes.
What to monitor: Track annual filing statistics and procedural updates to assess market activity levels and adjust operational workflows accordingly.

news_items.title: Forum européen de la propriété intellectuelle (FEPI) 2026
news_items.title_zh: 2026 年欧洲知识产权论坛：全球反假冒斗争的核心
news_items.title_en: 2026 European IP Forum: Geopolitics, Legislation, and Technology Shaping Anti-Counterfeiting Efforts
news_items.summary: Forum européen de la propriété intellectuelle (FEPI) 2026 sgurtler@inpi.fr 30 mars 2026 Le FEPI au cœur de la lutte mondiale anti-contrefaçon Organisé par l’Unifab autour du thème « Géopolitique, législations, technologies… et même vocabulaire ! Quelles nouvelles influences sur la propriété intellectuelle ? », le forum, devenu au fil des ans incontournable et reconnu à l’échelle internationale, a une nouvelle fois réuni des intervenants de renom devant un parterre de dirigeants de PME et de prof
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 由 Unifab 组织的 2026 年欧洲知识产权论坛在巴黎举行，聚焦地缘政治、立法及技术对知识产权的新影响。法国工业产权局（INPI）作为历史合作伙伴参会，总局长 Pascal Faure 强调需协助企业将无形资产保护纳入发展战略，以培育欧洲冠军企业，并探讨了优化知识产权获取路径的潜在改革方向。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The 2026 European Intellectual Property Forum (FEPI), organized by UNIFAB in Paris, convened global experts to examine how geopolitical shifts, legislative changes, and technological advancements influence intellectual property rights. The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI), a longstanding partner, participated with Director General Pascal Faure emphasizing the critical need for companies to integrate intangible asset protection into their core development strategies. This integration is vital for fostering competitive French and European champions. The forum featured seven panel discussions addressing international anti-counterfeiting challenges and innovation protection practices. Faure also highlighted ongoing efforts to streamline access to IP systems, reinforcing the institutional commitment to supporting businesses in navigating complex regulatory landscapes while enhancing the strategic value of their intellectual property portfolios.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders should closely monitor evolving European anti-counterfeiting policies influenced by current geopolitical tensions, as these shifts may impact cross-border compliance requirements. Leveraging official partnerships with institutions like INPI can provide valuable resources for strengthening overseas IP asset protection and risk management. Companies operating in or exporting to Europe should proactively align their IP strategies with these developments to mitigate infringement risks and ensure robust legal safeguards for their intangible assets in key markets.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["论坛汇聚全球专家研讨地缘政治与科技对打假的影响", "INPI 重申支持企业将 IP 保护融入核心发展战略", "多方探讨通过立法与技术手段强化创新保护实践"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Global experts analyzed how geopolitical dynamics and emerging technologies are reshaping international anti-counterfeiting strategies and enforcement mechanisms.", "INPI reaffirmed its support for enterprises to embed intellectual property protection within core business strategies to strengthen market competitiveness.", "Participants explored legislative reforms and technological tools designed to enhance innovation protection and facilitate easier access to IP rights."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["紧跟欧洲反假冒政策演变，优化出口合规策略", "借力官方合作渠道，提升海外 IP 资产保护能级"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor evolving European anti-counterfeiting policies driven by geopolitical factors to optimize export compliance strategies.", "Practice note: Leverage official cooperation channels with bodies like INPI to enhance the strategic protection of overseas IP assets.", "What to monitor: Legislative and technological trends discussed at FEPI that may simplify IP access or alter enforcement standards."]
core_points_en: Global experts analyzed how geopolitical dynamics and emerging technologies are reshaping international anti-counterfeiting strategies and enforcement mechanisms.
INPI reaffirmed its support for enterprises to embed intellectual property protection within core business strategies to strengthen market competitiveness.
Participants explored legislative reforms and technological tools designed to enhance innovation protection and facilitate easier access to IP rights.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor evolving European anti-counterfeiting policies driven by geopolitical factors to optimize export compliance strategies.
Practice note: Leverage official cooperation channels with bodies like INPI to enhance the strategic protection of overseas IP assets.
What to monitor: Legislative and technological trends discussed at FEPI that may simplify IP access or alter enforcement standards.

news_items.title: Post-transaction Reselection Of A Payment Method: Non-technical
news_items.title_zh: 交易后重选支付方式被认定为非技术性特征
news_items.title_en: EPO Rules Post-Transaction Payment Method Reselection Non-Technical
news_items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method and system for reversing a payment method selection after a transaction has already been processed using a consolidated payment device associated...
news_items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 技术上诉委员会在 T 1327/22 号案件中裁定，利用整合支付设备在交易完成后撤销原支付方式并启用新方式，本质上属于金融安排而非技术贡献。若权利要求未限定超出通用计算机系统的具体技术实现手段，仅定义此类非技术需求不足以确立创造性，该特征在 inventive step 评估中不予考虑。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1327/22, the EPO Technical Board of Appeal determined that reversing a payment method selection after transaction completion constitutes a financial arrangement rather than a technical contribution. The invention involved using a consolidated payment device to cancel an initial payment and authorize a second one. The Board held that defining such non-technical requirements without specifying technical implementation details beyond standard computer systems fails to establish inventive step. Consequently, this feature was excluded from the assessment of patentability under the problem-solution approach.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请涉及金融科技或支付流程的软专利时，应避免仅描述商业逻辑。必须将方案锚定于具体的技术架构改进或数据处理流程，明确区别于通用计算机的标准功能，以符合 EPO 对技术性的严格要求，降低被驳回风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For applicants in fintech and digital payments, purely commercial logic or business rules are insufficient for European patent protection. Claims must be anchored in concrete technical architecture improvements or specific data processing workflows. It is critical to clearly distinguish proprietary technical solutions from standard functions of generic computer systems. This approach ensures compliance with the EPO’s strict technicality requirements, thereby reducing the risk of rejection during examination and strengthening the validity of granted patents in the European market.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["交易后退款并重充属金融安排，不构成技术贡献", "未限定具体技术实现的非技术需求无法确立创造性", "EPO 上诉委强调软件专利需具备实质技术实施手段"]

news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Fintech applicants must anchor claims in technical architecture rather than pure business logic.", "Practice note: Clearly differentiate proprietary technical implementations from standard generic computing functions.", "What to monitor: EPO scrutiny regarding the technical character of payment processing methods and software features."]

Non-technical requirements without specific technical implementations cannot support an inventive step.
EPO emphasizes that software patents require substantive technical implementation measures.

news_items.title: Successful conclusion of second convergence of practice cycle
news_items.title_zh: EPO 成功完成第二轮专利审查实践趋同周期
news_items.title_en: EPO Concludes Second Practice Convergence Cycle with New Guidelines on Broad Claims and Double Patenting
news_items.summary: The EPO has completed the second Convergence of Practice cycle with new common practices on Broad Claims and Double Patenting, strengthening alignment and legal certainty across the patent network.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布完成第二轮“实践趋同”计划，正式采纳关于“宽泛权利要求”和“重复专利”的共同实践准则。此举旨在统一欧洲专利网络内的审查标准，减少各国差异，提升法律确定性。新规则明确了过度宽泛权利要求的处理框架及重复专利异议的信息披露要求，为申请人提供更可预测的审查环境。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has successfully completed the second cycle of its Convergence of Practice programme, adopting new common practices regarding broad claims and double patenting. This initiative, a cornerstone of the Strategic Plan 2028, aims to strengthen alignment across the European Patent Network and reduce divergences among national offices. The new framework provides clear procedural options for handling overly broad claims during the search phase and clarifies the information examiners must include when issuing double patenting objections. By promoting consistent practices, the EPO enhances legal certainty for users and improves synergies between first and second filing procedures. These developments result from close cooperation between the EPO, national patent offices, user associations, and WIPO, ensuring a more predictable and harmonized approach for applicants across all EPC contracting states.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需关注审查标准趋同，避免因权利要求过宽或重复布局被驳回。建议提前研判新指南，优化撰写策略以适配统一审查口径，降低合规风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: The adoption of these common practices significantly impacts prosecution strategy within the European Patent Network. Applicants should anticipate stricter scrutiny of claim scope during the search phase and ensure robust differentiation in cases involving multiple filings. Understanding the clarified standards for double patenting objections allows for more effective responses and proactive portfolio management. As national offices implement these guidelines, consistency in examination outcomes is expected to improve, reducing the risk of unexpected rejections due to procedural divergences. Stakeholders should review current drafting protocols to align with the new definitions of overly broad claims and prepare for upcoming changes related to divisional applications and internet disclosures.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 采纳宽泛权利要求与重复专利两项共同实践准则", "新框架旨在统一审查标准，增强欧洲专利网络法律确定性", "第三轮工作已启动，聚焦分案申请与互联网披露议题"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO adopted new common practices addressing broad claims and double patenting, concluding the second convergence cycle.", "New guidelines establish a framework for handling overly broad claims and clarify examiner obligations for double patenting objections.", "The third work cycle has commenced, focusing on divisional applications and internet disclosures to further harmonize practices."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注宽泛权利要求新界定，优化专利撰写以避免审查障碍", "利用趋同红利预判审查走向，提升在欧洲各国的获权效率"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced legal certainty reduces unpredictability in grant rates and streamlines cross-border patent enforcement strategies.", "Practice note: Review claim drafting protocols to address the new framework for overly broad claims and ensure clear differentiation in multi-filing scenarios.", "What to monitor: Implementation progress via the Convergence Dashboard and emerging guidelines on divisional applications and internet disclosures."]
core_points_en: The EPO adopted new common practices addressing broad claims and double patenting, concluding the second convergence cycle.
New guidelines establish a framework for handling overly broad claims and clarify examiner obligations for double patenting objections.
The third work cycle has commenced, focusing on divisional applications and internet disclosures to further harmonize practices.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced legal certainty reduces unpredictability in grant rates and streamlines cross-border patent enforcement strategies.
Practice note: Review claim drafting protocols to address the new framework for overly broad claims and ensure clear differentiation in multi-filing scenarios.
What to monitor: Implementation progress via the Convergence Dashboard and emerging guidelines on divisional applications and internet disclosures.

news_items.title: Results of EQE paper F 2026 available
news_items.title_zh: 2026 年欧洲专利代理人资格考试 F 卷成绩公布
news_items.title_en: EPO Releases 2026 EQE Paper F Results as Modular Reform Transition Concludes
news_items.summary: Less than two weeks after the European Qualifying Examination (EQE) 2026 session concluded on 12 March 2026, the results of paper F have been distributed to around 650 candidates.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局公布 2026 年 EQE 基础卷（F 卷）成绩，约 650 名考生参试，通过率约 84%。作为考试模块化改革的关键一步，今年首次引入 M1/M2 卷并保留旧制试卷，标志着过渡期顺利完成。全数字化考试提升了效率，新架构旨在增强专利体系的包容性与可持续性，考生可按阶段评估能力并进阶。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has distributed results for the 2026 European Qualifying Examination (EQE) Paper F to approximately 650 candidates. The foundation paper, assessing procedural patent law and claim analysis, achieved a pass rate of roughly 84%, with over 530 successful candidates. This outcome highlights the efficiency of the fully digital examination system introduced in 2021. The 2026 session marked a significant milestone, serving as the final year for legacy papers while introducing new modules M1 and M2. This progressive structural reform aims to enhance quality, accessibility, and sustainability within the European patent system. By allowing candidates to validate foundational skills early, the new modular design supports better pacing and readiness assessment before advancing to complex main modules, ensuring a robust pipeline of qualified professional representatives.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局需关注代理人资质新规，模块化考试可能改变服务供给节奏。建议提前规划专利代理合作，利用早期模块评估潜在合作伙伴能力，确保在欧知识产权事务由具备最新资质的专业人士处理，以应对更严格的执业标准。
news_items.ai_insight_en: The transition to a fully modular EQE structure significantly impacts the supply dynamics of European patent representation services. As the examination framework evolves to emphasize staged competency validation, firms and corporate counsel should consider how these changes affect the availability and specialization of patent attorneys. The new system allows for earlier verification of foundational legal and analytical skills, potentially altering recruitment timelines and service delivery models. Stakeholders must adapt to ensure their external partners possess credentials aligned with the updated regulatory standards, maintaining high-quality representation amidst evolving professional requirements.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["F 卷测试程序法与权利要求分析，超 530 人通过，体现数字化考试高效性", "年为旧制试卷最后一年，M1/M2 首考标志模块化改革过渡成功", "新架构允许考生分阶段参考，2027 年将全面实施全新模块化考试体系"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Paper F tests declarative knowledge of procedural law and claim analysis, achieving an approximate eighty-four percent pass rate among six hundred fifty candidates.", "The 2026 session concluded the transitional phase by offering legacy papers alongside new modules M1 and M2, marking a historic shift in examination structure.", "The reformed modular EQE enables early capability benchmarking, with full implementation of all new modules scheduled for completion in 2027."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注考试改革对欧洲专利代理服务市场供给与专业分工的潜在影响", "建议依据新模块标准筛选代理人，确保其具备分阶段验证的专业能力"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor shifts in patent attorney availability and specialization resulting from the new modular qualification pathway.", "Practice note: Evaluate potential service providers based on their success in the new modular exams to verify foundational and advanced competencies.", "What to monitor: The complete rollout of modules M3 and M4 in 2027 and its impact on professional certification timelines across Europe."]
core_points_en: Paper F tests declarative knowledge of procedural law and claim analysis, achieving an approximate eighty-four percent pass rate among six hundred fifty candidates.
The 2026 session concluded the transitional phase by offering legacy papers alongside new modules M1 and M2, marking a historic shift in examination structure.
The reformed modular EQE enables early capability benchmarking, with full implementation of all new modules scheduled for completion in 2027.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor shifts in patent attorney availability and specialization resulting from the new modular qualification pathway.
Practice note: Evaluate potential service providers based on their success in the new modular exams to verify foundational and advanced competencies.
What to monitor: The complete rollout of modules M3 and M4 in 2027 and its impact on professional certification timelines across Europe.

news_items.title: CD Munich, March 24, 2026, Procedural Order, UPC_CFI_2296/2025
news_items.title_zh: UPC 慕尼黑裁定：初步异议范围穷尽且不含诉讼资格抗辩
news_items.title_en: UPC Munich Confirms Rule 19.1 Preliminary Objections Are Exhaustive and Excludes Standing
news_items.summary: The court confirmed, in line with the Court of Appeal’s decisions in Aylo v. DISH/SLING (UPC_CoA_188/2024) and Roku/Sun (UPC_CoA_288/2025)...
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院慕尼黑中央分部作出程序令，确认规则 19.1 所列初步异议清单具有穷尽性，排除诉讼资格缺失或既判力等实体抗辩。法院指出此类问题需经事实评估，不属“明显”不可受理情形，应合并审理以提升程序效率，避免单独听证。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Central Division in Munich issued a procedural order confirming that the list of preliminary objections under Rule 19.1 of the Rules of Procedure is exhaustive. The court held that this rule strictly limits preliminary challenges to issues of jurisdiction, divisional competence, and language. Defenses such as lack of standing or res judicata are substantive matters that cannot be raised as preliminary objections. Consequently, the defendant’s attempt to challenge the claimant’s standing and the effect of a prior national decision was rejected at this stage. The court emphasized that these issues require factual assessment and do not meet the 'manifest' inadmissibility threshold for anticipatory orders. To ensure procedural efficiency, the court ordered a single hearing on both admissibility and merits, avoiding separate preliminary hearings.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 应诉时，不宜将诉讼资格等实体问题作为初步异议提出，以免被驳回并浪费程序机会。应聚焦管辖权等法定异议点，并准备在实质审理阶段充分举证经济利益关联，以应对资格挑战。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners must strictly distinguish between procedural admissibility and substantive validity when formulating defense strategies before the UPC. Attempting to raise substantive issues like standing or res judicata as preliminary objections under Rule 19.1 will likely result in dismissal. Instead, parties should focus preliminary efforts on jurisdictional grounds. For standing challenges, it is critical to prepare comprehensive evidence regarding economic interests and corporate structures early in the proceedings. This ensures robust arguments are ready for the main merits hearing, where such substantive defenses are properly evaluated, thereby avoiding procedural delays and wasted resources.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["规则 19.1 初步异议仅限管辖权、分庭能力及语言，不得扩展至实体抗辩", "诉讼资格与既判力涉及事实审查，不符合规则 361/362 条“明显”不可受理标准", "基于程序经济原则，法院拒绝就可受理性举行单独听证，主张合并审理"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 19.1 preliminary objections are limited strictly to jurisdiction, divisional competence, and language, excluding substantive defenses like standing.", "Lack of standing and res judicata require factual evidence review, failing the 'manifest' inadmissibility standard for Rules 361 and 362.", "Procedural economy favors a combined hearing on admissibility and merits rather than separate preliminary hearings on standing issues."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["初步异议策略需严格限定于管辖权等法定事由，避免混同实体抗辩", "针对诉讼资格质疑，应提前梳理子公司股权链条及经济利益证据以备实质审理"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties should avoid raising substantive defenses like standing as preliminary objections to prevent procedural rejection and delay.", "Practice note: Prepare detailed evidence on corporate links and economic interest early to address standing challenges during the merits phase.", "What to monitor: Monitor upcoming Court of Appeal decisions on res judicata to refine strategies for future consolidated hearings."]
core_points_en: Rule 19.1 preliminary objections are limited strictly to jurisdiction, divisional competence, and language, excluding substantive defenses like standing.
Lack of standing and res judicata require factual evidence review, failing the 'manifest' inadmissibility standard for Rules 361 and 362.
Procedural economy favors a combined hearing on admissibility and merits rather than separate preliminary hearings on standing issues.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties should avoid raising substantive defenses like standing as preliminary objections to prevent procedural rejection and delay.
Practice note: Prepare detailed evidence on corporate links and economic interest early to address standing challenges during the merits phase.
What to monitor: Monitor upcoming Court of Appeal decisions on res judicata to refine strategies for future consolidated hearings.

news_items.title: UPC: Litigation Insurance Relevant to Security for Costs – Syntorr v Arthrex | EIP
news_items.title_zh: UPC 上诉院：诉讼保险应纳入费用担保考量
news_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Litigation Insurance Must Be Considered in Security for Costs Decisions
news_items.summary: The UPC Court of Appeal holds that litigation insurance must be considered when deciding whether to order security for costs, overturning the Munich Local Division.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院在 Syntorr 诉 Arthrex 案中推翻慕尼黑地方分院裁定，确立诉讼保险政策是决定是否命令提供费用担保时必须考虑的因素。法院指出，虽然规则未直接将保险列为担保形式，但在评估原告财务状况及被告成本回收风险时，必须将保险作为自由裁量的重要依据，修正了此前仅接受存款或银行担保的狭隘观点。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal has overturned a Munich Local Division ruling, establishing that litigation insurance policies are a relevant factor when determining whether to order security for costs. In Syntorr v Arthrex, the Local Division had ordered €2 million in security via deposit or bank guarantee, excluding insurance as a valid form under Rule 158.1 RoP. The Court of Appeal clarified that while Rule 158.1 specifies deposit or bank guarantee for the actual provision of security if awarded, the initial discretionary decision under Article 69(4) UPCA requires assessing the claimant’s financial position and the risk of cost recovery. Consequently, the existence of litigation insurance must be considered when evaluating whether there is a legitimate concern regarding the enforceability of a potential costs order, correcting the previous narrow interpretation.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧涉诉时应积极利用诉讼保险降低被责令高额现金担保的风险。需提前规划保险方案，将其作为应对对方费用担保申请的核心抗辩理由，优化资金流动性并提升诉讼防御能力。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This judgment significantly impacts litigation strategy before the Unified Patent Court by broadening the scope of factors considered in security for costs applications. Parties facing such requests can now leverage existing litigation insurance policies to demonstrate sufficient financial backing, potentially avoiding burdensome cash deposits or bank guarantees that strain liquidity. Legal teams should proactively integrate insurance coverage details into their responses to security applications. This approach not only mitigates immediate financial pressure but also strengthens the overall defense posture by addressing the court's concerns about cost recoverability through documented insurance mechanisms rather than solely relying on corporate balance sheets.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉院认定诉讼保险是评估费用担保必要性的关键因素", "推翻慕尼黑分院拒绝将保险纳入考量的原审裁定", "明确法院在行使自由裁量权时需综合评估财务风险"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court of Appeal ruled that litigation insurance is a key factor in assessing the necessity of ordering security for costs.", "It overturned the Munich Local Division's decision which previously excluded insurance from consideration in such assessments.", "Courts must comprehensively evaluate financial risks and cost recovery likelihood when exercising discretion under Article 69(4)."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用诉讼保险抗辩高额费用担保请求，缓解资金压力", "提前布局保险策略，增强在 UPC 诉讼中的财务防御力"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Use litigation insurance to counter high security for costs demands, preserving operational cash flow during proceedings.", "Practice note: Proactively structure insurance coverage to serve as primary evidence of financial reliability in UPC cost disputes.", "What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions clarifying the weight given to insurance versus traditional security forms."]
core_points_en: The Court of Appeal ruled that litigation insurance is a key factor in assessing the necessity of ordering security for costs.
It overturned the Munich Local Division's decision which previously excluded insurance from consideration in such assessments.
Courts must comprehensively evaluate financial risks and cost recovery likelihood when exercising discretion under Article 69(4).
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Use litigation insurance to counter high security for costs demands, preserving operational cash flow during proceedings.
Practice note: Proactively structure insurance coverage to serve as primary evidence of financial reliability in UPC cost disputes.
What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions clarifying the weight given to insurance versus traditional security forms.

news_items.title: Wanneer wordt een bewegingsmerk geweigerd wegens technische functionaliteit?
news_items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定：纯技术功能动态商标将被驳回
news_items.title_en: EU General Court Rejects Motion Mark for Hinged Window Due to Technical Functionality
news_items.summary: In January 2026, the General Court of the EU refused the application for a motion mark of a hinged window. The General Court considers that the movement consists only of a technical functional process.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 1 月，欧盟普通法院维持 EUIPO 决定，驳回德国 Kct 公司关于折叠窗开合动画的动态商标注册申请。法院认定该运动序列仅由技术功能过程组成，缺乏显著性且属于《欧盟商标条例》禁止注册的技术解决方案范畴，旨在防止通过商标权无限期垄断技术特征。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In January 2026, the General Court of the European Union upheld the EUIPO’s decision to refuse registration of a motion mark filed by German company Kct GmbH & Co. The application depicted an animation of a hinged window opening and closing. The Court determined that this movement sequence consisted exclusively of technical functional processes, thereby lacking inherent distinctiveness. Crucially, the mark fell within the scope of Article 7(1)(e)(ii) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation, which prohibits the registration of signs consisting solely of shapes or characteristics necessary to obtain a technical result. This legal provision aims to prevent companies from securing indefinite monopolies on technical solutions through trademark law, effectively extending the protection period beyond that of patents. Consequently, the Court confirmed that such purely functional animations cannot be registered as trademarks.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Applicants seeking to register motion marks in the EU must ensure their submissions transcend mere descriptions of technical mechanisms. Purely functional animations depicting standard operational movements are likely to face refusal based on technical functionality grounds. To enhance distinctiveness and mitigate rejection risks, it is advisable to incorporate unique, non-functional visual elements into the design. These may include specific color combinations, artistic stylizations, or distinctive deformations that do not serve a technical purpose. By integrating such aesthetic features, brands can better demonstrate that the mark serves as an indicator of origin rather than just a technical process, aligning with current judicial interpretations regarding the separation of function and brand identity.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["动态商标若仅展示产品技术运作过程，将被视为缺乏显著性", "欧盟法律禁止注册仅为获取技术结果所必需的形状或特征", "法院强调需区分功能性要素与装饰性要素以判定可注册性"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Motion marks displaying only product technical operations are deemed to lack distinctiveness under EU trademark law.", "EU legislation explicitly bans registering shapes or features strictly necessary to achieve a specific technical result.", "Courts emphasize distinguishing between functional elements and decorative aspects when assessing registrability."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免申请仅描述产品技术运作流程的纯功能性动态商标", "在设计中增加非功能性装饰元素以提升商标显著特征"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid filing motion marks that merely describe standard product technical workflows to prevent automatic rejection.", "Practice note: Integrate non-functional decorative elements into animation designs to strengthen trademark distinctiveness.", "What to monitor: Judicial trends in distinguishing technical functionality from aesthetic branding in motion mark cases."]
core_points_en: Motion marks displaying only product technical operations are deemed to lack distinctiveness under EU trademark law.
EU legislation explicitly bans registering shapes or features strictly necessary to achieve a specific technical result.
Courts emphasize distinguishing between functional elements and decorative aspects when assessing registrability.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid filing motion marks that merely describe standard product technical workflows to prevent automatic rejection.
Practice note: Integrate non-functional decorative elements into animation designs to strengthen trademark distinctiveness.
What to monitor: Judicial trends in distinguishing technical functionality from aesthetic branding in motion mark cases.

news_items.title: 12 minutes with EPO President António Campinos
news_items.title_zh: EPO 主席坎皮诺斯谈欧洲竞争力与创新格局
news_items.title_en: EPO President Campinos: Patent Demand Hits Record, Urges Action on Market Fragmentation
news_items.summary: European Patent Office (EPO) President António Campinos appeared on the Euronews programme “12 Minutes With” to discuss Europe’s competitiveness and innovation landscape. The interview was recorded shortly after the launch of the
news_items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 主席坎皮诺斯在访谈中指出，欧洲专利申请量首破 20 万，但在云计和 AI 领域面临挑战，需发力量子技术。他强调基础研究强劲但商业化转化不足，单一市场碎片化是主要障碍，并支持欧盟简化公司注册及统一规则以提升整体竞争力。
news_items.ai_summary_en: European Patent Office President António Campinos discussed Europe’s innovation landscape in a recent interview, highlighting that annual patent applications exceeded 200,000 for the first time. While acknowledging strong fundamental research, he noted significant challenges in cloud computing and artificial intelligence. Conversely, Europe retains competitive advantages in quantum technology and other emerging sectors. A primary obstacle remains market fragmentation, including disparate national regulations and stock exchanges, which hinders the scaling of innovative companies. Campinos welcomed the European Commission’s proposal to harmonize company registration rules across member states. This initiative aims to simplify administrative processes and strengthen the single market’s cohesion, thereby enhancing overall European competitiveness and facilitating the commercial translation of research advances into viable products.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders should note the strategic shift towards supporting emerging technologies like quantum computing, where Europe holds distinct advantages. The push for regulatory harmonization suggests a favorable environment for streamlining cross-border operations. Companies operating in Europe can leverage simplified registration procedures to accelerate market entry and reduce administrative burdens. However, navigating the remaining complexities of the single market requires careful planning. Monitoring the implementation of these harmonization efforts will be crucial for optimizing commercial strategies and ensuring compliance with evolving EU standards while capitalizing on opportunities in high-growth technological sectors.

news_items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-412/24 Fauré Le Page
news_items.title_zh: 欧盟法院：商标含虚构历史年份可能构成欺骗
news_items.title_en: CJEU: Trademarks with Fictitious Historical Dates May Deceive Consumers
news_items.summary: Luxury leather goods: the inclusion of a number in a trade mark, evoking a fictitious historical heritage, may be deceptive to consumers
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 Fauré Le Page 案中裁定，若商标包含暗示遥远成立年份的数字，从而虚构长期传统与技艺，即便该数字本身不直接描述商品特性，也可能因赋予商品虚假的质量保证与声望形象而被视为具有欺骗性。法院强调，奢侈品质量涵盖其吸引力与声望，成员国法院需结合整体语境评估公众认知。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-412/24, the Court of Justice of the European Union ruled that a trademark containing a number suggesting a distant year of establishment may be deemed deceptive under EU law. This applies even if the number does not directly describe product characteristics, provided it evokes a fictitious long-standing tradition and know-how. Such references can mislead consumers regarding the quality and prestige of luxury goods by creating a false guarantee of heritage. The judgment clarifies that the perceived quality of luxury items includes their allure and prestigious image, not merely physical attributes. Consequently, national courts must assess whether the relevant public is likely to be misled by the implied historical narrative when evaluating the validity of such trademarks in specific contexts.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧注册含历史年份或传统暗示的商标时，须确保事实依据真实，避免虚构传承故事。建议提前开展合规审查，防止因“声望误导”被宣告无效或面临侵权诉讼风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Brand owners registering trademarks with historical dates or traditional narratives in Europe must ensure factual accuracy to avoid invalidity risks. Misleading claims regarding heritage can trigger deception grounds under EU trademark law, particularly for luxury sectors where prestige is a key value driver. Legal teams should conduct thorough due diligence to verify any implied historical continuity before filing. Disputes involving alleged fictitious heritage require careful assessment of consumer perception and the overall impression created by the mark. Proactive compliance reviews are essential to mitigate litigation exposure and protect brand integrity against challenges based on deceptive practices.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["商标中暗示遥远成立年份的数字可被视为对商品质量与声望的误导", "奢侈品的质量属性包含其吸引力与声望形象，不仅限于物理特性", "是否构成欺骗需由成员国法院结合具体语境及相关公众感知综合判定"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Numbers implying distant establishment dates may mislead consumers about product quality and prestige.", "Luxury goods quality encompasses allure and prestigious image, extending beyond mere physical characteristics.", "Deceptiveness requires national courts to evaluate public perception within the specific contextual framework."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["虚构品牌历史年份易被认定为欺骗，需确保时间标识有实证支撑", "奢侈品出海应审慎使用传统、传承等叙事，防范声望误导法律风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Verify factual basis for historical dates to prevent invalidation due to deceptive heritage claims.", "Practice note: Assess consumer perception of prestige and tradition when evaluating trademark registrability and risk.", "What to monitor: National court applications of CJEU guidance on fictitious historical narratives in luxury branding."]
core_points_en: Numbers implying distant establishment dates may mislead consumers about product quality and prestige.
Luxury goods quality encompasses allure and prestigious image, extending beyond mere physical characteristics.
Deceptiveness requires national courts to evaluate public perception within the specific contextual framework.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Verify factual basis for historical dates to prevent invalidation due to deceptive heritage claims.
Practice note: Assess consumer perception of prestige and tradition when evaluating trademark registrability and risk.
What to monitor: National court applications of CJEU guidance on fictitious historical narratives in luxury branding.

news_items.title: The 'Prompter' as Copyright Author? Lessons from Munich
news_items.title_zh: 提示者即作者？慕尼黑法院关于 AI 生成物版权的判决启示
news_items.title_en: Munich Court Rules on AI Prompter Authorship: Generative Output Requires Dominant Human Creative Control
news_items.summary: For the first time, a German court has addressed the "Prompter's" claim to authorship in the output. The District Court of Munich (AG München, Judgment of Feb 13, 2026 – 142 C 9786/25) offers a foundational blueprint for determining when the human-machine prompt crosses the threshold of copyright protection when it comes to the output. The Case
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地方法院首次裁定，用户仅通过迭代提示词生成的 AI 图像不构成作品。法院认为，若提示词过于宽泛或仅做微调，实际创作决策由机器完成，无法体现人类个性。只有当提示词中的创意元素主导输出时，才受版权保护。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The District Court of Munich has issued a landmark judgment addressing whether users who generate images via iterative prompting qualify as copyright authors. The court dismissed the plaintiff’s infringement claim regarding three logos created using a text-to-image AI system. It held that extensive but generally formulated instructions do not constitute personal intellectual creation under German copyright law. Protection requires that the human prompt objectively defines the output, ensuring the AI acts merely as a tool rather than an independent creator. Since the prompts allowed significant machine randomness and did not dominate the final design decisions, the images lacked the necessary reflection of human personality. This ruling establishes a high threshold for copyright subsistence in AI-generated works.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧使用 AI 生成内容时，需保留详细创作日志，证明提示词对最终成果具有决定性控制。避免依赖简单指令，应深度介入参数调整与具体设计表达，以满足欧盟版权法对“人类智力创造”的严格要求。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For entities operating within the EU, this judgment clarifies that generic prompting strategies will likely fail to secure copyright protection for AI-generated assets. Rights holders must demonstrate that their input dictates the specific expressive elements of the final work, effectively overriding algorithmic randomness. Legal teams should advise clients to maintain detailed records of the iterative prompting process, including specific parameter adjustments and design directives. This documentation is crucial to prove that the human contribution dominates the output, satisfying the requirement for identifiable human intent and objective definition under current European copyright standards.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["AI 须为工具而非独立创作者，人类需掌控核心设计决策", "宽泛指令与结果选择不足以构成个人智力创作", "提示词必须客观定义输出，排除机器随机性主导"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["AI systems must function strictly as tools; humans must retain control over core design decisions to establish authorship.", "Broad instructions and mere selection from multiple outputs are insufficient to demonstrate personal intellectual creation.", "Prompts must objectively define the specific output to exclude machine randomness and ensure human creative dominance."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["保留全流程提示记录以证明人类创意主导地位", "避免宽泛指令，需深度介入具体设计表达细节"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Establish robust documentation protocols for AI generation processes to evidence human creative dominance in potential disputes.", "Practice note: Avoid vague or open-ended prompts; instead, implement detailed, specific instructions that tightly control design outcomes.", "What to monitor: Future CJEU guidance on the intersection of AI autonomy and the 'author's own intellectual creation' standard."]
core_points_en: AI systems must function strictly as tools; humans must retain control over core design decisions to establish authorship.
Broad instructions and mere selection from multiple outputs are insufficient to demonstrate personal intellectual creation.
Prompts must objectively define the specific output to exclude machine randomness and ensure human creative dominance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Establish robust documentation protocols for AI generation processes to evidence human creative dominance in potential disputes.
Practice note: Avoid vague or open-ended prompts; instead, implement detailed, specific instructions that tightly control design outcomes.
What to monitor: Future CJEU guidance on the intersection of AI autonomy and the 'author's own intellectual creation' standard.

news_items.title: Düsseldorf LD, March 18, 2026, Decision On Infringement Action And Counterclaim For Revocation, UPC_CFI_135/2024, UPC_CFI_477/2024
news_items.title_zh: UPC 杜塞尔多夫分院就 Dolby 诉 Beko 案作出侵权与无效反诉判决
news_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Dominant Position in FRAND and Implementer Willingness in Dolby v Beko
news_items.summary: The Düsseldorf Local Division held that a dominant position within the meaning of Article 102 TFEU may arise if smart TVs complying with a common standard...
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方法院在 Dolby 诉 Beko 案中裁定，若符合标准的智能电视无许可无法上市，专利权人可能拥有市场支配地位。法院强调，若实施者未在 FRAND 谈判初期表明许可意愿，则无需审查专利权人报价是否合规。该判决遵循华为诉中兴案框架，并与曼海姆分院立场保持一致。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Düsseldorf Local Division ruled that a dominant position under Article 102 TFEU may exist if standard-compliant smart TVs cannot be marketed without a license for the patent-in-suit. The court emphasized that consumer expectations regarding common audio and video codecs are decisive. Furthermore, the judgment clarifies that if an implementer fails to demonstrate willingness to conclude a license during the initial stages of FRAND negotiations, the patentee’s offer need not be examined for compliance. This decision aligns with the Huawei v ZTE framework and maintains consistency with the Mannheim Local Division’s approach in Panasonic v Oppo, reinforcing procedural strictness in FRAND defense strategies.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧出口智能电视等标准产品时，须在收到侵权通知后立即明确表达许可意愿，否则将丧失 FRAND 抗辩机会。建议提前建立标准化应对流程，避免因程序瑕疵导致败诉风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Implementers of standard-essential patents must explicitly express willingness to negotiate a license immediately upon receiving an infringement notice. Failure to do so at the preliminary stage precludes further review of the patentee’s licensing terms, effectively waiving FRAND defenses. Companies should establish standardized internal protocols to ensure timely, written responses to infringement claims. Proactive risk assessment and prepared negotiation strategies are essential to avoid procedural defaults that could lead to unfavorable injunctions or damages in European jurisdictions.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["标准合规电视若无许可无法销售，专利权人或具市场支配地位", "实施者未表许可意愿时，无需审查专利权人报价是否符合 FRAND", "判决遵循华为诉中兴框架，确认 UPC 内部裁判标准一致性"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Dominant position may arise if standard-compliant smart TVs cannot realistically be marketed without the specific patent license.", "Patentee's FRAND offer requires no examination if the implementer fails to indicate willingness to license at the negotiation outset.", "The ruling follows the Huawei v ZTE framework and confirms consistent FRAND application across UPC Local Divisions."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿以保留抗辩权", "出口企业应预判标准必要专利风险并制定前置谈判策略"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Immediate written expression of licensing willingness is critical to preserve FRAND defenses against SEP infringement claims.", "Practice note: Establish standardized response protocols for infringement notices to ensure compliance with initial FRAND negotiation steps.", "What to monitor: Consistency in FRAND case law application between UPC Local Divisions, particularly regarding implementer conduct requirements."]
core_points_en: Dominant position may arise if standard-compliant smart TVs cannot realistically be marketed without the specific patent license.
Patentee's FRAND offer requires no examination if the implementer fails to indicate willingness to license at the negotiation outset.
The ruling follows the Huawei v ZTE framework and confirms consistent FRAND application across UPC Local Divisions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Immediate written expression of licensing willingness is critical to preserve FRAND defenses against SEP infringement claims.
Practice note: Establish standardized response protocols for infringement notices to ensure compliance with initial FRAND negotiation steps.
What to monitor: Consistency in FRAND case law application between UPC Local Divisions, particularly regarding implementer conduct requirements.

news_items.title: For Medical Devices, “Possible Use” Amounts To Infringement Only If The Use Is In Line With Medical Practice
news_items.title_zh: 医疗器械“可能使用”构成侵权须符合医疗实践
news_items.title_en: UPC Munich: Medical Device Infringement Requires Use Consistent With Medical Practice
news_items.summary: The UPC Munich Local Division (the LD Munich) has dismissed an infringement action relating to a medical device. It confirmed that a device can still infringe a patent, even if it is normally operated in a non-infringing way, as long as the patent-infringing use remains possible.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 慕尼黑分部驳回 Emboline 诉 AorticLab 专利侵权案。法院确认，即使设备通常以非侵权方式运行，只要侵权使用仍有可能，原则上可构成侵权。但针对医疗器械，法院引入关键限制：仅当该潜在用途符合专业实践及公认医学科学规则（即合乎医术）时，才认定为侵权。本案中被告设备若按专利方式移除将损坏组织，故不侵权。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Munich Local Division dismissed an infringement action concerning an embolic protection device. The court confirmed that while a device may infringe if infringing use is technically possible, even when normally operated non-infringly, a critical qualification applies to medical devices. The potential infringing use must align with professional practices and recognized rules of medical science, constituting a lege artis use. In this case, the defendant’s device lacked a graspable structure suitable for hook-based removal without damaging the filter mesh. Since using the alleged structure would require piercing and damaging the material, it did not meet medical standards. Consequently, the court ruled that the device did not fall within the patent’s scope, establishing that technical possibility alone is insufficient for infringement in the medical context.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国医疗器械出口企业应重视 UPC 判例，产品设计不仅要规避技术特征，还需论证替代用途不符合医疗常规。建议在欧洲专利申请及维权中，将“符合医疗实践”作为侵权比对的重要抗辩或主张依据，提升应对精度。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies the threshold for indirect or contributory infringement regarding medical devices under the UPC framework. Rights holders must demonstrate that alleged infringing uses are not only technically feasible but also consistent with accepted medical protocols. For manufacturers and legal teams, defense strategies should rigorously evaluate whether hypothetical infringing scenarios align with standard clinical practices. Arguments highlighting procedural risks or deviations from medical norms can effectively counter claims based solely on theoretical device capabilities. This precedent emphasizes the need for detailed clinical evidence in both enforcement and defense phases of patent litigation involving medical technology.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 确立医疗器械侵权需同时满足“技术可能性”与“医疗合规性”双重标准", "若潜在侵权用途违背医学常规或造成组织损伤，则不构成专利侵权行为", "本案因被告设备无法在不损坏情况下通过钩状结构移除，被判定未落入保护范围"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["UPC Munich establishes dual criteria for medical device infringement: technical possibility and compliance with medical practice standards.", "Potential infringing uses that violate established medical routines or cause tissue damage do not constitute patent infringement.", "The defendant's device was found non-infringing because hook-based removal would damage the filter mesh, failing the lege artis requirement."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["出口欧洲医械产品需评估潜在用途是否符合当地公认医疗操作规范", "利用“非合乎医术”抗辩策略，可有效阻断基于理论可能性的侵权指控"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Manufacturers must assess whether potential infringing uses align with local medical operation standards to mitigate liability risks.", "Practice note: Utilizing 'non-compliance with medical practice' as a defense can effectively block infringement allegations based on theoretical possibilities.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions applying the lege artis standard to other medical technologies and diagnostic methods."]
core_points_en: UPC Munich establishes dual criteria for medical device infringement: technical possibility and compliance with medical practice standards.
Potential infringing uses that violate established medical routines or cause tissue damage do not constitute patent infringement.
The defendant's device was found non-infringing because hook-based removal would damage the filter mesh, failing the lege artis requirement.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Manufacturers must assess whether potential infringing uses align with local medical operation standards to mitigate liability risks.
Practice note: Utilizing 'non-compliance with medical practice' as a defense can effectively block infringement allegations based on theoretical possibilities.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions applying the lege artis standard to other medical technologies and diagnostic methods.

news_items.title: Republic of Moldova to become 40th EPO member state
news_items.title_zh: 摩尔多瓦将成为欧洲专利组织第 40 个成员国
news_items.title_en: Republic of Moldova to Become 40th EPO Member State in June 2026
news_items.summary: The Republic of Moldova will join the European Patent Organisation as its 40th member on 1 June 2026.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 摩尔多瓦将于 2026 年 6 月 1 日正式成为欧洲专利组织第 40 个成员国。该国已于 2026 年 3 月交存加入书，完成加入《欧洲专利公约》最后步骤。此前双方通过验证协议合作多年，此举标志着摩尔多瓦知识产权框架进一步融入欧洲体系，也是其欧盟一体化进程的重要里程碑。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Republic of Moldova is scheduled to join the European Patent Organisation as its 40th contracting state on 1 June 2026. The country completed the final legal steps for accession to the European Patent Convention by depositing its instrument of accession on 25 March 2026. This development follows years of cooperation under a validation agreement effective since 2015, which allowed European patents to be extended to Moldova without separate national filings. The Administrative Council officially invited Moldova to accede in December 2022, following its formal request in 2019. This accession strengthens European patent cooperation and enhances Moldova’s intellectual property framework. It also represents a significant milestone in the country’s broader integration with European structures, aligning with ongoing EU accession negotiations.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利布局范围将扩大至摩尔多瓦。建议关注生效日期，利用单一申请程序覆盖该国市场，降低维权与申请成本，同时评估当地知识产权环境变化带来的新机遇。
news_items.ai_insight_en: The expansion of the European Patent Organization to include Moldova significantly broadens the geographic scope of unitary patent protection strategies. Stakeholders should note that granted European patents can now extend to this new jurisdiction, potentially reducing the need for separate national filings and lowering overall maintenance costs. Companies operating in Europe should review their portfolio management strategies to leverage this streamlined access. Additionally, monitoring changes in local IP enforcement practices will be crucial as Moldova aligns its legal framework with European standards, offering new opportunities for rights holders seeking comprehensive coverage across emerging markets in the region.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["摩尔多瓦将于 2026 年 6 月正式成为欧专局第 40 个成员国", "该国已完成加入《欧洲专利公约》的所有法律程序步骤", "此举深化了欧洲专利合作并助推摩尔多瓦欧盟一体化进程"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Moldova will become the 40th member of the European Patent Organisation on 1 June 2026.", "The country finalized its accession to the European Patent Convention by depositing instruments in March 2026.", "This move deepens European patent cooperation and supports Moldova's EU integration path."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧专体系扩容，中国企业可一站式获取摩尔多瓦专利保护", "需关注 2026 年 6 月生效节点，及时调整海外专利申请策略"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Expanded EPC membership allows single-application patent coverage extending to Moldova.", "Practice note: Review portfolio strategies to utilize validation mechanisms for cost-effective market entry.", "What to monitor: Implementation details effective from 1 June 2026 and local enforcement developments."]
core_points_en: Moldova will become the 40th member of the European Patent Organisation on 1 June 2026.
The country finalized its accession to the European Patent Convention by depositing instruments in March 2026.
This move deepens European patent cooperation and supports Moldova's EU integration path.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Expanded EPC membership allows single-application patent coverage extending to Moldova.
Practice note: Review portfolio strategies to utilize validation mechanisms for cost-effective market entry.
What to monitor: Implementation details effective from 1 June 2026 and local enforcement developments.

news_items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-767/23 [Remling]
news_items.title_zh: 欧盟法院：终审法院拒绝初步裁决必须详述理由
news_items.title_en: CJEU: Courts of Last Instance Must Provide Specific Reasons for Refusing Preliminary Rulings
news_items.summary: A national court or tribunal of last instance must always give reasons for its refusal to refer questions to the Court of Justice for a preliminary ruling
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 Remling 案中裁定，成员国终审法院若拒绝向欧盟法院提请初步裁决，必须具体说明理由。即使国内法允许简易驳回上诉，法院仍需详细阐述为何符合无需裁决的三种例外情形（问题无关、已有判例或显而易见）。本案源于荷兰国务委员会处理摩洛哥公民居留许可案时未充分说明拒绝理由，法院强调此举对维护欧盟法律解释统一性至关重要。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-767/23 [Remling], the Court of Justice of the European Union ruled that national courts of last instance must always provide specific reasons when refusing to refer questions for a preliminary ruling. Even where domestic law permits summary dismissal of appeals, such courts must concretely explain why one of the three exceptions to the obligation to refer applies: irrelevance of the EU law question, existing CJEU case law, or acte clair. The judgment addresses Dutch legislation allowing the Council of State to dismiss appeals with brief reasoning in a residence permit case involving a Moroccan national. The CJEU emphasized that failing to justify the refusal undermines the uniform application of EU law. While lower court reasoning may be adopted, it must clearly demonstrate that the case falls within an established exception, ensuring transparency and legal certainty in the EU judicial system.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This judgment reinforces procedural safeguards for parties seeking clarification on EU law interpretation. Litigants, including multinational corporations, can challenge inadequate reasoning in final national decisions to compel referrals or ensure consistent legal standards. Legal teams should scrutinize final judgments for compliance with this duty to state reasons, particularly in complex areas like immigration, trade, or regulatory compliance. By demanding concrete justifications for non-refusal, parties can mitigate risks of divergent national interpretations and strengthen their position in cross-border disputes requiring authoritative EU legal guidance.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["终审法院拒绝初步裁决时必须具体说明适用例外的理由", "即便国内法允许简易裁判，也不能免除详述拒绝裁决理由的义务", "下级法院的理由可被采纳，但前提是其已清晰论证符合例外情形"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Courts of last instance must specifically justify refusals to refer by identifying which of the three recognized exceptions applies.", "Domestic procedural rules allowing summary judgments do not exempt supreme courts from the duty to detail reasons for non-referral.", "Lower court grounds may be adopted only if they explicitly and correctly establish that the case meets the criteria for an exception."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用新规要求终审法院详述理由，增加案件转询欧盟法院几率", "在涉欧诉讼中强化程序抗辩，确保欧盟法律解释的统一适用"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties can leverage this ruling to demand detailed justifications for non-referrals, enhancing chances for CJEU clarification.", "Practice note: Scrutinize final national judgments for specific references to the three exceptions; challenge vague or summary rejections.", "What to monitor: National supreme courts' adherence to reasoned refusal requirements in cases involving ambiguous EU law provisions."]
core_points_en: Courts of last instance must specifically justify refusals to refer by identifying which of the three recognized exceptions applies.
Domestic procedural rules allowing summary judgments do not exempt supreme courts from the duty to detail reasons for non-referral.
Lower court grounds may be adopted only if they explicitly and correctly establish that the case meets the criteria for an exception.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties can leverage this ruling to demand detailed justifications for non-referrals, enhancing chances for CJEU clarification.
Practice note: Scrutinize final national judgments for specific references to the three exceptions; challenge vague or summary rejections.
What to monitor: National supreme courts' adherence to reasoned refusal requirements in cases involving ambiguous EU law provisions.

news_items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-521/21 Rzecznik Praw Obywatelskich (Recusal of a judge of an ordinary court)
news_items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定：法官任命瑕疵本身不足以认定其缺乏独立性
news_items.title_en: CJEU: Appointment Irregularities Alone Do Not Establish Judge’s Lack of Independence
news_items.summary: Rule of law: an irregularity committed during the appointment of a judge is not in itself sufficient to find that that judge is not independent, since an overall assessment of all of the circumstances attending the appointment of that judge is necessary
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 C-521/21 号案件中裁定，法官任命过程中的不规则性本身不足以认定该法官缺乏独立性。法院强调需对任命背景进行整体评估，仅当瑕疵性质严重且共同导致外部干涉风险时，才构成回避理由。波兰司法改革引发的任命争议及救济缺失，单独或结合均不自动导致法官回避。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-521/21, the Court of Justice of the European Union ruled that irregularities during a judge’s appointment do not automatically imply a lack of independence. A comprehensive assessment of all circumstances surrounding the appointment is required. The Court held that the participation of Poland’s reformed National Council of Judiciary in appointment procedures, combined with the absence of effective judicial remedies for unsuccessful candidates, does not inherently justify recusal. Only irregularities serious enough to create a real risk of interference from other state branches, thereby raising reasonable doubt about the judge’s impartiality, can challenge the requirement of a tribunal established by law. This judgment clarifies the threshold for questioning judicial independence under EU rule of law principles.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中企涉诉时，利用波兰法官任命瑕疵申请回避的策略受限。需聚焦具体案件中的实质干涉证据，而非单纯依赖程序瑕疵，建议加强个案法律风险评估。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Litigants in Poland cannot rely solely on procedural defects in judicial appointments to secure recusal. Successful challenges require demonstrating specific, substantial risks of executive or legislative interference affecting the particular judge. Legal teams should prioritize gathering concrete evidence of compromised impartiality rather than citing general systemic reforms. This approach ensures compliance with EU standards while managing litigation risks effectively. Companies operating in the region must adapt their legal strategies to focus on case-specific factual arguments regarding judicial bias, ensuring robust defense against potential dismissal of recusal motions based merely on structural appointment issues.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["任命瑕疵需整体评估，非自动导致法官缺乏独立性", "仅严重瑕疵致外部干涉风险时，方质疑法庭合法性", "波兰司法改革背景下的任命参与不足以免除法官履职"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Appointment irregularities require holistic assessment and do not automatically negate judicial independence.", "Recusal requires proof of serious irregularities creating real risk of external state interference.", "Polish judicial reform context and remedy gaps alone are insufficient grounds for mandatory recusal."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["申请法官回避需证明实质干涉风险，非仅凭程序瑕疵", "在波诉讼应强化个案独立性证据收集与法律论证"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Recusal motions based purely on appointment procedure flaws face higher rejection risks under current CJEU interpretation.", "Practice note: Focus legal arguments on specific evidence of external interference compromising the judge's impartiality in individual cases.", "What to monitor: Future national court applications of this 'real risk' standard when evaluating requests for judicial recusal in Poland."]
core_points_en: Appointment irregularities require holistic assessment and do not automatically negate judicial independence.
Recusal requires proof of serious irregularities creating real risk of external state interference.
Polish judicial reform context and remedy gaps alone are insufficient grounds for mandatory recusal.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Recusal motions based purely on appointment procedure flaws face higher rejection risks under current CJEU interpretation.
Practice note: Focus legal arguments on specific evidence of external interference compromising the judge's impartiality in individual cases.
What to monitor: Future national court applications of this 'real risk' standard when evaluating requests for judicial recusal in Poland.
