news_items.title: Selective Presentation Of Content Of Varying Complexity: Non-technical
news_items.title_zh: 基于消费速率调整内容复杂度被认定为非技术特征
news_items.title_en: EPO Board Rules Content Complexity Adaptation Non-Technical Under Comvik Approach
news_items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method for selecting online content to present to users based on their content consumption behavior on a social media platform.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局上诉委员会在 T 1207/22 号案件中裁定，根据用户内容消费速率动态调整展示内容复杂度的方法属于非技术目标。尽管消费速率可客观测量，但该逻辑本身可由非技术人员构想，不具备技术性。不过，案件因涉及临时内容与静态内容处理的技术实现细节被发回重审。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1207/22, the EPO Technical Board of Appeal determined that dynamically adjusting the complexity of displayed content based on a user's content consumption rate constitutes a non-technical aim. Although the consumption rate is objectively measured via user inputs and elapsed time, the underlying logic of presenting simpler or more complex material based on skimming speed is considered a concept achievable by a non-technical person, lacking inherent technical character under the Comvik approach. Consequently, this feature does not contribute to an inventive step. However, the Board remitted the case for further examination regarding specific technical implementation details related to distinguishing between ephemeral and static content when calculating consumption rates. This distinction may involve non-obvious technical considerations warranting additional search and assessment.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请社交算法类专利时，应避免仅强调商业逻辑或用户体验优化。需深入挖掘底层数据处理、缓存机制等具体技术实现细节，以证明存在超越常规编程的技术贡献，规避被驳回风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: For patent applicants in the social media and algorithm sectors, this decision highlights the critical importance of distinguishing between business logic and technical solutions. Merely optimizing user experience or adapting content presentation based on behavioral metrics is insufficient for establishing inventive step. Applicants should focus claim drafting on underlying technical implementations, such as specific data processing methods, caching mechanisms, or system architecture improvements. Demonstrating how these technical features solve a concrete technical problem beyond routine programming is essential to overcome objections regarding non-technical subject matter and secure robust patent protection in Europe.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["依据 Comvik 原则，适配内容复杂度属非技术目的", "即使基于客观数据，核心逻辑仍缺乏技术贡献", "临时内容处理的技术实现需进一步审查与检索"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Adapting content complexity based on consumption rate is a non-technical aim under the Comvik approach.", "Objective measurement of data does not automatically confer technical character to the core logical concept.", "Technical implementation details for handling ephemeral versus static content require further examination."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["算法专利需聚焦底层技术实现而非业务逻辑", "区分临时与静态内容的处理可作为技术突破口"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Focus patent claims on underlying technical implementations like data processing rather than business logic or user experience optimization.", "Practice note: Distinguishing between ephemeral and static content handling can serve as a viable technical argument for inventive step.", "What to monitor: Monitor future EPO decisions regarding the technical character of algorithms involving dynamic content adaptation and user behavior analysis."]
core_points_en: Adapting content complexity based on consumption rate is a non-technical aim under the Comvik approach.
Objective measurement of data does not automatically confer technical character to the core logical concept.
Technical implementation details for handling ephemeral versus static content require further examination.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Focus patent claims on underlying technical implementations like data processing rather than business logic or user experience optimization.
Practice note: Distinguishing between ephemeral and static content handling can serve as a viable technical argument for inventive step.
What to monitor: Monitor future EPO decisions regarding the technical character of algorithms involving dynamic content adaptation and user behavior analysis.

news_items.title: Information
news_items.title_zh: 2025 年司法统计：高活跃度伴随审理周期缩短
news_items.title_en: CJEU 2025 Statistics: Record Case Closures and Reduced Proceedings Duration
news_items.summary: Judicial statistics 2025: a very high level of activity accompanied by a reduction in the length of proceedings
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院与普通法院发布 2025 年司法统计数据。尽管部分初步裁决管辖权转移，案件总量仍创新高。两院结案数达 1898 件，积压案件降至 18 年来最低。平均审理周期显著缩短，其中普通法院仅需 16 个月。意大利和波兰提交的初步裁决请求数量显著，显示成员国司法互动频繁。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union and the General Court released their 2025 judicial statistics, revealing a year of intense activity. Despite the transfer of preliminary ruling requests to the General Court, the total number of cases brought reached 1,878. Both courts closed a combined total of 1,898 cases, marking a record high for case disposals. Consequently, the backlog of pending cases dropped to its lowest level in eighteen years, standing at 2,489. The average duration of proceedings decreased significantly across both institutions, with the General Court achieving an average processing time of just sixteen months. Notably, Italy and Poland submitted a significant volume of requests for preliminary rulings, indicating heightened judicial interaction from these Member States.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: The demonstrated increase in judicial efficiency within the EU court system offers tangible benefits for litigants operating in Europe. Shorter procedural timelines facilitate faster dispute resolution, thereby reducing the financial burden associated with prolonged litigation. For companies managing intellectual property portfolios or facing enforcement actions, this acceleration allows for more predictable legal planning and resource allocation. Furthermore, the concentration of preliminary references from specific Member States suggests areas where local legal interpretations may be evolving rapidly. Stakeholders should leverage these efficiency trends to optimize litigation strategies, potentially seeking expedited procedures where applicable to minimize operational disruptions and legal costs.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["两院结案总数创历史新高，积压案件量降至十八年最低点", "案件平均审理周期缩短，普通法院效率提升至十六个月", "意大利与波兰成为初步裁决请求的主要来源成员国"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Both EU courts achieved record-high case closures in 2025, reducing the pending backlog to its lowest point in eighteen years.", "Average proceedings duration shortened considerably, with the General Court reaching an efficient average of sixteen months per case.", "Italy and Poland emerged as primary sources for preliminary ruling requests, reflecting substantial legal engagement from these jurisdictions."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["审理周期缩短利于企业快速解决争端并降低时间成本", "关注意波两国高频诉讼动态以提前布局合规与风控"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Accelerated proceedings enable faster resolution of IP disputes, reducing time-related costs and uncertainty for rights holders.", "Practice note: Leverage improved court efficiency to streamline litigation strategies and anticipate quicker outcomes in ongoing cases.", "What to monitor: Track preliminary ruling trends from Italy and Poland to identify emerging compliance risks and shifting legal interpretations."]
core_points_en: Both EU courts achieved record-high case closures in 2025, reducing the pending backlog to its lowest point in eighteen years.
Average proceedings duration shortened considerably, with the General Court reaching an efficient average of sixteen months per case.
Italy and Poland emerged as primary sources for preliminary ruling requests, reflecting substantial legal engagement from these jurisdictions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Accelerated proceedings enable faster resolution of IP disputes, reducing time-related costs and uncertainty for rights holders.
Practice note: Leverage improved court efficiency to streamline litigation strategies and anticipate quicker outcomes in ongoing cases.
What to monitor: Track preliminary ruling trends from Italy and Poland to identify emerging compliance risks and shifting legal interpretations.

news_items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 6, 2026, Decision, UPC_COA_895/2025 & UPC_COA_896/2025
news_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭裁定：撤诉许可及诉讼费退还新规适用
news_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Withdrawal Permitted with Consent; Fee Reimbursement Rules Clarified
news_items.summary: Under R. 265.1 RoP, a party may withdraw its action as long as no final decision has been rendered. The withdrawal shall not be permitted if the other party...
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉庭在 2026 年 3 月裁决中确认，若对方无异议且无合法利益，上诉人可依据程序规则第 265 条撤回上诉。同时，法院明确 2026 年生效的规则修订版将诉讼费退还比例从 60% 降至 50%，适用版本以申请退还日期为准。此外，若双方未请求，法院可在撤诉时不作出费用决定。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In a March 2026 decision, the Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal confirmed that an appellant may withdraw an appeal under Rule 265 of the Rules of Procedure if the respondent consents and lacks a legitimate interest in continuing the proceedings. The Court clarified that this rule applies equally to appellate stages. Regarding costs, the Court applied the amended Rule 370.9, effective January 1, 2026, which reduced fee reimbursement from 60% to 50%. The applicable version is determined by the date the reimbursement application is filed, not when the appeal was lodged. Consequently, the appellant received only 50% reimbursement. Additionally, although Rule 265.2(c) provides for a cost decision upon withdrawal, the Court declined to issue one as neither party requested it at the appellate stage.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners must carefully assess the timing of withdrawal applications to navigate the reduced fee reimbursement rates under the updated Rules of Procedure. Since the reimbursement percentage is tied to the application date rather than the appeal filing date, strategic planning is essential to optimize cost recovery. Furthermore, parties should actively request specific cost decisions if they seek clarity or enforcement regarding expense allocation, as the Court will not automatically issue such rulings upon withdrawal without a formal request. This highlights the importance of precise procedural management in UPC litigation.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["对方同意且无合法利益阻碍时，允许依据规则 265 条撤回上诉", "诉讼费退还比例降至 50%，适用版本取决于退还申请提交日期", "若当事人未请求，上诉庭在撤诉程序中可不作具体费用裁定"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Withdrawal of appeal is permitted under Rule 265 RoP when the respondent consents and has no legitimate interest in the action being decided.", "Amended Rule 370.9 reduces fee reimbursement to 50%; the applicable version depends on the date the reimbursement application is filed.", "The Court of Appeal may refrain from issuing a cost decision upon withdrawal if neither party explicitly requests such a determination."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC 诉讼费退还比例下调，企业需重新评估诉讼成本收益比", "撤诉策略应结合对方态度与程序节点，避免因规则误读受损"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Evaluate the financial impact of reduced fee reimbursements when deciding whether to withdraw appeals after January 1, 2026.", "Practice note: File reimbursement applications strategically to align with favorable procedural rules and explicitly request cost decisions if needed.", "What to monitor: Ensure respondent consent is obtained for withdrawals and verify the absence of legitimate interest to avoid procedural obstacles."]
core_points_en: Withdrawal of appeal is permitted under Rule 265 RoP when the respondent consents and has no legitimate interest in the action being decided.
Amended Rule 370.9 reduces fee reimbursement to 50%; the applicable version depends on the date the reimbursement application is filed.
The Court of Appeal may refrain from issuing a cost decision upon withdrawal if neither party explicitly requests such a determination.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Evaluate the financial impact of reduced fee reimbursements when deciding whether to withdraw appeals after January 1, 2026.
Practice note: File reimbursement applications strategically to align with favorable procedural rules and explicitly request cost decisions if needed.
What to monitor: Ensure respondent consent is obtained for withdrawals and verify the absence of legitimate interest to avoid procedural obstacles.

news_items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 11, 2026, Decision, UPC_CFI_934/2025
news_items.title_zh: UPC 上诉法院裁定撤诉规则适用于临时措施申请
news_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Confirms Rule 265 Withdrawal Applies to Provisional Measures
news_items.summary: The Court of Appeal clarified that the term "action" (Klage) in Rule 265.1 RoP encompasses applications for provisional measures.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在 2026 年 3 月 11 日判决中澄清，程序规则第 265 条中的“诉讼”一词涵盖临时措施申请。法院确认该撤诉机制不仅适用于侵权或无效等主诉程序，同样延伸至临时救济程序及上诉阶段。若双方达成和解且无异议，法院可准许撤诉并免除单独的费用裁决，确立了更灵活的程序退出机制。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In a March 11, 2026 decision, the Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal clarified that the term 'action' in Rule 265.1 of the Rules of Procedure encompasses applications for provisional measures. The Court confirmed that the withdrawal mechanism extends beyond main infringement or revocation proceedings to include interim relief proceedings and remains applicable during appeal stages. Withdrawal is permitted before a final appellate decision is rendered, provided no legitimate interests of the opposing party oppose it. In this case, the applicants withdrew their provisional measure application during the pending appeal after reaching an out-of-court settlement. The Court further held that a separate cost decision under Rule 265.2 RoP is unnecessary when parties unanimously agree to bear their own costs, establishing a more flexible procedural exit mechanism for litigants.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应对专利纠纷时，可利用此规则在上诉阶段灵活撤回临时措施申请以促成和解。建议密切关注 UPC 程序动态，在面临禁令风险时，将程序性撤诉作为谈判筹码，优化诉讼成本与商业策略的平衡。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This ruling provides litigants with greater procedural flexibility in UPC proceedings involving interim relief. Parties seeking to settle disputes can utilize the withdrawal mechanism at the appeal stage to facilitate commercial resolutions without waiting for a final judgment on the merits. By explicitly confirming that mutual agreement on cost bearing eliminates the need for a formal cost decision, the Court streamlines the conclusion of cases. This approach allows companies to optimize litigation strategies by balancing procedural concessions with business objectives, potentially reducing both time and economic burdens associated with prolonged patent enforcement actions in Europe.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["程序规则第 265 条明确适用于临时措施申请，不限于狭义的主诉行动", "上诉阶段允许撤回临时措施申请，前提是终审判决作出前提出且无损对方利益", "双方一致同意各自承担费用时，法院无需再就费用问题作出单独裁决"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 265 RoP applies to provisional measure applications, not limited to narrow definitions of main actions.", "Withdrawal of provisional measures is permitted at the appeal stage if declared before the final decision.", "No separate cost decision is required if parties unanimously agree each side bears its own costs."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用撤诉规则灵活性，在上诉阶段通过程序退出让步换取商业和解空间", "明确费用分担共识可简化结案流程，降低企业在欧诉讼的时间与经济成本"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage withdrawal rules in appeals to create space for commercial settlements and manage injunction risks.", "Practice note: Secure unanimous agreement on cost allocation to simplify case closure and avoid separate cost rulings.", "What to monitor: UPC procedural dynamics regarding the scope of 'legitimate interests' opposing withdrawal in future cases."]
core_points_en: Rule 265 RoP applies to provisional measure applications, not limited to narrow definitions of main actions.
Withdrawal of provisional measures is permitted at the appeal stage if declared before the final decision.
No separate cost decision is required if parties unanimously agree each side bears its own costs.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage withdrawal rules in appeals to create space for commercial settlements and manage injunction risks.
Practice note: Secure unanimous agreement on cost allocation to simplify case closure and avoid separate cost rulings.
What to monitor: UPC procedural dynamics regarding the scope of 'legitimate interests' opposing withdrawal in future cases.

news_items.title: GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026
news_items.title_zh: INPI 将参展 2026 巴黎创业者大会并提供设计保护咨询
news_items.title_en: INPI to Attend Go Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 with Design Protection Consultations
news_items.summary: GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 sgurtler@inpi.fr 18 mars 2026 Les 15 et 16 avril, Paris La Défense Arena accueille la 33ᵉ édition de Go Entrepreneurs, l’événement incontournable des créateurs et dirigeants d’entreprises. Partenaire engagé des entrepreneurs à chaque étape de leur parcours, l’INPI sera une nouvelle fois au rendez-vous. Vous avez des questions sur le dépôt de votre marque ou la protection de vos innovations et de votre design ? Vous souhaitez des renseignements sur les formalités d’ent
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）确认参加 2026 年 4 月在巴黎拉德芳斯竞技场举办的第 33 届“创业者大会”。作为企业合作伙伴，INPI 将在 B51 展位提供关于商标申请、创新及外观设计保护的免费咨询，并举办专题研讨会，指导企业如何进行工业产权诊断、品牌保护及网站命名策略，以协助初创企业完善知识产权布局。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) confirms its participation in the 33rd edition of Go Entrepreneurs, scheduled for April 15–16, 2026, at Paris La Défense Arena. As a committed partner to entrepreneurs, INPI will host booth B51, offering free consultations on trademark applications, innovation protection, and industrial design rights. The institute aims to assist startups in securing their intellectual property portfolios through individual diagnostic sessions. Additionally, INPI experts will conduct specialized workshops addressing brand protection strategies and website naming compliance. These initiatives provide practical guidance on navigating local registration procedures and mitigating early-stage legal risks, ensuring that businesses can effectively safeguard their assets while expanding into the French and broader European markets.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 赴法或进入欧盟市场的中国企业应利用此类官方活动获取一手注册指南。建议提前准备知识产权诊断需求，重点关注外观设计与品牌命名的本地化合规，避免因权利瑕疵阻碍市场拓展，善用官方免费资源降低维权成本。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Market entrants targeting France or the EU should leverage official INPI events to obtain current, localized registration guidelines. It is advisable to prepare specific intellectual property diagnostic requirements in advance, with particular attention paid to the local compliance aspects of industrial designs and brand naming. Utilizing these free official resources helps identify potential rights defects early, thereby preventing obstacles during market expansion. This proactive approach allows companies to optimize their IP layout and reduce long-term enforcement costs by aligning with national standards from the outset of their commercial activities.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["INPI 将在巴黎创业者大会设立展位提供一对一免费诊断服务", "举办专题研讨会，讲解品牌保护策略与网站命名合规要点", "重点涵盖外观设计、商标等工业产权的注册流程与保护机制"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["INPI will operate booth B51, providing free one-on-one industrial property diagnostics for attendees seeking personalized IP guidance.", "Specialized workshops will cover essential brand protection strategies and compliant website naming practices for new ventures.", "Sessions focus on practical registration processes and protection mechanisms for trademarks and industrial designs."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用 INPI 官方活动获取外观设计注册的本地化实操指导", "重视品牌命名与网站域名的协同保护，规避早期法律风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage INPI official events to acquire localized, practical guidance on industrial design registration procedures.", "Practice note: Prioritize coordinated protection for brand names and website domains to mitigate early-stage legal exposure.", "What to monitor: Updates on INPI’s diagnostic services and workshop topics regarding IP compliance for market entry."]
core_points_en: INPI will operate booth B51, providing free one-on-one industrial property diagnostics for attendees seeking personalized IP guidance.
Specialized workshops will cover essential brand protection strategies and compliant website naming practices for new ventures.
Sessions focus on practical registration processes and protection mechanisms for trademarks and industrial designs.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage INPI official events to acquire localized, practical guidance on industrial design registration procedures.
Practice note: Prioritize coordinated protection for brand names and website domains to mitigate early-stage legal exposure.
What to monitor: Updates on INPI’s diagnostic services and workshop topics regarding IP compliance for market entry.

news_items.title: WIPO Launches Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure Interchange
news_items.title_zh: WIPO 启动人工智能基础设施交流平台
news_items.title_en: WIPO Launches Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure Interchange to Address IP and AI Technical Issues
news_items.summary: WIPO today launched the Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure Interchange (AIII), a new initiative for expert dialogue on IP and AI issues that will focus on technical and operational issues and complement ongoing discussions at other WIPO forums.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 世界知识产权组织（WIPO）正式推出“人工智能基础设施交流平台”（AIII）。该倡议旨在建立专家对话机制，聚焦知识产权与人工智能领域的技术及运营议题。作为现有 WIPO 论坛讨论的补充，AIII 将专注于解决实际操作层面的问题，促进全球范围内关于 AI 技术架构与 IP 规则衔接的专业交流，为后续政策制定提供技术支撑。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO) has officially launched the Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure Interchange (AIII). This new initiative establishes a dedicated platform for expert dialogue concerning the intersection of intellectual property rights and artificial intelligence technologies. The AIII specifically targets technical and operational challenges, aiming to complement ongoing discussions within other existing WIPO forums. By focusing on infrastructure-level issues, the initiative seeks to facilitate professional exchanges regarding the alignment of global AI technology architectures with IP rules. This framework provides essential technical support for future policy formulation, ensuring that practical operational concerns are addressed alongside broader legal and regulatory debates in the international IP community.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，国际后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Organizations deploying AI technologies in Europe should closely monitor the evolution of infrastructure standards driven by WIPO initiatives like the AIII. Active participation in these international dialogues allows stakeholders to anticipate emerging technical compliance requirements early. This proactive engagement supports the optimization of global patent portfolios and strategic positioning. As unified technical operational norms and potential cross-border enforcement synergies develop, early awareness enables companies to adapt their IP strategies effectively. Monitoring these developments ensures that legal and technical teams remain aligned with evolving international expectations, reducing regulatory risks while enhancing competitive advantage in the global AI market landscape.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["WIPO 启动新倡议 AIII，专注 IP 与 AI 技术及运营议题", "该平台旨在补充现有论坛，深化专家间实质性对话", "聚焦基础设施层面，推动全球 AI 知识产权规则协同"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["WIPO launches the AIII initiative to focus specifically on technical and operational issues at the intersection of IP and AI.", "The platform aims to supplement existing WIPO forums by deepening substantive expert dialogue on practical implementation matters.", "It focuses on infrastructure levels to promote global coordination and synergy in AI-related intellectual property rules."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注 WIPO 平台动态，预判全球 AI 技术合规新标准", "主动参与国际对话，优化涉欧 AI 专利布局与应对策略"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor WIPO platform dynamics to anticipate new global AI technical compliance standards and infrastructure norms.", "Practice note: Actively engage in international dialogues to optimize European AI patent layouts and develop robust response strategies.", "What to monitor: Emerging unified technical operational specifications and trends in cross-border enforcement coordination."]
core_points_en: WIPO launches the AIII initiative to focus specifically on technical and operational issues at the intersection of IP and AI.
The platform aims to supplement existing WIPO forums by deepening substantive expert dialogue on practical implementation matters.
It focuses on infrastructure levels to promote global coordination and synergy in AI-related intellectual property rules.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor WIPO platform dynamics to anticipate new global AI technical compliance standards and infrastructure norms.
Practice note: Actively engage in international dialogues to optimize European AI patent layouts and develop robust response strategies.
What to monitor: Emerging unified technical operational specifications and trends in cross-border enforcement coordination.

news_items.title: [Blog] Révision du programme PACE : effet au 1er février 2026
news_items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局修订 PACE 计划：2026 年 2 月起仅限加速审查
news_items.title_en: EPO Revises PACE Program: Accelerated Processing Limited to Examination Phase from February 2026
news_items.summary: Depuis 2015, l'Office européen des brevets (OEB) vise à améliorer durablement les délais dans lesquels le rapport de recherche européen...
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 自 2015 年起，欧洲专利局致力于缩短检索报告发出时间，2024 年平均耗时已降至 5.5 个月。鉴于此效率提升，欧专局决定自 2026 年 2 月 1 日起修订 PACE 加速程序，将其适用范围限制在实质审查阶段。自此，申请人将无法再请求加速检索过程，但仍可加速获取首次审查意见及授权通知。
news_items.ai_summary_en: Since 2015, the European Patent Office (EPO) has worked to sustainably reduce the time required to issue extended or partial European search reports for both direct European and relevant PCT applications. By 2024, the average issuance time had decreased to 5.5 months. Reflecting this efficiency gain, the EPO announced on December 16, 2025, that it would restrict the PACE (Programme for Accelerated prosecution of European patent applications) mechanism solely to the examination phase. Effective February 1, 2026, applicants can no longer request accelerated processing during the search phase. The updated Form 1005 now exclusively covers requests for accelerated examination. However, the revised PACE program continues to allow applicants seeking rapid processing to receive the first examination report and, where applicable, the Rule 71(3) EPC communication in the shortest possible timeframes.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需调整策略，不再能依赖 PACE 加速检索。建议利用现有检索速度优势，提前布局实审阶段的加速请求，以平衡整体获权周期，避免因规则变更导致的时间预期偏差。
news_items.ai_insight_en: With the removal of search-phase acceleration options, stakeholders must recalibrate their European patent prosecution timelines. The strategy should shift focus toward leveraging the naturally faster search turnaround while prioritizing accelerated examination requests. This approach helps balance the overall grant cycle and mitigates risks associated with procedural delays. Applicants should proactively prepare for substantive examination to maintain momentum under the new rules, ensuring that expectations regarding total prosecution duration remain realistic despite the structural changes to the PACE framework.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧专局因检索效率显著提升，决定收缩 PACE 计划适用范围", "自 2026 年 2 月 1 日起，PACE 程序不再支持加速检索阶段请求", "修订后 PACE 仅保留加速实质审查及后续授权通知的功能"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO limits the PACE acceleration mechanism to the substantive examination phase due to significantly improved search report issuance times.", "Effective February 1, 2026, requests for accelerated processing are no longer permitted during the initial European search phase.", "The revised PACE program retains its function to expedite the first examination opinion and subsequent grant notifications efficiently."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["取消检索加速选项，要求企业重新规划欧专申请的时间表", "应聚焦实审阶段加速策略，以应对新规则下的审查节奏变化"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Stakeholders must adjust prosecution schedules as PACE no longer supports accelerating the search phase, requiring reliance on standard search timelines.", "Practice note: Focus strategic efforts on expediting the substantive examination stage to compensate for the loss of early-stage acceleration options.", "What to monitor: Track EPO performance metrics for search report issuance to optimize the timing of subsequent accelerated examination requests."]
core_points_en: The EPO limits the PACE acceleration mechanism to the substantive examination phase due to significantly improved search report issuance times.
Effective February 1, 2026, requests for accelerated processing are no longer permitted during the initial European search phase.
The revised PACE program retains its function to expedite the first examination opinion and subsequent grant notifications efficiently.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Stakeholders must adjust prosecution schedules as PACE no longer supports accelerating the search phase, requiring reliance on standard search timelines.
Practice note: Focus strategic efforts on expediting the substantive examination stage to compensate for the loss of early-stage acceleration options.
What to monitor: Track EPO performance metrics for search report issuance to optimize the timing of subsequent accelerated examination requests.

news_items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-258/24 Katholische Schwangerschaftsberatung
news_items.title_zh: 欧盟法院：天主教协会不得仅因员工退教而将其解雇
news_items.title_en: CJEU: Catholic Association Cannot Dismiss Employee Solely for Leaving Church
news_items.summary: A Catholic association cannot dismiss an employee on the sole ground that the employee concerned has left the Catholic Church
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 C-258/24 案中裁定，基于宗教理念的协会不能仅因员工退出教会而解雇该员工。法院指出，此类解雇需证明该要求对特定活动是真实、合法且正当的。若协会雇佣非信徒从事相同工作，则员工退教本身不构成对协会理念的挑战，最终由成员国法院评估具体情形。
news_items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-258/24, the Court of Justice of the European Union ruled that a religious association cannot dismiss an employee solely because they left the church. Such dismissal requires proof that the loyalty requirement is genuine, legitimate, and justified given the specific nature of the activities. The Court emphasized that national courts, not the religious organization, must assess whether the occupational requirement meets these criteria. If the association employs non-believers for identical roles, the employee's departure from the church does not inherently challenge the organization's ethos or autonomy. Ultimately, it falls to the German Federal Labour Court to determine if the dismissal was justified in this specific context, ensuring a fair balance between the employer's religious autonomy and the employee's right to non-discrimination.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中资企业若涉及宗教背景或特定价值观管理，需谨慎制定用工标准。解雇理由必须具备客观正当性，避免因文化差异引发歧视诉讼，建议咨询当地法律顾问合规审查。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Organizations operating with specific ethical or religious values must ensure employment standards are objectively justified to avoid discrimination claims. Termination decisions require robust legal grounding, particularly when dealing with personal status changes like religious affiliation. Multinational entities should respect the final adjudicative power of local courts regarding the proportionality of occupational requirements. Legal counsel should review internal policies to align with evolving CJEU interpretations on balancing organizational autonomy against individual non-discrimination rights, ensuring compliance across different EU jurisdictions.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["仅因员工退出教会而解雇，原则上不符合欧盟反歧视法律框架", "职业要求的真实性须由国内法院而非教会组织自行评估认定", "若协会雇佣非信徒从事同类工作，退教行为不必然损害其宗教理念"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Dismissal based solely on leaving a church generally violates EU anti-discrimination frameworks unless strictly justified.", "National courts, not religious bodies, hold the authority to assess the genuineness and legitimacy of occupational requirements.", "Employing non-believers in similar roles suggests that leaving the church does not necessarily undermine the organization's religious ethos."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["用工解雇理由需具备客观正当性，避免触碰反歧视红线", "跨国经营应尊重当地司法对职业要求真实性的最终裁量权"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure termination reasons possess objective justification to mitigate risks of discrimination litigation.", "Practice note: Respect local judicial discretion in evaluating the authenticity of occupational requirements within religious contexts.", "What to monitor: Evolving case law on the balance between organizational ethos and employee rights in EU member states."]
core_points_en: Dismissal based solely on leaving a church generally violates EU anti-discrimination frameworks unless strictly justified.
National courts, not religious bodies, hold the authority to assess the genuineness and legitimacy of occupational requirements.
Employing non-believers in similar roles suggests that leaving the church does not necessarily undermine the organization's religious ethos.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure termination reasons possess objective justification to mitigate risks of discrimination litigation.
Practice note: Respect local judicial discretion in evaluating the authenticity of occupational requirements within religious contexts.
What to monitor: Evolving case law on the balance between organizational ethos and employee rights in EU member states.

news_items.title: VoiceAge vs HMD saga continues with constitutional complaint
news_items.title_zh: VoiceAge 诉 HMD 案续：HMD 向德宪法法院提起申诉
news_items.title_en: HMD Global Files Constitutional Complaint in German SEP Dispute with VoiceAgeEVS
news_items.summary: HMD Global has filed a constitutional complaint with the German Federal Constitutional Court in the ongoing SEP dispute with VoiceAgeEVS.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 芬兰 HMD Global 因与 VoiceAgeEVS 的标准必要专利纠纷，向德国联邦宪法法院提起申诉。HMD 指控德国联邦最高法院拒绝将关键 FRAND 问题移交欧盟法院，侵犯了其获得法定法官审理的宪法权利。尽管欧盟委员会曾建议移交，但德国法院未予采纳，此案凸显了国内终审与欧盟法解释之间的张力。
news_items.ai_summary_en: HMD Global has lodged a constitutional complaint with the German Federal Constitutional Court regarding its ongoing standard-essential patent litigation with VoiceAgeEVS. The Finnish smartphone manufacturer contends that the Federal Court of Justice violated its constitutional right to a lawful judge by refusing to refer critical FRAND licensing questions to the Court of Justice of the European Union. This refusal occurred despite an amicus curiae submission from the European Commission urging such a referral. Filed on March 12, approximately six weeks after the Federal Court of Justice dismissed HMD’s appeal, the complaint highlights significant tension between national final judgments and the interpretation of EU law. Given the high threshold for admissibility before the German Constitutional Court, this development represents a strategic procedural step in the continuing dispute.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇 SEP 诉讼时，若遇德国法院拒绝移审欧盟法院，可评估宪法申诉路径。需密切关注德国宪法法院对此类程序权利的界定，以优化在欧诉讼策略并争取更有利的法律解释环境。
news_items.ai_insight_en: This development underscores the procedural complexities parties face when national supreme courts decline to seek preliminary rulings from the CJEU in SEP cases. Litigants should evaluate whether constitutional complaints alleging violations of the right to a lawful judge offer viable avenues for further review, despite the high admissibility standards. The European Commission’s stance remains a relevant factor in advocating for referrals. Practitioners must closely monitor how the German Constitutional Court defines these procedural rights, as its decision could influence future strategies for managing cross-border SEP litigation and shaping the legal environment for FRAND interpretations in Europe.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["HMD 主张德最高法院拒移审欧盟法院违宪", "案件聚焦标准必要专利许可中的 FRAND 义务解释", "欧盟委员会曾作为法庭之友支持移交审理"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["HMD argues the Federal Court of Justice violated its constitutional right to a lawful judge by refusing to refer key FRAND questions to the CJEU.", "The case centers on the interpretation of FRAND licensing obligations for standard-essential patent holders under EU competition law.", "The European Commission previously intervened as amicus curiae supporting a referral, but the German court declined to make one."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注德国宪法法院对法定法官权利的界定趋势", "利用欧盟委员会立场强化跨国诉讼中的移审主张"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Evaluate constitutional complaint pathways when national courts refuse CJEU referrals in SEP disputes.", "Practice note: Leverage European Commission positions to strengthen arguments for referring FRAND questions to the CJEU.", "What to monitor: Track the German Constitutional Court's evolving definition of the right to a lawful judge in IP contexts."]
core_points_en: HMD argues the Federal Court of Justice violated its constitutional right to a lawful judge by refusing to refer key FRAND questions to the CJEU.
The case centers on the interpretation of FRAND licensing obligations for standard-essential patent holders under EU competition law.
The European Commission previously intervened as amicus curiae supporting a referral, but the German court declined to make one.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Evaluate constitutional complaint pathways when national courts refuse CJEU referrals in SEP disputes.
Practice note: Leverage European Commission positions to strengthen arguments for referring FRAND questions to the CJEU.
What to monitor: Track the German Constitutional Court's evolving definition of the right to a lawful judge in IP contexts.

news_items.title: UK confidentiality approach poses challenges for SEP owners/licensees, despite Optis redaction win
news_items.title_zh: 尽管 Optis 胜诉，英国保密规则仍给 SEP 双方带来挑战
news_items.title_en: UK Confidentiality Rules Challenge SEP Parties Despite Optis Redaction Victory
news_items.summary: The Court of Appeal has eased worries about confidential material, but SEP-licensing companies must remain proactive in their defence of commercially valuable information
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国上诉法院在 Optis 案件中虽允许对部分机密材料进行编辑处理，缓解了业界担忧，但整体保密制度仍对标准必要专利（SEP）权利人和被许可人构成挑战。文章指出，企业不能仅依赖法院裁决，必须主动采取防御措施，以保护具有商业价值的敏感信息不被过度披露，确保持续的竞争优势。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The UK Court of Appeal has alleviated some concerns regarding the handling of confidential material in standard essential patent disputes by permitting redactions in the Optis case. However, this ruling does not fully resolve the inherent risks associated with disclosure. The broader confidentiality framework continues to present significant challenges for both SEP owners and licensees. Companies cannot rely solely on judicial precedents; they must actively implement defensive measures to protect commercially sensitive information from excessive exposure during litigation. Proactive strategies are essential to safeguard trade secrets and maintain competitive advantages amidst rigorous evidence disclosure requirements.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Parties involved in UK standard essential patent litigation should anticipate broad evidence disclosure obligations. It is critical to establish strict confidentiality classification strategies early in proceedings. Actively seeking protective orders helps prevent core commercial data leakage due to procedural demands. Leveraging the Optis precedent allows parties to argue effectively for favorable redaction rights regarding sensitive business information. This approach ensures that vital competitive assets remain protected while complying with court-mandated transparency requirements during complex intellectual property disputes.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国上诉法院放宽机密材料处理，但未彻底解决披露风险", "SEP 诉讼中商业敏感信息的保护仍需企业主动构建防御体系", "Optis 案件的编辑胜诉为先例，但不足以消除所有保密隐患"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court of Appeal eased confidentiality concerns but did not eliminate disclosure risks in SEP litigation.", "Protection of business-sensitive information requires companies to actively build robust defensive systems.", "The Optis redaction win serves as a precedent but is insufficient to remove all confidentiality hazards."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["在英诉讼需提前规划保密分级，主动申请保护令以防数据外泄", "借鉴 Optis 案经验，积极主张对敏感商业信息进行编辑处理"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Early planning of confidentiality classifications and proactive application for protective orders are vital to prevent data leaks.", "Practice note: Use the Optis case experience to actively claim redaction rights for sensitive commercial information.", "What to monitor: Evolving judicial interpretations of confidentiality protections and disclosure limits in UK SEP cases."]
core_points_en: The Court of Appeal eased confidentiality concerns but did not eliminate disclosure risks in SEP litigation.
Protection of business-sensitive information requires companies to actively build robust defensive systems.
The Optis redaction win serves as a precedent but is insufficient to remove all confidentiality hazards.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Early planning of confidentiality classifications and proactive application for protective orders are vital to prevent data leaks.
Practice note: Use the Optis case experience to actively claim redaction rights for sensitive commercial information.
What to monitor: Evolving judicial interpretations of confidentiality protections and disclosure limits in UK SEP cases.

news_items.title: DPMAnutzerforum 2026: Quantentechnologie nimmt Fahrt auf
news_items.title_zh: 2026 年用户论坛：量子技术加速发展
news_items.title_en: DPMA Forum 2026: Quantum Technology Patent Filings Surge Sevenfold in Germany
news_items.summary: DPMAnutzerforum 2026: Quantentechnologie nimmt Fahrt auf - DPMA-Analyse: Siebenmal mehr Patentanmeldungen mit quantentechnologischem Bezug als noch vor zehn Jahren – Deutsche Anmelder auf Rang 2 hinter den Vereinigten Staaten – DPMA-Präsidentin: Deutschland könnte entscheidende Innovationen mitprägen – Potenzial von Quantentechnologie für Deutschland Leitthema beim DPMAnutzerforum in München - Komplexe Berechnungen, abhörsichere Kommunikation, ultrapräzise Messungen - Asiatische Konzerne führen
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）在 2026 年用户论坛上发布分析显示，过去十年德国市场量子技术相关专利申请量增长七倍。德国申请者数量位居全球第二，仅次于美国。DPMA 主席强调德国具备塑造关键创新的潜力，指出知识产权保护是将研究成果转化为商业模型的前提，亚洲企业在该领域亦处于领先地位。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) released an analysis at its 2026 User Forum revealing a nearly sevenfold increase in quantum technology-related patent applications for the German market over the past decade. German applicants currently rank second globally, trailing only the United States, while Asian corporations also maintain leading positions in this sector. DPMA President Eva Schewior emphasized that Germany possesses significant potential to shape key innovations through its robust research institutions and industrial base. She highlighted that effective intellectual property protection, particularly via patents, is a critical prerequisite for transforming these scientific advancements into viable commercial products and business models. The forum underscored the strategic importance of innovation protection as quantum technologies advance.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局量子技术时需关注德国强劲的创新势头与专利壁垒。建议加强在该领域的专利挖掘与申请，利用 DPMA 数据监测竞争对手动态，并重视知识产权合规以规避潜在侵权风险，确保在欧洲市场的技术转化安全。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in Europe should closely track the rapid expansion of quantum technology patenting activity in Germany. The surge in filings indicates a maturing competitive landscape where early IP positioning is increasingly critical. Companies should prioritize comprehensive patent landscaping to identify white spaces and potential infringement risks within this dense thicket. Proactive monitoring of competitor strategies using official DPMA data allows for timely adjustments in R&D and filing strategies. Ensuring strict compliance with local IP regulations will mitigate litigation risks and secure freedom to operate as quantum solutions transition from laboratory prototypes to commercial deployment across European markets.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德国量子技术专利申请十年间增长近七倍，创新动态显著", "德国申请者数量居全球第二，具备塑造关键创新潜力", "DPMA 强调专利保护对转化量子技术商业价值至关重要"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Quantum technology patent filings in Germany have increased nearly sevenfold over the last ten years, reflecting intense innovation dynamics.", "German applicants hold the second global position in quantum patents, demonstrating strong capacity to influence key technological developments.", "The DPMA stresses that robust patent protection is essential for converting quantum research outcomes into successful commercial business models."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注德国量子专利激增趋势，提前布局核心技术研发", "利用官方数据监测竞争态势，强化知识产权合规管理"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor the rapid growth of German quantum patent filings to assess competitive density and identify strategic opportunities or threats in the European market.", "Practice note: Strengthen internal patent mining efforts and conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses to navigate the increasing complexity of quantum technology IP rights.", "What to monitor: Track official DPMA statistics and competitor filing patterns to anticipate shifts in the quantum technology landscape and adjust IP portfolios accordingly."]
core_points_en: Quantum technology patent filings in Germany have increased nearly sevenfold over the last ten years, reflecting intense innovation dynamics.
German applicants hold the second global position in quantum patents, demonstrating strong capacity to influence key technological developments.
The DPMA stresses that robust patent protection is essential for converting quantum research outcomes into successful commercial business models.

Practice note: Strengthen internal patent mining efforts and conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses to navigate the increasing complexity of quantum technology IP rights.
What to monitor: Track official DPMA statistics and competitor filing patterns to anticipate shifts in the quantum technology landscape and adjust IP portfolios accordingly.

news_items.title: Albania is First to Join WIPO’s Riyadh Design Law Treaty
news_items.title_zh: 阿尔巴尼亚率先加入 WIPO 利雅得外观设计法条约
news_items.title_en: Albania Becomes First State to Ratify WIPO Riyadh Design Law Treaty
news_items.summary: Albania today became the first member state to join WIPO’s Riyadh Design Law Treaty (RDLT), depositing its instrument of ratification with Director General Daren Tang and marking a major milestone in bringing into force the new international framework for design protection.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 阿尔巴尼亚今日成为首个加入世界知识产权组织《利雅得外观设计法条约》的成员国，并向总干事邓鸿森交存了批准书。此举标志着建立新的国际外观设计保护框架进程中的重要里程碑，该条约旨在简化和协调全球外观设计注册程序，降低申请人成本。
news_items.ai_summary_en: Albania has officially become the first member state to join the World Intellectual Property Organization’s Riyadh Design Law Treaty (RDLT). By depositing its instrument of ratification with Director General Daren Tang, Albania marks a significant milestone in the establishment of this new international framework for design protection. The treaty aims to simplify and harmonize global procedures for industrial design registration, thereby reducing administrative burdens and costs for applicants worldwide. This development represents a crucial step toward bringing the RDLT into force, enhancing the efficiency of international design rights management, and strengthening the global intellectual property network for creators and businesses seeking streamlined protection across multiple jurisdictions.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，阿尔巴尼亚后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: The ratification of the Riyadh Design Law Treaty by Albania signals the imminent operationalization of a streamlined international framework for design protection. For rights holders operating in Europe and beyond, this development offers potential pathways to reduce procedural complexities and application costs in Albania and potentially neighboring jurisdictions once the treaty enters into force. Stakeholders should closely track the timeline for the treaty’s entry into force to adjust their overseas design filing strategies accordingly. Proactive monitoring will enable companies to leverage these simplified procedures, enhancing the efficiency and cost-effectiveness of securing design rights in emerging European markets.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["阿尔巴尼亚成为全球首个批准该条约的国家", "条约旨在简化国际外观设计注册流程与形式要求", "此举推动条约生效并完善国际知识产权保护网络"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Albania is the first country globally to ratify the WIPO Riyadh Design Law Treaty.", "The treaty seeks to simplify international design registration processes and formal requirements.", "This ratification advances the treaty's entry into force and strengthens global IP protection networks."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用新条约简化程序降低阿尔巴尼亚申请成本", "关注条约生效进度以优化欧洲市场布局策略"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage simplified procedures to lower design application costs in Albania and surrounding regions.", "Practice note: Monitor the treaty's entry into force progress to optimize European market layout strategies.", "What to monitor: Timeline for the RDLT entering into force and subsequent adoption by other key jurisdictions."]
core_points_en: Albania is the first country globally to ratify the WIPO Riyadh Design Law Treaty.
The treaty seeks to simplify international design registration processes and formal requirements.
This ratification advances the treaty's entry into force and strengthens global IP protection networks.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage simplified procedures to lower design application costs in Albania and surrounding regions.
Practice note: Monitor the treaty's entry into force progress to optimize European market layout strategies.
What to monitor: Timeline for the RDLT entering into force and subsequent adoption by other key jurisdictions.

news_items.title: Fake toner, real trouble: protect your printers from counterfeits
news_items.title_zh: UKIPO警示：假冒碳粉危害大，需强化防伪保护
news_items.title_en: UKIPO Warns of Serious Risks from Counterfeit Toner and Ink Cartridges
news_items.summary: Counterfeit ink and toner cartridges can be poor quality and can cause serious problems, especially for small businesses.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）发布博客文章，警示假冒墨盒和碳粉对中小企业造成的严重损害。文章指出全球假冒贸易规模巨大且常关联有组织犯罪，电商平台第三方卖家易成售假渠道。UKIPO联合ICCE等机构开展执法与情报协调，强调造假者不承担赔偿责任。建议企业建立严格采购体系，通过比对正品特征识别假货，以规避法律与经济损失风险。
news_items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has issued a warning regarding the significant harms caused by counterfeit ink and toner cartridges, particularly affecting small businesses. The blog highlights that while often perceived as low-risk, fake print consumables can cause severe operational damage. Global trade in counterfeit goods is estimated at USD 467 billion, with strong links to organized crime. Online marketplaces facilitate the sale of these items through third-party sellers offering tempting prices. Crucially, counterfeiters cannot be held liable for damages and offer no compensation. The UKIPO collaborates with the Imaging Consumables Coalition of Europe, Middle East and Africa (ICCE) to coordinate enforcement and intelligence efforts against counterfeiting networks.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国打印耗材出口企业应警惕被卷入假冒供应链指控。需建立严格的知识产权合规与溯源体系，主动配合品牌方打假。同时，进口商应加强供应商尽职调查，避免采购来源不明的低价耗材，以防因销售假冒产品面临UKIPO执法行动及民事索赔风险。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Companies operating within European supply chains should prioritize robust intellectual property compliance and traceability mechanisms. Exporters must ensure their distribution channels are not inadvertently used for counterfeit goods, while importers need rigorous supplier due diligence to avoid sourcing unverified, low-cost alternatives. Failure to verify product origins may result in enforcement actions by authorities like the UKIPO and exposure to civil liability claims. Proactive cooperation with brand owners and industry coalitions is essential to mitigate legal risks and protect commercial reputation against allegations of facilitating counterfeit trade.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO警示假冒耗材致损严重，造假者免责且不赔偿", "全球假冒贸易达4670亿美元，常关联有组织犯罪网络", "建议企业完善采购系统，比对正品特征以识别假冒商品"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Counterfeit print consumables cause serious business damage, yet manufacturers bear no liability or compensation responsibility.", "Global counterfeit trade reaches approximately USD 467 billion, frequently linked to serious organized criminal networks.", "Businesses must implement strict procurement systems and compare product features to identify fakes on online platforms."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["出口企业需建立合规溯源体系，防范假冒供应链指控", "进口商应加强供应商尽调，避免采购不明来源低价耗材"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Establish strict IP compliance and traceability systems to prevent involvement in counterfeit supply chains.", "Practice note: Conduct thorough supplier due diligence to avoid procuring unverified, low-cost consumables.", "What to monitor: Enforcement trends by UKIPO and ICCE regarding counterfeit print materials and online marketplace liabilities."]
core_points_en: Counterfeit print consumables cause serious business damage, yet manufacturers bear no liability or compensation responsibility.
Global counterfeit trade reaches approximately USD 467 billion, frequently linked to serious organized criminal networks.
Businesses must implement strict procurement systems and compare product features to identify fakes on online platforms.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Establish strict IP compliance and traceability systems to prevent involvement in counterfeit supply chains.
Practice note: Conduct thorough supplier due diligence to avoid procuring unverified, low-cost consumables.
What to monitor: Enforcement trends by UKIPO and ICCE regarding counterfeit print materials and online marketplace liabilities.

news_items.title: BREAKING: Wilus enforces Wi-Fi 6 injunction, asks Asus to remove products from Germany
news_items.title_zh: 突发：Wilus 执行 Wi-Fi 6 禁令，要求华硕撤出德国市场
news_items.title_en: Wilus Enforces Wi-Fi 6 Injunction Against Asus, Demands Product Removal from Germany
news_items.summary: Sisvel licensor moves to impose sales ban awarded by Munich Regional Court
news_items.ai_summary_zh: Sisvel 被许可方 Wilus 依据慕尼黑地区法院此前作出的判决，正式执行针对华硕（Asus）产品的销售禁令。该行动聚焦于 Wi-Fi 6 标准必要专利侵权纠纷，强制要求华硕立即从德国市场移除相关涉案产品。此举标志着德国法院在 SEP 执法层面的强硬立场，展示了专利权人利用当地司法程序迅速实现市场排除的商业策略，对涉及无线通信标准的终端制造商构成直接合规挑战。
news_items.ai_summary_en: Wilus, a licensee of Sisvel, has moved to enforce a sales ban against Asus products in Germany, following a ruling by the Munich Regional Court. This enforcement action targets alleged infringement of Wi-Fi 6 standard essential patents (SEPs). The court order mandates the immediate removal of the implicated devices from the German market. This development underscores the stringent approach of German courts toward SEP enforcement and highlights the effectiveness of injunctive relief as a commercial strategy for patent holders. For terminal manufacturers involved in wireless communication standards, this case presents a significant compliance challenge, demonstrating how local judicial procedures can rapidly result in market exclusion.
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类执法动作给出配套安排或更明确口径。
news_items.ai_insight_en: Companies operating in Europe must closely monitor SEP litigation risks in Germany, particularly concerning ubiquitous standards like Wi-Fi. It is critical to proactively assess patent licensing statuses and develop contingency plans for the German market to mitigate sudden injunctions that could disrupt supply chains or cause inventory losses. Engaging in global license negotiations early may provide necessary leverage. Establishing robust SEP risk warning mechanisms allows exporters to anticipate legal threats and evaluate licensing necessities promptly, thereby avoiding severe market access restrictions and ensuring business continuity amidst aggressive enforcement actions.
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Wilus 依据慕尼黑法院判决，强制执行针对华硕的销售禁令", "涉案技术为 Wi-Fi 6 标准必要专利，要求产品立即撤出德国", "凸显德国作为 SEP 诉讼高地，禁令救济执行力度显著增强"]
news_items.ai_core_points_en: ["Wilus enforces the Munich Regional Court's judgment, imposing a strict sales ban on Asus products within the German jurisdiction.", "The dispute involves Wi-Fi 6 standard essential patents, requiring the immediate withdrawal of infringing products from the German market.", "This case highlights Germany's status as a key SEP litigation venue, with significantly strengthened enforcement of injunctive relief."]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["德国禁令执行迅速，出口企业须建立 SEP 风险预警机制", "面对 SEP 诉讼，应主动评估许可必要性，规避市场禁入风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rapid enforcement of German injunctions necessitates proactive SEP risk assessment and preparedness for potential market exclusions.", "Practice note: Evaluate licensing requirements early and establish emergency response protocols to mitigate supply chain disruptions from SEP disputes.", "What to monitor: Track enforcement trends in German SEP cases, especially regarding common wireless standards like Wi-Fi, to anticipate regulatory shifts."]
core_points_en: Wilus enforces the Munich Regional Court's judgment, imposing a strict sales ban on Asus products within the German jurisdiction.
The dispute involves Wi-Fi 6 standard essential patents, requiring the immediate withdrawal of infringing products from the German market.
This case highlights Germany's status as a key SEP litigation venue, with significantly strengthened enforcement of injunctive relief.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rapid enforcement of German injunctions necessitates proactive SEP risk assessment and preparedness for potential market exclusions.
Practice note: Evaluate licensing requirements early and establish emergency response protocols to mitigate supply chain disruptions from SEP disputes.
What to monitor: Track enforcement trends in German SEP cases, especially regarding common wireless standards like Wi-Fi, to anticipate regulatory shifts.
